| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpb5lbkn2d9pdemi11g2uffmel7j0n0mfjcet9gg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s9ie2o36c5h2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkgja5r69uj61hpsv37bqemdb282tofpd6gqijdg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s9ie2o36c5h2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zoh5o3mp6vslpr02s5mv9stcfrcmsbh5qc9s11lo_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s9ie2o36c5h2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zehhscn7bbrn6n89u1atuj4rf7bfsfde75itoncg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s9ie2o36c5h2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zku2merlc29ld44jlv4u3ohbfpk5v56a9fmmh5s0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s9ie2o36c5h2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3v9eqn8nlt1rkbb58k49iersid1fhmj0lu7ei4o_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s9ie2o36c5h2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgcugbncpvn8mrio0p0bu0o9eqvre8ocl1glnh0g_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s9ie2o36c5h2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zu48hu9mmmnf2rgm5tv7m5jkr650olfjjnflvrqo_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s9ie2o36c5h2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---

name: Steve Scalise
subject: We must make the Trump-DOGE cuts PERMANENT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
We've got a once-in-a-lifetime chance to slam the brakes on government waste.

_This Majority Leader Update is intended for Patriot only. If this is not you, please ignore this email._
* * *
Hi there - it's Majority Leader Steve Scalise.

I know you're busy (I am too) so I'll get right to it: We've got a once-in-a-lifetime chance to slam the brakes on government waste. I'm talking about making the Trump-DOGE cuts PERMANENT.

Thanks to the work of President Trump and the DOGE team, we've uncovered _BILLIONS OF DOLLARS_ in waste, fraud, and abuse.

And I'm proud to be leading the charge in the House. President Trump just sent the DOGE cuts over and I just called a vote to codify them ASAP. But before I take this to the House floor, I need your input.

**_[Can you take a quick 5-minute survey?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zsos8brla285v4rigsv3rv9iobm3rs54bug9u540_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s9ie2p72cjh2bs)_ Here's a quick preview:****QUESTION 1:** Should we cut $1.1 BILLION in funding for PBS and NPR propaganda?| [YES >>
](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zh7hubrjg0u9chrgem290kvr9t76snlb01qqo6ao_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s9ie2p72cjh2bs)| [NO >>
](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z5upiuc0pr5q5ibl61e553k8hd27vr9rgdug86b0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s9ie2p72cjh2bs)
---|---
**QUESTION 2:** Should we cut $6 MILLION in funding for "net zero cities" in Mexico?
[YES >>
](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zckoh939i7cofv7nho8q8glegu1fhguo8gb1eo9g_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s9ie2p72cjh2bs)| [NO >>
](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z6no2s9hrqgfommpps99sguhi1vr4ect4hien7jo_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s9ie2p72cjh2bs)
---|---
**QUESTION 3:** Should we cut $3 MILLION in funding for Sesame Street programs in Iraq?
[YES >>
](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z6s4l49m76sc489he6v0r790tf521pa19r4vfd3g_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s9ie2p72cjh2bs)| [NO >>
](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zg04m7rk802dj9kph980vpu8l6i49aamh1m2k0cg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s9ie2p72cjh2bs)
---|---
[ACCESS THE FULL SURVEY
](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z3pfkbi2n06dttbegit4epecneaqbmde3tkmmeco_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s9ie2p72cjh2bs)
For decades, the size of our government spiraled out of control, Deep State operatives took matters into their own hands, and unelected bureaucrats wasted our tax dollars on Liberal pet projects.

It's a national disgrace.

So - now that House Republicans, President Trump, and I are taking on government waste head-on - I want to know where you stand on everything DOGE-related. No sugarcoating, no games, no gimmicks.

_**[](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zttggsqkudndbt15ocq05h254haas1aofn9g8da8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s9ie2p72cjh2bs "The vote is NEXT WEEK so please record your response as soon as possible!")[The vote is NEXT WEEK so please record your response as soon as possible!](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zsse810grb9bhoolje31nsnhc375668kl4spml98_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s9ie2p72cjh2bs)**_

Thank you in advance for your participation,
Steve Scalise
* * *
_This Majority Leader Update is intended for Patriot only. If this is not you, please ignore this email._
* * *
\- Democrat Leadership formed an _anti-Trump task force_
\- More than a dozen Attorneys General are _suing_ the Trump Administration
\- A House Democrat just introduced _7 Articles of Impeachment_
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z198f3hmkrqod607vrke1daob2e6gvmq21m9rtbo_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s9ie2p72cjh2bs)
If they manage to strip us of our House Majority, they'll have the power to impeach, investigate, and bring his entire legislative agenda to a SCREECHING HALT!

**We're PLEADING WITH YOU to do your part to help SAVE our Pro-Trump House Majority:**
[ DO YOUR PART: PITCH IN NOW
](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zs7al274bp47ohpfg5ea4u7kb6fmmkpv7bma3icg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s9ie2p72cjh2bs)
| |
---
| | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC.
---
Team Scalise is committed to restoring a Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement.

Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without "green cards," and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer of each individual who contributes over $200 in a calendar year.

[Privacy Policy](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zbqpolni3p7dbtmhki11netn5thigs6tsin5ooe0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s9ie2p72cjh2bs)

6/21: [Monroe GOP Breakfast Club](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qlukrc-didthutlhu-jr/)
6/21: [Walworth GOP Golf Outing Fundraiser](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qlukrc-didthutlhu-jy/)
6/21: [St. Croix GOP Battle Program Launch Party](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qlukrc-didthutlhu-jj/)
6/29: [Kenosha County GOP Parade](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qlukrc-didthutlhu-jt/)
7/4: [Manitowoc County 4th of July Parade](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qlukrc-didthutlhu-ji/)
7/5: [Monroe GOP Breakfast Club](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qlukrc-didthutlhu-jd/)
7/9: [Manitowoc Membership Meeting](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qlukrc-didthutlhu-jh/)
7/19: [Monroe GOP Breakfast Club](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qlukrc-didthutlhu-jk/)** **County Event Recap** **Buffalo and Pepin County**
A packed house tonight in Buffalo for their joint member meeting with Pepin County! The energy in the room was incredible as local conservatives gear up for a summer full of grassroots action and meaningful community engagement. With the 2026 elections on the horizon, these leaders understand what's at stake--and they're ready to roll up their sleeves and make a real impact. Exciting things are happening in Western Wisconsin! **Jackson County**
Jackson County Republicans joined Congressman Derrick Van Orden for the West Salem Memorial Day Parade! **Waukesha County**
Over the last few weeks, Republicans in Waukesha County walked in a Memorial Day Parade and hosted a great Pints and Politics event! **Dane County**
The Republican Party of Dane County hosted a well-attended Pints and Politics! They discussed the need to fire Tony Evers and elect Republicans up and down the ballot! **St. Croix County**
Fantastic turnout at the St. Croix GOP Beer & Brat Fundraiser! The room was full of energy, great food, and friends committed to the cause. Speakers delivered powerful messages on the importance of maintaining a full-time headquarters and staying engaged at the local level. **Trempealeau County **
Republicans in Trempealeau County hosted an engaging and informative update on what's ahead for 2026 and how folks can get involved! **Eau Claire County **
Eau Claire GOP hosted a member movie night! It's always a packed house and an incredible atmosphere. We love seeing the energy continue after elections in Eau Claire! **Shawano County**
Shawano County is updating its membership on what happened at the Republican Party of Wisconsin's State Convention and planning for a successful future! **Marathon County**
Marathon County GOP hosted a wonderful event to give a legislative update, discuss the upcoming Governor's race, and share how everyone can get involved! **Taylor County**
Republicans in Taylor County are ready to strategize and win in 2026! **Juneau County**
Juneau County GOP hosted a meeting to hear from local candidates on what it takes to get involved. There is a lot of growth in the Juneau County GOP! **Kewaunee County**
Republicans in Kewaunee County showed up strong at their Lincoln-Reagan Dinner! Keep up the great work! **Manitowoc County**
Great showing by Republicans in Manitowoc County GOP at their Memorial Day parade! **Monroe County**
Monroe County is fired up for 2026 at their breakfast! Special guest, Hannah Testin, shared how to get involved and how Republicans can win in 2026! **Outagamie County**
Republicans in Outagamie County hosted Senator Ron Johnson and Congressman Tony Wied for an update on all the things happening in DC! **Ozaukee County**
Great turnout for the Ozaukee County Pints and Politics! **Price County**
The Price County Republican Party held a picnic to celebrate the 177th birthday of the state of Wisconsin! Special guests in attendance included District 23 State Sen. Jesse James and District 68 State Rep. Rob Summerfield! [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qlukrc-didthutlhu-ju/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qlukrc-didthutlhu-tl/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qlukrc-didthutlhu-tr/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qlukrc-didthutlhu-ty/) | [ Share ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-fb-qlukrc-didthutlhu-tt/) | [ Tweet ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-tw-qlukrc-didthutlhu-ti/) | [ Forward ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.forwardtomyfriend.com/y-didthutlhu-931243C5-qlukrc-l-td)
---|---|---
**PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN** NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE.www.WisGOP.org [Preferences](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.updatemyprofile.com/y-qlukrc-931243C5-didthutlhu-th) | [Unsubscribe](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-u-qlukrc-didthutlhu-tk/)

name: Trump Birthday Alert
subject: June 14th is no ordinary day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elect Common Sense
body:
President Trump’s Birthday + 250 Years of the U.S. Army

Friend,

June 14, 2025, is no ordinary day.

It's **President Trump 's 79th birthday**--and it's also the**250th birthday of the United States Army.**

And how is President Trump choosing to spend this special day? **Honoring our heroes in uniform** with a wreath-laying ceremony at Arlington National Cemetery and an Army birthday festival on the National Mall.

_While the Left attacks our country, President Trump is standing strong for the brave men and women who defend our freedoms every single day._

This year, we're inviting you to be part of something special. _**[Sign President Trump's Birthday Card now and join him in celebrating our troops on the Army's 250th anniversary.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zjmb4bjrppl29si5lsqv28fuv8ail319cmoqtgt0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s9ie1pb4chh2bs)**_
[SIGN THE CARD](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zd20ufesdpg3tcljga0jv9mtjg3b53h9bg4k5ol8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s9ie1pb4chh2bs)

**Let 's show President Trump--and our troops--that the American people have their backs.**

name: Elizabeth Nader
subject: Your last chance to vote early
body:
Peter, TODAY and TOMORROW are your last chance to vote early in-person in the New Jersey Primary. Only 22 percent of New Jerseyans are voting in primaries. That’s only 2 out of every 10! The result?
| | [ ]()
---
Peter, **TODAY** and **TOMORROW** are your last chance to vote early in-person in the New Jersey Primary. **Only 22 percent of New Jerseyans are voting in primaries.** That’s only 2 out of every 10! The result? We have an abundance of Lemons...disappointing, do-nothing, status-quo candidates on our general election ballots. The elite establishment keeps picking our candidates and banking on the fact that the vast majority of New Jersey voters will sit out in the primaries - but we can beat them at their own game. This is OUR chance to kick out the lemons and put some real, Common Sense candidates on the November ballot. **That is why it is so important for you to vote early in the June 10th primary.** Already voted? – THANK you! Please forward this to a friend or neighbor. Don’t risk waiting until Election Day. You might get sick. Your car could break down. There could be long lines or problems at your polling place. Your vote is too important to risk it. 📍**Find your location here >>** [https://nj.gov/state/elections/vote-early-voting.shtml](https://xtz223.keap-link007.com/v2/click/3211102e8d67f1108aaf2fdc18e69bcf/eJyNkE2LwkAMhv9LztXB1q1rbyIipa4Hcc8y2KCjY2aYiWW70v9u_MCTC3sLyZMnvLkAI2nisoYCfvg3TTNIIODWeIPEU0est_dp-jEcZIMErKHjPLizh-LydvkF3NqjLP9MgFuPgqxXk2lVLuebRbmshPQ6yI1_efJ0nL88s69JuYCu-1OMJ8OzRtwRCg5nvCWqjaTi72CF3zP7WChFh_7ONSqyZlRoZW4cRdU4xh7qYNuelIZ2_bjnkxWx9h6pfn6lwvah767dyWwQ) **Voting locations are open today until 8 PM and tomorrow from 10 AM - 6PM.** No appointment is necessary! Now is the time to make your voice heard. What kind of candidates do you want on your November ballot? Don’t leave the decision to others. Thank you for doing your part to save our state. Let’s go! For New Jersey, Elizabeth Nader
---
| [ ]()
---
President
Common Sense Club
---
|
---
Hello, and thank you for taking the time to read this email. This message is part of an ongoing conversation between us, and I want to take a moment to ensure you have full transparency about why you received this message, how your information is handled, and what to expect from future emails. Why You’re Receiving This Email You’re receiving this email because at some point, you opted in to receive updates, news, or information on a specific topic we’ve previously discussed or shared. Whether it was through a subscription, a form submission, or another form of communication, your information was shared willingly, and we respect your decision to connect with us. If you’re wondering about the nature of our correspondence, rest assured that we aim to keep all emails relevant, timely, and free from unnecessary clutter. This includes respecting your inbox and refraining from sending irrelevant messages. Your Privacy is Important We value your trust and take your privacy very seriously. The information you provide is securely stored and never shared, sold, or used outside the purpose for which you provided it. If you ever want to review how we handle your data, feel free to contact us directly. Transparency is our priority, and we’re happy to address any questions you might have. You are always in control of the information you share. If you feel that any part of your subscription or interaction needs clarification, let us know. We’re here to provide accurate answers and ensure your satisfaction. How to Unsubscribe or Manage Your Preferences We understand that everyone’s inbox is different. If you ever find our emails no longer relevant, there’s no hard feelings. You can easily manage your email preferences or unsubscribe using the link provided below. By clicking the unsubscribe link, you’ll be taken to a page where you can either adjust your communication preferences (such as receiving fewer emails or only on specific topics) or completely remove yourself from our list. The process is straightforward, and any changes will take effect promptly. We don’t use tricks or gimmicks to keep you subscribed. Our priority is to ensure that our emails add value to your day, and if they don’t, we respect your decision to part ways. Accessibility and Communication If you have any trouble accessing the unsubscribe page, managing preferences, or understanding why you’re receiving this email, you can reach out directly to our support team at info@commonsenseclub.org. We aim to provide a response within a reasonable time frame and address your concerns effectively. Our communication is designed to be as inclusive as possible, but we know there’s always room for improvement. If you have any feedback on how we can make our emails more accessible or relevant, please don’t hesitate to share. A Commitment to Non-Intrusive Emails We aim to create a non-intrusive communication experience. This means we won’t overwhelm your inbox with excessive messages, and we work hard to ensure our content remains clear and concise. The purpose of this email is to stay connected with you and provide updates or information that we believe is meaningful. If we ever fail to meet these standards, we encourage you to let us know. Feedback, whether positive or constructive, is always appreciated. Your thoughts help us understand how we can do better and improve our communication approach. While we cannot guarantee every suggestion will be implemented, we will take the time to carefully review and consider your input. Contact Information If you’d like to get in touch with us outside of managing your preferences, here’s how you can reach us: Email: info@commonsenseclub.org
Phone: (866) 916-3221 (please note this is a text-only line)
Mailing Address:
Common Sense Club
165 Route 35
Red Bank, New Jersey, 07701 We strive to ensure all communication channels are open and readily available to you. Whether it’s a question, comment, or concern, our team is ready to assist. Legal Information We comply with all applicable laws and regulations regarding email communication. This includes adhering to anti-spam laws and maintaining the highest standards for consent-based communication. Your trust matters, and we work diligently to ensure every email you receive meets these requirements. If you need further clarification on our compliance policies or legal obligations, please feel free to ask. Transparency and accountability are central to our communication strategy, and we’re happy to provide additional details if needed. A Final Note Emails are one of the many ways we stay connected, but we understand they aren’t perfect for everyone. If there’s another way you’d prefer to communicate or stay updated, let us know. Whether it’s through social media, a direct call, or another channel, we’re open to finding the most effective way to share information with you. We want to emphasize that our goal is never to disrupt or clutter your inbox. Every email sent is intended to provide value, and we genuinely appreciate your time and attention. Thank you for allowing us to stay in touch with you. This footer was designed to ensure transparency, provide essential information, and give you full control over your communication preferences. We hope it meets your expectations, but if there’s anything you’d like to see improved, we’re always here to listen.
---

The process is straightforward, and any changes will take effect promptly. We don’t use tricks or gimmicks to keep you subscribed. Our priority is to ensure that our emails add value to your day, and if they don’t, we respect your decision to part ways. Accessibility and Communication If you have any trouble accessing the unsubscribe page, managing preferences, or understanding why you’re receiving this email, you can reach out directly to our support team at info@commonsenseclub.org. We aim to provide a response within a reasonable time frame and address your concerns effectively. Our communication is designed to be as inclusive as possible, but we know there’s always room for improvement. If you have any feedback on how we can make our emails more accessible or relevant, please don’t hesitate to share. A Commitment to Non-Intrusive Emails We aim to create a non-intrusive communication experience. This means we won’t overwhelm your inbox with excessive messages, and we work hard to ensure our content remains clear and concise. The purpose of this email is to stay connected with you and provide updates or information that we believe is meaningful. If we ever fail to meet these standards, we encourage you to let us know. Feedback, whether positive or constructive, is always appreciated. Your thoughts help us understand how we can do better and improve our communication approach. While we cannot guarantee every suggestion will be implemented, we will take the time to carefully review and consider your input. Contact Information If you’d like to get in touch with us outside of managing your preferences, here’s how you can reach us: Email: info@commonsenseclub.org Phone: (866) 916-3221 (please note this is a text-only line) Mailing Address: Common Sense Club 165 Route 35 Red Bank, New Jersey, 07701 We strive to ensure all communication channels are open and readily available to you. Whether it’s a question, comment, or concern, our team is ready to assist. Legal Information We comply with all applicable laws and regulations regarding email communication. This includes adhering to anti-spam laws and maintaining the highest standards for consent-based communication. Your trust matters, and we work diligently to ensure every email you receive meets these requirements. If you need further clarification on our compliance policies or legal obligations, please feel free to ask. Transparency and accountability are central to our communication strategy, and we’re happy to provide additional details if needed. A Final Note Emails are one of the many ways we stay connected, but we understand they aren’t perfect for everyone. If there’s another way you’d prefer to communicate or stay updated, let us know. Whether it’s through social media, a direct call, or another channel, we’re open to finding the most effective way to share information with you. We want to emphasize that our goal is never to disrupt or clutter your inbox. Every email sent is intended to provide value, and we genuinely appreciate your time and attention. Thank you for allowing us to stay in touch with you. This footer was designed to ensure transparency, provide essential information, and give you full control over your communication preferences. We hope it meets your expectations, but if there’s anything you’d like to see improved, we’re always here to listen. Common Sense Club 165 Route 35 Red Bank, New Jersey 07701 United States

| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[ ](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/KTSya4666MNIYd4_SX7vLA~~/AARclBA~/MLvH1glaaCP1UONd8iiZpnJJYl3q01pYlsQ5JTMoEv6Sequ7ElriahW8ZJ3TA6gIDGMf5XZIAZaTIrhwBJqVTibd_QmO7ovG_jk96jNP9j8EDbzik1Iepc-rTrQ81Eqps4ECUF2pAEynsYbrI_PDagR6sdGekPjKmd3vCXGbV5Pxx0nzKbBIBS_jnVfuhmajTJj82PGTyaqIEbhu6iutoF9MunBtuWwJrfqlR88f4hp0I8F5xrxv3ci9uRrmbCdehfPK4iTblPF67gZKWXXBtAV6PFVfzL2Jf-bNra4hee10Veu5OjVD0UrutDG9vQM7nLMj_57_fpnNRX8Amzxj4bhhIZTuyusOCOsooZIkiYXNGG9h6oh6DuUEjpQkkpPL_J3uMzbZYTXDuNxotEUDpw~~)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's [hear.com's](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/KTSya4666MNIYd4_SX7vLA~~/AARclBA~/MLvH1glaaCP1UONd8iiZpnJJYl3q01pYlsQ5JTMoEv6Sequ7ElriahW8ZJ3TA6gIDGMf5XZIAZaTIrhwBJqVTibd_QmO7ovG_jk96jNP9j8EDbzik1Iepc-rTrQ81Eqps4ECUF2pAEynsYbrI_PDagR6sdGekPjKmd3vCXGbV5Pxx0nzKbBIBS_jnVfuhmajTJj82PGTyaqIEbhu6iutoF9MunBtuWwJrfqlR88f4hp0I8F5xrxv3ci9uRrmbCdehfPK4iTblPF67gZKWXXBtAV6PFVfzL2Jf-bNra4hee10Veu5OjVD0UrutDG9vQM7nLMj_57_fpnNRX8Amzxj4bhhIZTuyusOCOsooZIkiYXNGG9h6oh6DuUEjpQkkpPL_J3uMzbZYTXDuNxotEUDpw~~) **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **[hear.com's](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/KTSya4666MNIYd4_SX7vLA~~/AARclBA~/MLvH1glaaCP1UONd8iiZpnJJYl3q01pYlsQ5JTMoEv6Sequ7ElriahW8ZJ3TA6gIDGMf5XZIAZaTIrhwBJqVTibd_QmO7ovG_jk96jNP9j8EDbzik1Iepc-rTrQ81Eqps4ECUF2pAEynsYbrI_PDagR6sdGekPjKmd3vCXGbV5Pxx0nzKbBIBS_jnVfuhmajTJj82PGTyaqIEbhu6iutoF9MunBtuWwJrfqlR88f4hp0I8F5xrxv3ci9uRrmbCdehfPK4iTblPF67gZKWXXBtAV6PFVfzL2Jf-bNra4hee10Veu5OjVD0UrutDG9vQM7nLMj_57_fpnNRX8Amzxj4bhhIZTuyusOCOsooZIkiYXNGG9h6oh6DuUEjpQkkpPL_J3uMzbZYTXDuNxotEUDpw~~) IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[ Check if you qualify ](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/KTSya4666MNIYd4_SX7vLA~~/AARclBA~/MLvH1glaaCP1UONd8iiZpnJJYl3q01pYlsQ5JTMoEv6Sequ7ElriahW8ZJ3TA6gIDGMf5XZIAZaTIrhwBJqVTibd_QmO7ovG_jk96jNP9j8EDbzik1Iepc-rTrQ81Eqps4ECUF2pAEynsYbrI_PDagR6sdGekPjKmd3vCXGbV5Pxx0nzKbBIBS_jnVfuhmajTJj82PGTyaqIEbhu6iutoF9MunBtuWwJrfqlR88f4hp0I8F5xrxv3ci9uRrmbCdehfPK4iTblPF67gZKWXXBtAV6PFVfzL2Jf-bNra4hee10Veu5OjVD0UrutDG9vQM7nLMj_57_fpnNRX8Amzxj4bhhIZTuyusOCOsooZIkiYXNGG9h6oh6DuUEjpQkkpPL_J3uMzbZYTXDuNxotEUDpw~~)
[ ](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/KTSya4666MNIYd4_SX7vLA~~/AARclBA~/MLvH1glaaCP1UONd8iiZpnJJYl3q01pYlsQ5JTMoEv6Sequ7ElriahW8ZJ3TA6gIDGMf5XZIAZaTIrhwBJqVTibd_QmO7ovG_jk96jNP9j8EDbzik1Iepc-rTrQ81Eqps4ECUF2pAEynsYbrI_PDagR6sdGekPjKmd3vCXGbV5Pxx0nzKbBIBS_jnVfuhmajTJj82PGTyaqIEbhu6iutoF9MunBtuWwJrfqlR88f4hp0I8F5xrxv3ci9uRrmbCdehfPK4iTblPF67gZKWXXBtAV6PFVfzL2Jf-bNra4hee10Veu5OjVD0UrutDG9vQM7nLMj_57_fpnNRX8Amzxj4bhhIZTuyusOCOsooZIkiYXNGG9h6oh6DuUEjpQkkpPL_J3uMzbZYTXDuNxotEUDpw~~)
What makes [hear.com's](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/KTSya4666MNIYd4_SX7vLA~~/AARclBA~/MLvH1glaaCP1UONd8iiZpnJJYl3q01pYlsQ5JTMoEv6Sequ7ElriahW8ZJ3TA6gIDGMf5XZIAZaTIrhwBJqVTibd_QmO7ovG_jk96jNP9j8EDbzik1Iepc-rTrQ81Eqps4ECUF2pAEynsYbrI_PDagR6sdGekPjKmd3vCXGbV5Pxx0nzKbBIBS_jnVfuhmajTJj82PGTyaqIEbhu6iutoF9MunBtuWwJrfqlR88f4hp0I8F5xrxv3ci9uRrmbCdehfPK4iTblPF67gZKWXXBtAV6PFVfzL2Jf-bNra4hee10Veu5OjVD0UrutDG9vQM7nLMj_57_fpnNRX8Amzxj4bhhIZTuyusOCOsooZIkiYXNGG9h6oh6DuUEjpQkkpPL_J3uMzbZYTXDuNxotEUDpw~~) IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that [hear.com's](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/KTSya4666MNIYd4_SX7vLA~~/AARclBA~/MLvH1glaaCP1UONd8iiZpnJJYl3q01pYlsQ5JTMoEv6Sequ7ElriahW8ZJ3TA6gIDGMf5XZIAZaTIrhwBJqVTibd_QmO7ovG_jk96jNP9j8EDbzik1Iepc-rTrQ81Eqps4ECUF2pAEynsYbrI_PDagR6sdGekPjKmd3vCXGbV5Pxx0nzKbBIBS_jnVfuhmajTJj82PGTyaqIEbhu6iutoF9MunBtuWwJrfqlR88f4hp0I8F5xrxv3ci9uRrmbCdehfPK4iTblPF67gZKWXXBtAV6PFVfzL2Jf-bNra4hee10Veu5OjVD0UrutDG9vQM7nLMj_57_fpnNRX8Amzxj4bhhIZTuyusOCOsooZIkiYXNGG9h6oh6DuUEjpQkkpPL_J3uMzbZYTXDuNxotEUDpw~~) IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains [hear.com's](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/KTSya4666MNIYd4_SX7vLA~~/AARclBA~/MLvH1glaaCP1UONd8iiZpnJJYl3q01pYlsQ5JTMoEv6Sequ7ElriahW8ZJ3TA6gIDGMf5XZIAZaTIrhwBJqVTibd_QmO7ovG_jk96jNP9j8EDbzik1Iepc-rTrQ81Eqps4ECUF2pAEynsYbrI_PDagR6sdGekPjKmd3vCXGbV5Pxx0nzKbBIBS_jnVfuhmajTJj82PGTyaqIEbhu6iutoF9MunBtuWwJrfqlR88f4hp0I8F5xrxv3ci9uRrmbCdehfPK4iTblPF67gZKWXXBtAV6PFVfzL2Jf-bNra4hee10Veu5OjVD0UrutDG9vQM7nLMj_57_fpnNRX8Amzxj4bhhIZTuyusOCOsooZIkiYXNGG9h6oh6DuUEjpQkkpPL_J3uMzbZYTXDuNxotEUDpw~~) founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. **Get started today.**
[ Check if you qualify ](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/KTSya4666MNIYd4_SX7vLA~~/AARclBA~/MLvH1glaaCP1UONd8iiZpnJJYl3q01pYlsQ5JTMoEv6Sequ7ElriahW8ZJ3TA6gIDGMf5XZIAZaTIrhwBJqVTibd_QmO7ovG_jk96jNP9j8EDbzik1Iepc-rTrQ81Eqps4ECUF2pAEynsYbrI_PDagR6sdGekPjKmd3vCXGbV5Pxx0nzKbBIBS_jnVfuhmajTJj82PGTyaqIEbhu6iutoF9MunBtuWwJrfqlR88f4hp0I8F5xrxv3ci9uRrmbCdehfPK4iTblPF67gZKWXXBtAV6PFVfzL2Jf-bNra4hee10Veu5OjVD0UrutDG9vQM7nLMj_57_fpnNRX8Amzxj4bhhIZTuyusOCOsooZIkiYXNGG9h6oh6DuUEjpQkkpPL_J3uMzbZYTXDuNxotEUDpw~~)

**Good morning!** On this day in 1976, _New York Magazine_ published [_Tribal Rites of the New Saturday Night_](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGOwyAQheHT4C4RDNjEBcU27rLtlhaEwZ4ImwgmiXL7lfcK2z3pSV_x_1znq6dM-_LtN3Scyrzju2VkxjrXZ2vkK7LP5BnbvYRW8VHqDBL6kxxO0s7RU_7MposuIQLqDp2yZoRRWlDd6gCDUWYM6uYvUUsfUgjJShtQRdun2JE7NDlIq6Ts1eU8aIy9BtTK2vEWL8JIjMSlnu-Fdl4x5U95YT3fytZltzI_mtBfAiYB0_7Z_HI8x6Zl5UwJBUwJPT8rNgGT6UetBUxddfHxppypDVYYuWye8h_K_yrxcvAbAAD__6Rycic), the article that inspired the blockbuster 1977 John Travolta movie _Saturday Night Fever_.

## Russia Launches Retaliatory Strike on Ukraine
Russia launched [large-scale drone and missile attacks](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFu8yAUBeCngS0WXLDBA8O_eMu_dkQErpMbEZMCjZU-feW-QrcjHemTzvk4-3OgTNv1f3ig62vxG-4tY-9Yff1qjULFHjKFju1eLq3is1QPAsaTmE7C-BQov73mya2IgIqjk0bPMAsDkt8camOVURiiTXZOq5YyjkpHsDKqFAQnd2hiEkYKMUo7TArTqACVNGaOyTItMFEvdbgX2voN1_wuL6xDLA-e3a33Z2PqH4OFwbLv-3C5xKNjsBxjGCyhdooZjxhfV_P9lvdPsxVeXXrulDO1yTAtro9A-Vftf7ri5eAnAAD__7XgcsQ) on Ukraine Friday, striking Kyiv, Lutsk, and the Ternopil region, killing at least three people and injuring 49. The offensive [lasted for several hours](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDtuwzAQRE8jdTSWK0qkChZp3DltSmFNrmza1AckZUM5faDkCCkHAwzmva_LcKEQw3z7pIltGZdh5neOXAqnIW05B0pcKAYqnB_LNSdelzQgYCugE6AHTyHug6q9HZmRm5qt1KrHHjTK-m5b9ga78TrKFrwzynS9d41W0uiRyFMd7LEGHWgJ0Epz6hr2bYPcSK17502lgH0oSzo9ljCXO49xX16cTm6Z6mjvpay5aj4qPFd4pvUAOKojpBJc5ArPfyhieyYKM4s3JbFuJczimyPP-bnvoqRtWoUBZ3qjrg65RU-AEj0pBq_caBChTtav7xBjyJ2uFNwmCvH3SfmXvpfFnwAAAP__Fd6EkA), involving a reported 407 Russian drones and 44 ballistic and cruise missiles. Ukrainian forces shot down 30 of the cruise missiles and up to 200 of the drones, officials confirmed. Russia's Defense Ministry said it used long-range precision weapons to strike Ukrainian military targets, including arms depots, drone factories, and repair facilities. The strikes [followed a warning](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDESmzAQRU8jOpjVIiQoVKRR57QpmTVabNky8kiyGW6fIZmcIM1Wb_b_939d5guFGLbbT3qxrWuaN95L5Fo5z_lTSqDMlWKgyuWRriXzO-UZAYcWdAtm9hTiMavG25UZuW_YSqMmnMCgbO5W-XFZgCReaVolD4saSSrpDfSy10Y3wZ7fQIORAIMcO92zH3rkXhozLX4UCtiHmnL3SGGrd17jkb6cuyW9mmjvtb6L6H8IdALdvu_dp1BNno4TEOhKTfkQ6E6zk0g5eoHuTBXoQP87f3W3lkJuqVZanu3zCN_288wUNhboRgV6GPQAYAS6Jlv_3kOMoWgjFNxeFOKfUvW_lvxa_B0AAP__jXiE7g) from Russian President Vladimir Putin, relayed through President Trump, that Russia would retaliate after Ukrainian drones destroyed strategic bombers deep inside Russian territory last week.
## U.S. Economy Adds 139,000 Jobs
The U.S. economy added 139,000 jobs in May, [surpassing expectations](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LvOozAUBOCngc7It2AoXGxDl223RCf4ODjrC7JPEvH2K_YV_n40mm_-3Nc7hBjy8zcktOTLmvHbIhJhXeu7tQAVCWIAwvYqj1bxKHWVXN4YHxk3q4MQz1X3znpEiapHK4ye5cyNFP1uZ9TabH6GyUixTVoJAd5rNXKtjZ99H-zVxkduBOc3MQ2jQndTEpUwZt7c1GmOLlCpw6uETDv6eJYP1mErqY92Jzpap351cunk4kOGvOFwwl7KlejkcpE6ubwbi_AolSWof5EYONeYUDPnnF00FjJLcLJ3xnTEcibMxPYSXWONENzJgJiWTExSKiH0NOyUYl-tO74hxtBG02n-TBDi_2n0oz8_Vv4LAAD__-s_iXY), while the unemployment rate remained unchanged at 4.2% for the third consecutive month, according to the latest jobs report. Health care led May's job growth [with 62,000 new positions](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkMuOozAQRb_G7Iz8AuOFFxmNmFVm2b1EDi4SJ34g2wnN37dIf0KvSqq6Kt1zPs_T2Tjv4vW_CaDrkqYIW_FQK-QpP0txJkM13pkK5Z4uJcOa8sQI6zDpMZGTNc7vk2isXgAY8AY0lUIxRSSjzU33bBbDLEB2ANJeKJmVmi8CFDGG0kE1Th_fSE8kJaSjQ9tzsB1nwKmUarYDEgSsqym39-RivcHi9_SC3M4pNF7fal0L4ifERsTGbdvaUOJxQ2yEiJ8FsTGkCPsxTX5APTYHC37DVFyTNTuGsPq0Qy7YWAsWU64e-B1zEQez42f8iQSIFZuKBUNsNBmfTvSfXfIX4mOanUX8759DKGzlA_LaZG3XzXnvSi-RINdgnH9Xr7_y_dLsOwAA__8b7pZs), followed by hospitality, which added 48,000 jobs, reflecting continued strength in service-related sectors. Average hourly earnings also rose 15 cents to $36.24, pushing the annual wage growth rate from 3.8% to 3.9%. Economists [expect the Fed to hold](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO6yAQRb8Gd7YGbCAuKF7jLq_dEhEYYiJsIpiNlb9fOdJ-wTbTzNW5Ovfraq8u5bTf_7sNDcVidzxaRiKstn63llxFcjk5wvYot1bxWaoVIGQPqgdtg0v5bacumIgocOzQcD3NYgYteLcapSIHiVzySc6K34Lz8-ijUqh4lOi7ZE4aKNAcQPLLoEYMchQ4cq1nHy5sAgyJSh0eJe20Yszv8sI6-LJ12axEz8bGf0wsTCzHcQx-v_nzycRyoplYQP2e06H_SFC_uXd_BoaVttxVE55Hyjk1pdkE982l_KmgP-3yMuInAAD__0YvdI8) interest rates steady, citing concerns over tariff-driven inflation despite strong job growth, steady unemployment, and continued economic resilience.
## Triple Crown Finale
Preakness winner Journalism enters [today's Belmont Stakes](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuhDAQRL_GdCB7zWEoXKShu7QpkcHrwxeDkXdz6P4-Ir-QbqSR3mje1326u5ji_vh0G1oOedrxpITMWKbyQxRdQXYpOkZ65pkKHrlMIOFWy66WZvIupvfUVt4GREBdoVWmHWCQBlS1Wq0Uqn4wXoLxSofeuNCBCwB-VkvoqmgvmuykUVLeVN90Gv1NA2plzLD4XrQSfeRcmmeOO68Y0ju_sDRL3qpkV-aDhP4QMAoYz_NslpmuF1cvYLyigHHGtOWda2L3jVSvuRBSfU0LGKti_XHGlCJ1RrTysbmY_vj8LykvC78BAAD__zKEdgs) as the early favorite, challenging Kentucky Derby winner Sovereignty and the race's other top finisher, Baeza, in a highly anticipated showdown. Only [eight horses will run](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL_u3CAMx5-GbJyIE0IyMHRh-3XtGHHg3PlXDiJwL7q3rxL1DbpZ-tj-_vn1tX55SpQfP_0LLW9lzXi0hMxY1_qnNfIV2SfyjO273FvFvdQVFGipJqnMGj2lzzp20W6IgEOHtjfjAosy0HdP22sVJg0BYfF33CavQM9hGcK4BdTz1JE9v6lJmV4p3c-3acCoB8ChN2YJcRajwkhc6u27UOYnbulT3lhvoby6ZJ_MexPDDwFOgDuO44ZtzycU4M5RgLsjM-WHANe41I8AtwpwFAW4UY-6H8x8baVXySwb-9_Y5BXy36UsMTa5-XepxNjks9SGsvpwMq60J5ShliPLSyBRxtZVG_eDUqI2GTGqx8tTukzzfzX9tvA3AAD__9QDlCo) the 1 1/4-mile track in today's Belmont Stakes at Saratoga, marking the second straight year the race has been held there while the 1 1/2-mile Belmont Park undergoes renovations. Rodriquez, listed at 6-to-1 odds, [could be a strong](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD1y3TAMhE9DdXxDUf8FizTqnDalho-EJNiUyAFgK759Rn5HSIMCwO58u3_eljePCc_ttz_AyZqXEy5OIAK00CczegLxCb0Av-cnE5RMizW206bXZliix_S9tFV0K4CFpgJXD-1kJzPYutpd14BZ-wnG1ofwDGvvvWliB7Yf22mspwrd7WZ6M9TGdPX46BuIXWOhqYdhCnFUrYGIkunxnvGUHdb0nb-AHiEfVXK7SGHV_FJ2Vna-rusRnswlk_D9oey8wQnkk7LzHU7Z-Qf_CenIp2gW_wGsC0HEIJhP1nsmBtY5RtYls9wDX6foBTR_UiFkPDddMHywXikfL5UmH-49_C1AouxckYvlwpSQ-0G1Zjs8ph90-a--v5z9FwAA___c3pmO) upset pick, having won both starts with at least five weeks of rest since turning 3. He last raced on April 5. This is the final race of the 2025 Triple Crown season and features a $2 million purse, with $1.2 million awarded to the winner. [See the 2025 Belmont Stakes field here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOpDAQRL_GZB4ZM2AIHFxCtpdeiBq7melZj43cPcvN35_Y-4RNSiqpVKpXfz6WD6BE-fYbnuhlK0vGgxOKYF3qi5mgokAiEORHWbniXupije21GbRxSwRK7-XaRL8hWuwa9K27TnYyzrbN3Yd1Cma1Nqxh7Iax641pIUwQ2t5to-0b8mebGYxrjenb8TJ0GPvOYtc6N4U4qqvBSFLq5VEoyx239C5fWC-hPJvk7yI7q-6XsrOy83Ecl7wG3ksVPhPKziuKUL4pO99LZdQVwn97sio7f9OsmJ4li2aBT2T92iMIRl1iZL0XllNIqGTW-HfHKhoypDcT60cJn_hmLRUoY2UNOertlfUGQbipPu4HpUQ8OHU1tydQ-t4uPzr8y9t_AQAA___utZmN).

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Urgent Help Needed for Patriot Oskar
body:
Oskar Arreaza warned us about socialism—now he needs our help
| | | |
---
|
---
| Patriot-

---
| **** In 2023, Tea Party Patriots Action held the premiere for _Surviving Socialism_ , featuring stories from those who fled tyranny for a better life in America. One of those survivors, Oskar Arreaza, escaped Venezuela's communist regime--threatened by Hugo Chavez's thugs simply for trying to make an honest living. [**You can watch a short clip of Oskar 's powerful testimony here.**](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794abb444e4/1edb9794aba9ad12 "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wWHZKmPGd6M") Now, Oskar faces another battle.** After a minor stroke, doctors discovered a mass in his lungs and brain.** His lung cancer has spread to his lymph nodes, and his vision and right arm function have been severely affected. He can no longer work, and the family is now without a stable income. Oskar spent years of his life warning Americans about the dangers of socialism. Today, he needs us. **I 'm asking you to pray for Oskar and his family--and, if you can, ****[please donate to support them through this crisis.](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794abb444e4/1edb9794aba9ad14 "https://www.gofundme.com/f/help-dad-overcome-cancer?attribution_id=sl:a823e012-bc0c-4b87-b93c-83f26dd83e97&lang=en_US&ts=1748713702&utm_campaign=fp_sharesheet&utm_content=amp13_c-amp14_t1-amp15_c&utm_medium=customer&utm_source=copy_link&v=amp14_t1")** Every gift, big or small, will help cover medical bills and daily living expenses. Whether you are able to give or not, please share his fundraising page with others who might. __ **__****__****__****__** __ **__** **** ************
---
| | [ CONTRIBUTE ](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794abb444e4/1edb9794aba9ad16)
---
| **** Thank you for standing with Oskar in his time of need. Let's show this patriot the same generosity and kindness he showed us when stood against socialism in America.
In gratitude and prayer, Jenny Beth Martin **__****__****__****__** __ **__** **** ************
---

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2b0d8b3d-116d-4d6e-acc1-c09df4487324/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

body:

It’s a tactical folding knife with real presence — 9.125" of solid steel when opened, with a wicked recurved blade that doesn’t mess around. No flash. No fluff. Just a rugged tool that’s ready when you need it most. We’re giving away 200 of these in our first run to real Americans who actually carry — all we ask is that you cover a small shipping fee and tell us what you think. **This isn’t a collector’s piece. It’s a carry piece.**

name: The Texas Flyover
subject: Trump Musk Feud, Lubbock Tornado, and Healed by Fish Skin
body:
The fallout from this week's [public feud](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0MGupCAUBNCvwR0GrrQ8Fiwmmbh7k9nN0oBclTRKB67d7d9P7F9460oqderf9_jtYor78sdtaOk953HHV01IhGWkcmyP7aj3GY-QDu_zdKdcdjeCgBsXPRd6DC6mc1RNsF4EIxu0UisDRgnTNasFLY3y4CeD7kv4zocg5v4m1Jf2wknVRHuViV5oKYUE3WqDXQ_e4Dxr6YxiSmCIlEtLKxK-XZ3TmZ9Y2ilvTbIr0aOy7heDgcHg_HQJ2iVfMYPhb06R4lQZDMGd3M2EhfsUK2GJ-8LxPa1uX5B_tHxyKVWOKe_8kjMYKuVysm6IgXW_JcCt1z3IptjweMWUYu01U2LZXEyfRfSzH58W_gcAAP__RlGIag) between President Donald Trump and Elon Musk could potentially impact Texas. The president has threatened to cut contracts between the federal government and Musk’s companies.

## Trump, Musk Feud Could Impact Texas
The fallout from this week's [public feud](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0MGupCAUBNCvwR0GrrQ8Fiwmmbh7k9nN0oBclTRKB67d7d9P7F9460oqderf9_jtYor78sdtaOk953HHV01IhGWkcmyP7aj3GY-QDu_zdKdcdjeCgBsXPRd6DC6mc1RNsF4EIxu0UisDRgnTNasFLY3y4CeD7kv4zocg5v4m1Jf2wknVRHuViV5oKYUE3WqDXQ_e4Dxr6YxiSmCIlEtLKxK-XZ3TmZ9Y2ilvTbIr0aOy7heDgcHg_HQJ2iVfMYPhb06R4lQZDMGd3M2EhfsUK2GJ-8LxPa1uX5B_tHxyKVWOKe_8kjMYKuVysm6IgXW_JcCt1z3IptjweMWUYu01U2LZXEyfRfSzH58W_gcAAP__RlGIag) between President Donald Trump and Elon Musk could potentially impact Texas. The president has threatened to cut contracts between the federal government and Musk’s companies. Musk-owned Tesla, SpaceX, and the Boring Company, all based in Texas, have significant contracts or relationships with federal agencies, creating huge economic implications for the state should the president follow through. The threat, made via Truth Social on Thursday, drew a quick response from Musk on X in which he claimed that Trump “is in the [Epstein files](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LHOozAQBOCngc7IOPxYLlxcQ5drr0RrvCZWFhvZS0je_kRe4a9HGs03_-7zHSLFtP6FDS2_Q54TnpWQGcvM5dj27ajPgIenw7m8PDmXBLOS6kfIUUg9e4j0mYfWWye96Vu0vR6MMoM0t_Zhe3QOQJvFDz9BOelQLWCk8U6q4LVpo73K5Ch138te6U4bvI3KGQxB92CGZpDoI-fS8QMZ31ADffILS7fkrSX7YN5rc_vTqKlR03meXcjvS3HljZr2TJHjUhs1rTmh4JxFgCLWvAuCc4MnlioKEH0ElHwkL75wAYGxiMsvCsSKVeBeGWMSQIQrcMyptsX6_YxEsY66GeS6QaTvMv7dny-r_gcAAP__ZKCP8A). That is the real reason they have not been made public.” White House officials indicated on Friday that Trump is [not interested](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGupDAMBuDThA7kmEBIkWKbdLPtligkYYgmEARmGG6_YqR3gtdYLizb3__v0T9sTHF5_rVz0PQZc7-Ec0-BKGw9bce8zsf-GsPh0zEM2b0ob4vtEbApoS1B9t7GdPWi8HoAr3gRNJdCoRKg6mLSvBmk5VIKrwTWnauVC7bpVOdAODXwIup7GbQgOQeOspIq1C0OKoyj5FYJJiD4SHmraAoUPnYf05XfYatcnoukJ6J1Z_UfhoahOc-zOnZL2dvrHmBodsrbxdDcMoZmzSlSdHd7X2ZooP0pX3F5k8vbXK5TXkLpbEoMTSeglUo1AJKhKTbt1zOmFPdWMgHP2cb0fYl-F-Rb4_8AAAD__6vohRs) in speaking with Musk. "I'm not even thinking about Elon. He's got a problem, the poor guy's got a problem," the president said.
## Cornyn Dismisses Early Polling Numbers
Texas Sen. John Cornyn is responding to early polling in the race to keep his U.S. Senate seat, indicating he [still believes](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkTGvpCAQgH-NdrMBRFkKi2vs3rVXmkGGlVsEA-xz_fcXX7X9dZNvki_5Zv58zV_og4-P37jRWN8uzZGOEqhWynPNr23fXuXp6GXDy5i0PGvKEWfBRA9sAKZmiz6cs2ztaJjVvKWRK6mFlkx37ToyITs1IFfMkutlb81dCNVrlEbpXrvWj5eMDUxxzrhQN6WpG4TR5JziqGUjGVlfU77VlSq9sbhwpm_KtyVtbRjXWvfSdL8aMTViOo7jdjjEa9mICXP1S6BGTFdXI6Y9BV_9co0-Fm8JPsiP_RMUivA3rRGWlOMZoeBZYCULhA_K4QRLBisB1usudMKDImUM8KQIO75rio2YxF2B5YvUdujBDUsHUt0JjO4VONMZ3vfcoL23ebT74UPwZVCNZI8NffiprP_3m-9R_AsAAP__HMCkqw) he’ll win the election. The Cornyn camp says the polls are biased and that it’s a “[silly season](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL1ugzAURp_GbET2xeB48NCFLV07ogu-BCv-kzFJePsqfYXOn_QdnfNzm27ovIv3bwxk6ntNU6TX7qlWKlMtR8jh2B8rHdYf85yWR00l4gQc-pYPLVeTRefPSTbWzNxq0ZARSmrQkuuu2YyEK1ppEfulU0KvCq5ymLkAoXulV9s48znjA1dCcAHqojR1A8ya1lUJ1JJJTtbVVC51o0pv3Fd_pieVy5JC481Wa95Z98VgZDDWjTbn_WdjMG4p0EeIwbhgyOjukcHYd10vr127pBLP2NaCzu9txndNsS2Uj9m7BWObiwtYTgZjU4zNL-e92wfFJL8HdH-Mpv6v2tPAbwAAAP__ol-CjA)” for polling, but experts suggest Cornyn may need to make a move quickly to cut into Paxton’s lead. ## Dallas Stars Fire Head Coach DeBoer
The Dallas Stars announced Friday that they are [parting ways](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0MGOgyAUheGnwR0GrxSGBYvZuOtsZ2lQLpUUxcC1tm8_aV9h1l9ycvL_Xseriylutx-3oqVnyOOGZ01IhGWkcqz7etR7wMOnY5ryfKdcNjeCgAsXigs9ehfTa5SNt5PwpmvQdloaMFKYvlksmCCU9z4Y2Uslepzw0ukvJ8GjAjE10b7HhBK660QHutUGewWTwRB054xkUqCPlEtLCxI-XQ3plR9Y2jmvTbIL0V5Z_81gYDCc59li3bc3Mhi2JTEYKuXyYjCMDIboGQzyIpUEqT7mSuUhFuRzdvPCdyTkHqeMhadc43bjJ1biIW4uNcX6_Ywpxao0k-K2upg-R-h_-R4W_gIAAP__meqEcw) with head coach Pete DeBoer after just three seasons. In each of those seasons, the Stars reached and then lost the Western Conference Finals. The move comes eight days after the Stars lost to the Edmonton Oilers 6-3, ending the series in five games. DeBoer [pulled](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLFu5CAURb8Gd4zgmZhQuNjGXbbd0nrAY4yCjQVv4szfrya_kPLoSFdX59_H-oG55OP-F3ea-TvV9aCrF2KmtnJ77Of-6J-JHrE8vK_hk2s7cAUFb1JNUtk1Yi7P1Qxx9io6PdCsrXHgjHLjsM3em1EbHbwzMdFbCjA6Fa3ROiZ8Bxjy_BpTk7JaKw32Zh2NE3hHKVmNzgijKGau7cYbMX1jT-VZv6jdQt2HMm_MZxfjHwGLgOW6rtuVEF9SwIKNcygkYOlnbdwFLMdWXsjYXnQSk4zkKzUZsRTs8kfJUDFs-bjLLXeu7SlggXcrIyoyWoMclfPSOKulixPImFDZQC5OWg9tjueVS8l9ssKo-465_Lzl3zX-muF_AAAA__-ITY-g) starting goalkeeper Jake Oettinger after the Stars quickly found themselves at a two-goal deficit in the matchup. Following the loss, DeBoer said of Oettinger, “ _The reality is, if you go back to last year's playoffs, he's lost six of seven games to Edmonton_.” Analysts have suggested that questions about DeBoer’s relationship with the [star goalkeeper](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGu4yAQheGnsbuxAGMTChfbuLvbbmmNYYhRMFgwubl5-1X2FbY_OtL3__navjCmmO-_8aSFf0LZMr1aImaqG9fneZ3P9gj09Om578U9uNSMmxJqAjGDMJvHmN6b7v2yC29lT4s02iqrhR37Y_FGB-vHyVgxSYdqFlPQYZ6kDLscb6KPy-dMzMJIKaQyg7E0zmq3FIKRaHWnBfnIpQ58ENMPtpDe5Zvq4MrZp-Vgvlo3_urU2qm1XaVyG954lPIZdGrNR-rUulfCR8x3-AA7tWLl6BJ1avWYEjZojLVBiJXgIPTgCroDLmICT3uhChiYKozQCFvJDV7UmGoGV3KgStkRhJgxNcDrIqyYHTWQk7iNWt3scPCZ-rr46xVTim02nRb3E2P6J-H_6_-9qL8BAAD__4NDnVw) may have contributed to the Stars’ decision to fire the coach, despite three straight years in the NHL’s final four.

The president has threatened to cut contracts between the federal government and Musk’s companies. Musk-owned Tesla, SpaceX, and the Boring Company, all based in Texas, have significant contracts or relationships with federal agencies, creating huge economic implications for the state should the president follow through. The threat, made via Truth Social on Thursday, drew a quick response from Musk on X in which he claimed that Trump “is in the . That is the real reason they have not been made public.” White House officials indicated on Friday that Trump is in speaking with Musk. "I'm not even thinking about Elon. He's got a problem, the poor guy's got a problem," the president said. Cornyn Dismisses Early Polling Numbers Texas Sen. John Cornyn is responding to early polling in the race to keep his U.S. Senate seat, indicating he he’ll win the election. The Cornyn camp says the polls are biased and that it’s a “” for polling, but experts suggest Cornyn may need to make a move quickly to cut into Paxton’s lead. As reported Tuesday, Cornyn is at a significant deficit to challenger Ken Paxton, Texas’ attorney general, in early polls for the U.S. Senate seat, down as much as . Cornyn's strategy may involve taking aim at , with campaign officials claiming that once voters “fully understand Ken Paxton's record of ethical failures, mismanagement and corruption, we will win this primary.” Dallas Stars Fire Head Coach DeBoer The Dallas Stars announced Friday that they are with head coach Pete DeBoer after just three seasons. ** Long Creek Juvenile Correctional Facility to Spend $30k on Audio Equipment for Poetry, Rap Music Classes (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=08ad0649c6&e=f093fa355c)
------------------------------------------------------------
By Edward Tomic on Jun 06, 2025 02:43 pm

name: Team Jon Ossoff
subject: Legally required to report
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

Peter,
In just a moment, we’re going to ask you to make your first contribution — of just $5 — to Jon Ossoff’s re-election campaign here in Georgia.
If you already know the stakes of this race and are ready to contribute now, use this link:
**Here’s the link to donate:** **[https://act.electjon.com/go/Donate](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-june25.2OdyOr&refcode=email-250607-7a&t=1&akid=419%2E5691347%2E18vkbU)**
Otherwise, here’s an explanation:
At the end of the month, we’re facing our first FEC fundraising deadline since Marjorie Taylor Greene and Brian Kemp announced they’re not running.
When it hits, we're legally required to report not just what we've raised, but the number of donations we've received. Shortly after, that report will be made public.
Everyone will be watching to see if we’ve been able to keep up the momentum without the threat of Marjorie Taylor Greene in the Senate. They'll want to see if we have what it takes to defend this seat.
We _have_ to put up a big number. So please:
**[Rush a $5 contribution directly to Jon Ossoff's campaign. We're looking for lots and lots of donations before our official FEC fundraising deadline hits to demonstrate the strength of this team and this campaign.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-june25.2OdyOr&refcode=email-250607-7a&t=2&akid=419%2E5691347%2E18vkbU)

subject: Korean Breakthrough Reduced Wrinkles By 48%
body:
That's right - by almost HALF!

| Hey Friend, A new breakthrough from Korea can reduce crow's feet, sagging, and crepey skin by 48%. That's right - by almost HALF! In a groundbreaking study using high-definition 3D skin scans... Women saw their wrinkles literally disappear before their eyes. No expensive creams or painful injections. The reason it works so well is because it activates the key cells in your skin that produce ALL your collagen, elastin and hyaluronic acid. It turns out, while creams can give short-term, surface level results... They never truly fix the root cause of wrinkles, sagging, or crepey skin. No wonder 8 out of 10 women say they are left wanting more from their creams. Ivy League dermatologist, Dr. Mara Weinstein explains how this new Korean breakthrough works: **[Try this Korean"younger skin" method at home in just 30 seconds](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/LEIECuUsSjkcD5h9qhcS1g~~/AARclBA~/rOAfinc2ieJw9EycIYrLRwQMMq1bzihvQPtbEcusXHHVc_7JQXVRzPzt4t0RANW5CAoma3q06UwLNj7W-jdkWn_YsB-1knh3YslQ119yqW68lnpS0uUV2xCJSiYXUVytQ05iaJUJyDOXzb09kaX-d4nG_E09UBZcJ-UMt7V5jaIJ6_nhEmx680g5zJeIHt8g)** If you want skin that looks 10 to 15 years younger, try this today. name: Phil Izon
subject: Fighting RCV in Michigan, bringing Ai to the fight.
body:
Please send to your friends and family | | | | [](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68442569fdd13e6269173cbf&u=https%3A%2F%2F907honest.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D6844225f4e2532358c745f7d%26ss_email_id%3D68442569fdd13e6269173cbf%26ss_campaign_name%3DFighting%2BRCV%2Bin%2BMichigan%252C%2Bbringing%2BAi%2Bto%2Bthe%2Bfight.%2B%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2025-06-07T11%253A41%253A46Z&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_6844225f4e2532358c745f7d&l=en-US&s=IF4My-GfTPjUsw4MPpBJi6ENqRs%3D) |
---|---
|
#### [**Click Here To Go To Website**](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68442569fdd13e6269173cbf&u=https%3A%2F%2FRCVAlert.org&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_6844225f4e2532358c745f7d&l=en-US&s=2Et6POWGKtci7KrDHumd-OCcEOE%3D)****[**RCVAlert.org**](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68442569fdd13e6269173cbf&u=https%3A%2F%2FRCVAlert.org&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_6844225f4e2532358c745f7d&l=en-US&s=2Et6POWGKtci7KrDHumd-OCcEOE%3D)
---
**I put these materials together for the good folks of Michigan to help stand strong against Ranked Choice Voting. I’d be honored if you took a moment to visit the website I built—it's something I poured my heart into for the people of that great state. Everything you’ll find there was made with one goal: to help stop Ranked Choice Voting. And I want to be clear—I'm doing this on my own dime, not a penny asked.****If you believe in the work I’m doing to stop Ranked Choice Voting across this country, I humbly ask for your support in helping fund the films I’m making. You’ll find links to that below.****I’m proud to be working with folks from national groups like Stop RCV, and many others that I won’t name. Together, we’re building tools like interactive guides and educational apps to make it easier for everyday Americans to understand what’s really at stake. When you visit the website, I hope you’ll take time to check out the new applications I built right here in Alaska—they explain Ranked Choice Voting in ways folks haven’t seen before.****I also built a custom chatbot that can answer your questions about RCV using the material I’ve written and collected. You’ll find short animated videos and even a full animated short film that tells the story plain and true. My documentary** _**Frozen Odds**_**tells the story of Alaska’s fight against Ranked Choice Voting, and I plan to show it in theaters across Alaska, Oregon, Michigan, and other places where this voting system still threatens the voice of the people.****Thank you for standing with me. These last three years have been a journey I’ll never forget. The friendships and partnerships I’ve built across the country have changed my life—and I believe, together, we can protect our Republic.**
---
---
|
---
---
|
---
### **Ranked Choice Voting has now been banned in 17 States and Counting, Iowa became the 17th State Today.**
---
---
| [](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68442569fdd13e6269173cbf&u=https%3A%2F%2Fpfd-doomsday-clock-23332009477.us-west1.run.app&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_6844225f4e2532358c745f7d&l=en-US&s=sLInPdyL_NNKYzWr953xoeabKnM%3D)
---
#### **💸 Alaskans: Curious about how much you’ve lost from your PFD since 2016?
**
#### **Use the PFD Doomsday Clock, it’s been used by tens of thousands in a couple days.**
#### [**https://pfd-doomsday-clock-23332009477.us-west1.run.app/**](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68442569fdd13e6269173cbf&u=https%3A%2F%2Fpfd-doomsday-clock-23332009477.us-west1.run.app%2F&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_6844225f4e2532358c745f7d&l=en-US&s=_yb_iweqglU5AoaHbxGcQ3TvyAw%3D)
#### **The tool has garnered widespread attention, being featured in both Must Read Alaska and Alaska Watchman.**
#### **The calculator empowers Alaskans to quantify the financial losses they’ve experienced due to reductions in the Permanent Fund Dividend (PFD) since 2016. **
#### **For instance, a family of four has reportedly lost over $60,000 during this period . **
####

Features: Chapter-based navigation Searchable case studies and data Expert analysis and critiques Offline and mobile access Stay informed. Understand RCV. Share the truth.

#### This Memorial Day, while we honor the service and sacrifice of those who gave everything for our freedoms, we also reflect on what those freedoms are meant to protect—**honest government, fair opportunity, and a voice for the people**.
#### But in Juneau, the people are being forgotten.
#### The Legislature just closed its latest session—not with discipline, not with restraint, but with a **stampede of giveaways**. Millions of dollars in taxpayer funds handed over to the **National Education Association** and entrenched union bureaucracies—while schools close their doors, and more Alaskan families than ever turn to charter schools and homeschooling.
#### What was the dividend meant to do?
The **Permanent Fund Dividend** was designed as a promise—that all Alaskans would share in the wealth of our natural resources. It was never meant to become a **slush fund for lobbyists, consultants, and political machines controlled by out-of-state interests.**
#### This is not just bad budgeting.
It’s a betrayal of the people—and the purpose—of Alaska.
#### Our upcoming film, _The Permanent Short: Alaska’s Billion Dollar Betrayal_ , will expose this corruption. We’ll follow the money and show how generations of Alaskans are being denied their share, their voice, and their future.
#### And the movement is already growing.
#### Our **Angel tickets were the first to sell out for “Frozen Odds”** —a powerful signal that Alaskans are ready to fight back. Angel supporters receive exclusive access to both _The Permanent Short_ and _Frozen Odds_ , the film that lit the fuse.
#### This is just the beginning.
#### The fight for Alaska’s future isn’t over.
It’s just getting started.
---
#### [**Click Here To Get Your Angel Ticket**](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68442569fdd13e6269173cbf&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.tropictundra.com%2Fthe-permanent-short&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_6844225f4e2532358c745f7d&l=en-US&s=Y3OXoinwPx6toXBeQhUpWG-SS7k%3D)
---
#### **In 2001, Enron collapsed under the weight of one of the largest corporate frauds in American history—over $25 billion evaporated overnight, leaving pensions gutted and lives destroyed. It was called the smartest disaster money could buy.**
#### But what if the next Enron wasn’t a corporation?
What if it was your own government?
#### This film asks the billion-dollar question:
**What happens when a state quietly reallocates tens of billions of dollars meant for its citizens—without a vote, without consent, and without accountability?**
#### We follow the money—through shadowy nonprofits, bloated bureaucracies, and politically connected networks like **Arabella Advisors** , **Alaska Venture Fund** , and the **1630 Fund**.
#### It’s a financial betrayal not buried in spreadsheets—but broadcast in silence.
**$25 billion gone** —not from shareholders this time, but from the people of Alaska.
#### This is _The Permanent Short_.
#### More announcements coming soon.
**Thank you for being part of this journey.**
---

### **Now we have 108 supporters for “Frozen Odds”**
---
#### **Frozen Odds How do you take on $15 million with nothing but determination, grassroots organizing, and a clipboard? Frozen Odds is a gripping documentary that uncovers the raw power of citizen-led initiatives in Alaska. Following the journey of a small but determined movement, this film reveals how everyday people—outspent 100 to 1 by out-of-state interests—rallied together to challenge the system. Led by an Alaskans for Alaskans who helped write the law and push it to the ballot, this battle wasn’t just about policy—it was about democracy in its purest form. With 400+ volunteers braving the cold, gathering 42,000 signatures when only 26,000 were needed, they proved that people—not money—should shape the laws that govern them. Through intimate interviews, on-the-ground footage, and stunning Alaskan landscapes, Frozen Odds captures the high-stakes struggle against political elites (aka Lisa Murkowski and George Soros, etc.) and the enduring spirit of grassroots activism. Though the campaign fell just 700 votes short out of 320,000, it laid the groundwork for a new wave of initiatives—this time, with three fresh petitions ready to take the fight forward. In a world where billionaires and lobbyists try to control the political process.**
#### **Frozen Odds asks a bold question: What happens when ordinary citizens refuse to back down?**

With 400+ volunteers braving the cold, gathering 42,000 signatures when only 26,000 were needed, they proved that people—not money—should shape the laws that govern them. Through intimate interviews, on-the-ground footage, and stunning Alaskan landscapes, Frozen Odds captures the high-stakes struggle against political elites (aka Lisa Murkowski and George Soros, etc.) and the enduring spirit of grassroots activism. Though the campaign fell just 700 votes short out of 320,000, it laid the groundwork for a new wave of initiatives—this time, with three fresh petitions ready to take the fight forward. In a world where billionaires and lobbyists try to control the political process. Frozen Odds asks a bold question: What happens when ordinary citizens refuse to back down? | | | | Follow Me On X @907Honest | | Phil Izon 12110 Business Blvd Ste A06 Box #113 Eagle River 99577 United States

| _**If you're not in front of our Saturday email, you're behind.**_
---
| Dear Friend, **Mississippi seems to be doing rather well.** Our economy is growing, and according to data from the U.S. Bureau of Economic Analysis, Mississippi was one of the fastest growing states in the last quarter of 2024. Personal incomes are rising faster than inflation.

**Our state is heading in the right direction because we’ve got some key policies right.** Taxes, notably the state income tax, have been lowered, with eventual income tax elimination in sight. Rules on occupational licensing have been reformed, making our labor market more flexible.

Our state government has (by and large) kept public spending under control, meaning we have a budget surplus.

We don’t yet have meaningful school choice. But every child in the public school system does now have a personalised budget, making it harder for the education bureaucracy to squander resources and easier for the dollars to follow the child.

**Every one of these wins was achieved because a handful of people were prepared to put their neck on the line and fight for it.** Each time they were opposed by vested interests and, frankly, by the go-along-to-get-along apathy of some who ought to have known better.

**We’re only on the road to income tax elimination because principled conservatives were bold.** Previous Speaker Philip Gunn overcame opposition to lower income tax to a flat 4 percent. Current Speaker Jason White outmanoeuvred the forces of inertia facing him to secure legislation that will mean eventual elimination. Governor Tate Reeves made the case for it consistently.

At every stage, the Governor and two Speakers were attacked for their stance, notably in various leftist-sponsored media outlets. Sometimes by those that now claim credit for the tax cut.

**Mississippi’s legislature has just passed one of the most conservative budgets in years only because the House leadership refused to do business-as-usual.** They insisted on a proper budget setting process – and if you remember, were repeatedly lambasted for it.

Efforts to ensure every child has a personalised education budget were often fiercely resisted by folk that now claim it was their idea all along.

That’s politics, you might say. And it’s how change happens. **A new consensus comes about not because everyone gets together for kumbaya, but because good ideas take on and defeat the bad. **

Mississippi is on the up, but there are so many more reforms we need to ensure we’re no longer 50th out of 50. We are now surrounded by states that have school choice. Red tape in our state is restricting growth. Despite an impressive recent improvement, far too many working age adults in our state aren’t working.

**It’s not naïve optimism that will deliver school choice or red tape reduction, but robust, unflinching advocacy. **It’s time to turn up the volume.

Have an awesome weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=fab69c405c&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---

name: Scalise, Steve
subject: I am NOT “canceling” your GOP Membership
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
| | | Some folks write you emails pretending to be President Trump.

**I won 't do that to you. **

Some folks pretend donations will somehow fund DOGE.

**I prefer to be honest with you.**

This is Steve Scalise. As your House Majority Leader, I work hand and glove with President Trump, and I love what DOGE is doing for our country.

And when I ask you for support, I want to treat you with respect and be transparent about where your money is going.

You are not an ATM. You are a valued member of our MAGA movement. You deserve to be treated that way.

**_[So that's why I 'm dropping into your inbox right now:](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=9b14d7adf2ea41378ca6a21c5923f32f&_e=xz-OFXggvjtRRzrB8Q9qNLnTRNfQwQiBkjJfSONYZyS6FaRzE3QrX4CAR1kmbx0JxA8vmdSHozRoUHF64mY7gnmBkdhhv1nKNQDKJWBYVtAm8Ann2oGnb7xwLneY47Wk70TpCruF-n9qBlrCrTaLNInJo_Vy8kFmQhF7R1TRwpk1msfZgMZ5TOhz9fXoRfaKDsSl4tHMFoQ7X9Pa82dnK0RaxmqmGQn0NXGhIv_7ujGrrIyatHw5hojibNjFJFB5XB30KvVsmOYrv7RxjGPfFgGVJKb4P248o-dPPn75FdzsDNaXsQzR47G0GN-e5XAteO2MXDabfHmf-0e8vnyJRgqY6Wzxka92axe3MCL45tcf7qa_Elwxdye1NETwaS0jfo4VKCaMpAYrjXKoI3U8tw%3D%3D)_**

The Democrat Machine is firing on all cylinders to undermine, stonewall, and sabotage everything President Trump and DOGE are doing to make our government more efficient and cut waste.

Of course, the DC Swamp can't have that.

That's why they're mobilizing the courts, Deep State operatives, and Congressional Democrats to unleash a coordinated political hatchet job against the Trump Administration.

_Democrats are suing him. They 're pushing for partisan investigations. They're firing off hit piece after hit piece in the press. They're introducing legislation to block DOGE's access._

Their plan is simple:
**1.** Attack the Trump Administration
**2.** Drag them into court battles
**3.** Slow them down at every turn
**4.** Use the press to attack their work
**5.** Unload millions to win the Midterms
**6.** Block Trump's ENTIRE legislative agenda
**That 's where House Republicans - and most importantly, YOU - can make a major difference. **

Democrats have already pledged 50 million dollars to win the Midterm elections, take control of Congress, and exploit that power to sabotage EVERYTHING President Trump is doing to save the country. That includes the critical work of DOGE.

Cook Political Report just highlighted EIGHT toss-up districts that will determine who wins the House. If Democrats win even a few seats, it's over. They win the House.

That's why I'm tapping our entire grassroots movement for help.

_**[If you can afford to do so, I 'm imploring you to pitch in a few bucks to save our House Majority - and President Trump's entire legislative agenda along with it.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=9b14d7adf2ea41378ca6a21c5923f32f&_e=xz-OFXggvjtRRzrB8Q9qNLnTRNfQwQiBkjJfSONYZyS6FaRzE3QrX4CAR1kmbx0JxA8vmdSHozRoUHF64mY7gnmBkdhhv1nKNQDKJWBYVtAm8Ann2oGnb7xwLneY47Wk70TpCruF-n9qBlrCrTaLNInJo_Vy8kFmQhF7R1TRwpk1msfZgMZ5TOhz9fXoRfaKDsSl4tHMFoQ7X9Pa82dnK0RaxmqmGQn0NXGhIv_7ujGrrIyatHw5hojibNjFJFB5U83hGu231XDa6hbXkzmyqsgDC6SBYFzkoyBB346t4iYIDUKx0Ay8SFq0FXWtpvGD-L8Ooy4BDX7zYDSgavPozAHgVR685ps44Av6EIa1qcE1P0gQCiENL1USGwxBTTbsHiGC-peV2KP90nAaLeKuZA%3D%3D)**___
---
|
---
[PLEASE CONTRIBUTE NOW
](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=9b14d7adf2ea41378ca6a21c5923f32f&_e=xz-OFXggvjtRRzrB8Q9qNLnTRNfQwQiBkjJfSONYZyS6FaRzE3QrX4CAR1kmbx0JxA8vmdSHozRoUHF64mY7gnmBkdhhv1nKNQDKJWBYVtAm8Ann2oGnb7xwLneY47Wk70TpCruF-n9qBlrCrTaLNInJo_Vy8kFmQhF7R1TRwpk1msfZgMZ5TOhz9fXoRfaKDsSl4tHMFoQ7X9Pa82dnK0RaxmqmGQn0NXGhIv_7ujGrrIyatHw5hojibNjFJFB5b2PmJvM0qQ-na1eSA89ucr9OrKEVdk-JuV6IF8ZSia8mxRahMqismyhjPm-wNxoeA4r3YS96NeYPAOoYUvEgW78rx2I8XrODpU7wqPyTJYcd1TnufjwJrBBtWzMI7amuO-MLb9YwbT54gN76hMfJNw%3D%3D)
Again, I'm NOT pretending this money is going to fund DOGE or anything these other groups are alluding to.

This money will go directly to the most important battleground districts in the country so we can win the Midterms and keep delivering on President Trump's MAGA agenda.

If you agree this is a noble cause to support, please consider pitching in right now.

God bless you,
_- Steve _

**STEVE SCALISE**
House Majority Leader

_A personal note from Majority Leader Steve Scalise:_

I'm humbled to announce that I am your new House Majority Leader. My first order of business is checking in with our best supporters, so I just launched my new** MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY** for that specific reason.

_**[I'd be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=9b14d7adf2ea41378ca6a21c5923f32f&_e=xz-OFXggvjtRRzrB8Q9qNLnTRNfQwQiBkjJfSONYZyS7-eXFUznCY0z1uHoyLtC_MzChylHoSttq7XMgulo6JZA2uqN3NzmBkX1q1n9A06C0FMvTbFOJ2ZOxuxwc6R-RXlwZVuh9FUIcxQjH1uhThgPdvdNT4HnoTZNr8XCG0KKm_FBKhFrUXUxgoB5_6VOTp-XioYg2PflrDHZpof7Vt1MmPbvpvSwinW1KU7xKd8PViDThZCoXxWz9KEvE0LLqKsoSB2X_QEv1EUMt-HmaALyBd2vHF5ZvnpTyrX7wawDlRZNSSdqRmwUBdYadqGfEVuIhoxdZKjHe18YYpyZe2o6qyJ3wxibu2g1c3zHvMJsiTLmOC56wCjztAjzBxNG6JBLQHMwfYpm4g8Me6iLn6w%3D%3D "I’d be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.")**_
