name: Vikram Mansharamani
subject: Some long overdue news!
body:
I'm six months into a new project I want to tell you about...

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us4.campaign-archive.com/?e=93b2c2b824&u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=2ef1b1d52a)
---
[|
---](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=8ce4e209aa&e=93b2c2b824)
| | | | |
# A Long Overdue Update
---
[|
---](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=f3638aadea&e=93b2c2b824)
|
## Announcing Goodwell Foods
---
| For years, I’ve suggested that the best way to navigate uncertainty is to integrate thinking by crossing silos and connecting dots. I’ve often described this method as the “generalist approach” because it prioritizes breadth of perspective over depth of expertise. It is impossible, I believe, to fully appreciate the complexities of our time without combining geopolitical, macroeconomic, regulatory, political, technological, demographic, and social perspectives. At the core of my thinking is a simple belief: _**context matters**_.
And so when I decided to return to the business world last fall, I started practicing what I preached. As I evaluated the many start-up, acquisition, and investment ideas that were swirling around my head, I constantly returned to my analytical framework of trying to understand the context. How, for instance, might a warmer planet impact the demand for HVAC services? Sure, demand for air conditioning might rise, but what about heating? Or how could demographics affect a sawmill’s potential revenue streams? Would aging populations help or hurt the market for building materials? And regardless of industry, I always returned to asking myself about technology. How might technology disrupt the industry, sector, or business I was analyzing?
I evaluated dozens of potential opportunities before homing in on one opportunity that caught my attention. During the summer of 2024, a New Hampshire-based pizza manufacturing operation had suddenly shut its doors, sending several dozen employees to the unemployment lines. Attempting to salvage value, banks and others who lent money to the company took control and began a process to find a buyer for the business. When I learned about the situation, there were several interested bidders looking to buy and restore the company. It wasn’t until those parties failed to make a deal that I began to really dig into the opportunity of entering the pizza manufacturing business.I began my diligence by focusing on the context. Regardless of the unique circumstances of the specific opportunity, I had to answer a simple question: _**Do I even want to be in the frozen pizza business?**_
To answer this question, I started my analysis with a focus on the big picture and the trends that were impacting the...
---
| [CLICK TO CONTINUE READING](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=70c891e387&e=93b2c2b824)
---
[|
---](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=6292c4697c&e=93b2c2b824)
|
# Goodwell: What’s in a Name?
---
|
What’s my favorite book? That’s a question I am often asked, and it’s become harder to answer these past few years. The titles and authors I’ve named for decades come readily to mind, but I’ve started to wonder if those answers are still true. It’s been years since I’ve read some of them, and while they appealed to the teenage or undergraduate version of me, I wondered if they still would now that I am an adult. I have a friend – big Hemingway fan - who recently told me that he never cared for _The Old Man and the Sea_ when he read it in high school, but when he re-read it in middle-age, it landed a lot differently.
And so last summer, at the active encouragement of my good friend Worth Wray, I reread _Atlas Shrugged_. I rediscovered Objectivism and quickly became intellectually obsessed with Ayn Rand’s thinking. I reread the books of my youth, tearing through _Anthem_ and _The Virtues of Selfishness, We the Living,_ and _Capitalism_. Her insights into class warfare, tyranny, freedom, and the distinction between producers and looters now had an urgent relevance that I didn’t recall in my college reading of her work.
In much of Western culture, the capitalist is often portrayed as a villain, exploiting workers for his personal gain. For Rand, the businessman who created and built and hired was the hero of the story; production was the greatest virtue. And Rand saw business as a unique bulwark against tyranny. She [wrote](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=7f8abb0288&e=93b2c2b824) that _**while other professions exist in totalitarian societies – politicians, farmers, teachers, scientists, soldiers – businessmen do not**_. Businessmen are what distinguish capitalist from statist societies, and Rand saw them as the ultimate symbol of freedom. One of her key messages was that there was a massive difference between businessmen who produce and bureaucrats who live off the production of others.
Rediscovering Rand was one of the reasons I decided to start a business last fall, something I wrote about in my last post. I had written and thought and taught about business. I had advised and served on the boards of some of the largest companies in the world. I had even started a few small businesses, usually focused on ideas and the abstract (I had often referred to myself as an “entrepreneur of ideas”). It was time to start and run a business that created something tangible and concrete, while also creating jobs.
And hence I formed [Goodwell Foods](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=5d288bada3&e=93b2c2b824), a private label frozen pizza manufacturer located in Pittsfield, NH that now employs several dozen people. We went from standing still to sprinting...
---
| | | | | | | | | | | [CLICK TO CONTINUE READING](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=a11db413d4&e=93b2c2b824)
---
|
---
|
# Other Mansharamani Musings...
---
| As many of you are aware, I’ve returned to writing my weekly newsletter and have been pleased by the rapidly growing interest in my thoughts. As I have in the past, I’m addressing a wide range of topics, ranging from geopolitics and economics to social trends to technology. The overall theme of my work is focused on “navigating uncertainty” and how a generalist approach can help us all make sense of what seems like chaos. If you have not already done so, please consider subscribing! (**It’s Free**!)
---
| [Subscribe to “Navigating Uncertainty” by Vikram Mansharamani](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=42797961c3&e=93b2c2b824)
---
| Over the past few months, I’ve written about [America’s evolving global role](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=5411c0087d&e=93b2c2b824), [egg prices](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=2435b6ba32&e=93b2c2b824), [Greenland](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=59665c7aec&e=93b2c2b824), [the downfall of DEI](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=b053d400ba&e=93b2c2b824), [gold prices](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=a8ec232880&e=93b2c2b824), [college selection anxiety](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=aaf90d8961&e=93b2c2b824), [Chile and copper](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=7d7376e3f3&e=93b2c2b824), [the NFL draft](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=13677ce545&e=93b2c2b824), and a lot more!
And if you missed my annual set predictions posted earlier this year, please click on the link below to read them.
---

name: Erica Henry
subject: [CW] The decision about Smith's body...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Her Bold Move Action
body:
The next day, she was rushed back to the hospital after she woke up gasping for air. The hospital diagnosed her with...| | |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109151889/550168273/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250607disturbing_N_THBM_NO_10_G_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFjNWNkYzgyLWEzNDMtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4mFcOQnxUDWXTpB0wJYRYqB6jbd0HoK0b03tRFbooxE=)
---
Hi Peter,

Earlier this year, a Georgia woman named Adriana Smith checked into a hospital with what she thought was an intense headache. At the time, Smith was about eight weeks pregnant.

The next day, she was rushed back to the hospital after she woke up gasping for air. The hospital diagnosed her with blood clots in her brain. Hours later, she was declared brain-dead.

Georgia’s abortion ban contains provisions about “fetal personhood”, a doctrine that entitles embryos and fetuses to full legal rights and protections. Since Smith was 8 weeks pregnant, the law has required doctors to keep her on life support to preserve the pregnancy, even though she no longer has brain function. Doctors will deliver the baby, who experts say will have medical challenges and may not survive, through a caesarean section...

**Smith’s family did not get a choice or say about the decision. The decision about Smith’s body was made by the Georgia state government – which consists of an almost entirely male executive branch, and a state legislature that is more than 65% male.**

**_We’ve said it before, and we’ll say it again: men should not be making laws that infringe on women’s bodily autonomy._**

[**There are far too many new laws across the country that give embryos more rights than women. At Her Bold Move, we are working to elect pro-choice, pro-women women who will fight for our daughters, sisters, mothers, grandmothers, neighbors, and friends. Every woman deserves bodily autonomy – and we know that getting more women elected to government will be our best defense against any law that threatens that right. You can support this effort by pitching in $20.25 TODAY!**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-pac/?refcode=EM_F_250607disturbing_N_THBM_NO_10_G_N_L1&amount=20.25) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$20.25 »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109151891/550168274/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250607disturbing_N_THBM_NO_10_G_N_EB20.25&express_lane=true&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFjNWNkYzgyLWEzNDMtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4mFcOQnxUDWXTpB0wJYRYqB6jbd0HoK0b03tRFbooxE=)

clean_body: The next day, she was rushed back to the hospital after she woke up gasping for air. The hospital diagnosed her with...| | | | | = Hi Peter, Earlier this year, a Georgia woman named Adriana Smith checked into a hospital with what she thought was an intense headache. At the time, Smith was about eight weeks pregnant. The next day, she was rushed back to the hospital after she woke up gasping for air. The hospital diagnosed her with blood clots in her brain. Hours later, she was declared brain-dead. Georgia’s abortion ban contains provisions about “fetal personhood”, a doctrine that entitles embryos and fetuses to full legal rights and protections. Since Smith was 8 weeks pregnant, the law has required doctors to keep her on life support to preserve the pregnancy, even though she no longer has brain function. Doctors will deliver the baby, who experts say will have medical challenges and may not survive, through a caesarean section... Smith’s family did not get a choice or say about the decision. The decision about Smith’s body was made by the Georgia state government – which consists of an almost entirely male executive branch, and a state legislature that is more than 65% male. We’ve said it before, and we’ll say it again: men should not be making laws that infringe on women’s bodily autonomy. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Monica Simpson, Executive Director of SisterSong, the lead plaintiff in a lawsuit challenging Georgia’s abortion law, said Smith’s family, "deserved the right to have decision-making power about her medical decisions. Instead, they have endured over 90 days of retraumatization, expensive medical costs, and the cruelty of being unable to resolve and move toward healing.” Georgia state Senator Ed Setzler,who sponsored the state’s abortion ban , has taken the opposite view. He told the Associated Press that “it is completely appropriate that the hospital do what they can to save the life of the child.” Why is a man sponsoring a state’s abortion ban??? Something is deeply wrong with this picture and, at Her Bold Move, we’re on a mission to solve it. = Together, Erica Henry Senior Political Advisor Her Bold Move | | Her Bold Move is the fastest-growing support network for women running for political office in America. name: Team Freedom Virginia
subject: Who Are We Endorsing for Governor?
body:
There are just under TWO WEEKS until Virginia’s primary election, and with federal job cuts, tariffs, and rising unemployment rates,
| | |
---
| |
---
| Who Are We Endorsing for Governor?
---
| Friends-
There are just under TWO WEEKS until Virginia's primary election, and with federal job cuts, tariffs, and rising unemployment rates, it's more important than ever to vote for an affordable Virginia. That's why we're proud to endorse former Congresswoman Abigail Spanberger for Virginia's Governor. Congresswoman Spanberger's record of protecting Virginians' retirement savings and lowering the cost of medicine, and her recent commitment to signing a bill expanding access to Paid Family and Medical Leave show a commitment to fighting for Virginia's middle class and not the elite.
---
|
---
| Perhaps you've already voted (good for you, early voters!) or have your election day plan ready to go, but still want to do more for an affordable Virginia. Why not sign up to volunteer?

clean_body: Peter, we haven’t seen your response. Did you miss this, Peter? Our team pored over the NRSC patriot files for Republicans in your area to select a representative to formally participate in the and YOU were a clear choice. However, we can't seem to locate your response. Peter, if we don't know where a TOP supporter like you stands, it will be impossible to ensure the GOP platform reflects the values of real conservatives across the country. We can't overstate just how meaningful your participation in this Assessment is. We weren't able to send the Policy Assessment to every Republican, so your selection to represent your zip code means your response carries 10x more impact. I'm working to keep our border secure, lower costs for your families, and support President Trump's agenda. I have to run in a special election next year to finish out the rest of this Senate term. When it comes to building a winning campaign, I 'm starting at square one. They see an opportunity. They think that if they raise millions now, and catch you napping, they'll have a chance to defeat me. We have a chance to slam the door shut on their plan now, but I can 't do it without you. body:
Shontel is emerging as a key leader in the Democratic response against extremism.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109153454/550171247/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_250607profile_N_TSB_90DO_8_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMmIyZmJlNi1hNDQzLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aS-lDRyW0bMdLGO8g9fxtN9cB8sXw6Hbd9EEa4y-yGA=) Peter,

_Once Upon a Hill_ , authored by Michael Jones, recently wrote a profile on Shontel’s leadership in the House. We wanted to make sure you saw it:

In the post, Michael praises Shontel for using her voice, life experiences, and ability to connect with people to lead the Democratic response to the nation’s largest-ever cuts to SNAP and other critical programs.

As Shontel’s predecessor, Marcia Fudge, said, as quoted in the profile, **_“She's out there fighting the good fight, and I believe that her voice just gets stronger and stronger, because she fights for what is right. It's never about herself. It is about what is right for the people.”_**

[**Before we share more, will you rush $5 to support Shontel’s work to hold MAGA Republicans accountable for prioritizing billionaires over everyday hardworking people?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109153456/550171250/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_250607profile_N_TSB_90DO_8_NG_N_L1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMmIyZmJlNi1hNDQzLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aS-lDRyW0bMdLGO8g9fxtN9cB8sXw6Hbd9EEa4y-yGA=)

When Shontel was a kid, she remembers hating cold cuts, despising pancakes for dinner, and her family relying on food stamps while managing her childhood epilepsy.

However, her experiences then are what fuel her fight for Americans now. Roughly one in five residents in Shontel’s district live below the poverty line, well above the national average of 12.5 percent and Ohio’s statewide average of 13.3 percent. **That is why, as the second-ranking Democrat on the House Agriculture Committee, Shontel took a lead role in her party’s response to the SNAP cuts.**

As she stated, _“People need to know that they have representatives who share their experiences. Some people get the impression that we’re all Ivy Leaguers and we all come from rich families. I want people to know I am not that. I grew up in the hood. I have real-life struggles that some of my constituents are still dealing with today.”_

**Shontel has the courage, grit, and determination to fight for her constituents in Washington. She is standing up for her people and not letting the GOP’s actions go uncontested.**

[**Shontel needs your help to continue to hold Republicans accountable. | | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.

_I love the number 7, friend!_

I won’t get into the details on why, but if you’re familiar with my work, you’ll understand.

_(If you’re not familiar, I hope to be able to share as much of that with you as I can over the course of this campaign.)_

With today being the 7th, **I wanted to make a[special request.](http://links.martynevada.com/u/click?_t=3a5223257aca4a93ac027b228c2c976d&_m=073e5baf140541f5a82e2156bf5ba4ab&_e=rH0H3uL4wYIHnOWBdGuEpy4k8dY3qROd6MoX52-uyXpETeX2VuhcnrVVY4Ee8nip2_8zyhhyBTH24KTxTzh2asjCh89XGt_ycjsxvH2j3uQ4U-MsczvLysAXHu_JdiTOZAoi3GaOawqM4jHpx8fKmbk_mvJBx2O329raNb0SzCLy6hFCR0CUyRsAEU_4IC2feIymuO90HmbOTIkRIxrBZf-N9WP8afZyWCkykQL_RMdnINvn_HhmtrYHhB_V7qztQUzPSOOhJcd32elpQ-DeO8C59CnA0P_8kgND26mFSXsTAuzJoKs1qQsNDqKy3LnKiB6ZCdj85wUTNIhL-08bZtoiHGEBweWsYEd6L9JIuRRCt4oItUVU5jk8XEMLhbbqbBbzl9c4s3IJwBhFdZ74gw%3D%3D)** But first, some context – I love context.

**June 30th is my campaign’s first FEC quarterly fundraising reporting deadline.**

As someone who detests big money in politics and how it corrupts politicians, I’m all for the transparency and accountability these reports provide.

Our campaign is and will always be funded by small, generous contributions from everyday concerned Americans like you – **NOT by corporations or special interest groups.**

That makes this upcoming FEC report – our campaign’s first – all the more important.

In this report, we need to be able to show that our grassroots support is STRONG – strong enough to take on an entrenched Democrat politician who has the backing of those corporations and special interest groups I refuse to take donations from.

**So,_finally_ , here’s my special request, friend:** since today is the 7th, and I love the number 7, [**I’m asking for 77 supporters to chip in $7 today to help jumpstart our push toward the June 30th deadline.**](http://links.martynevada.com/u/click?_t=3a5223257aca4a93ac027b228c2c976d&_m=073e5baf140541f5a82e2156bf5ba4ab&_e=rH0H3uL4wYIHnOWBdGuEpy4k8dY3qROd6MoX52-uyXpETeX2VuhcnrVVY4Ee8nip2_8zyhhyBTH24KTxTzh2asjCh89XGt_ycjsxvH2j3uQ4U-MsczvLysAXHu_JdiTOZAoi3GaOawqM4jHpx8fKmbk_mvJBx2O329raNb0SzCLy6hFCR0CUyRsAEU_4IC2feIymuO90HmbOTIkRIxrBZf-N9WP8afZyWCkykQL_RMdnINvn_HhmtrYHhB_V7qzts6yDVzbY32x9qfR33CjQyHFQl2Jubj93Wmofy-gH-CJrvXMP8avNO-H--Ygx4fbIYOf_b8aofrdn1eqH_rpKyG4-qW1Volu_f3ZNky_wBH9XSR-LE5sRgMoEi7Bp54fcNUWtrIeKvEZzPqREuP4Wbw%3D%3D)

[ ** CHIP IN $7 » **](http://links.martynevada.com/u/click?_t=3a5223257aca4a93ac027b228c2c976d&_m=073e5baf140541f5a82e2156bf5ba4ab&_e=rH0H3uL4wYIHnOWBdGuEpy4k8dY3qROd6MoX52-uyXpETeX2VuhcnrVVY4Ee8nip2_8zyhhyBTH24KTxTzh2asjCh89XGt_ycjsxvH2j3uQ4U-MsczvLysAXHu_JdiTOZAoi3GaOawqM4jHpx8fKmbk_mvJBx2O329raNb0SzCLy6hFCR0CUyRsAEU_4IC2feIymuO90HmbOTIkRIxrBZf-N9WP8afZyWCkykQL_RMdnINvn_HhmtrYHhB_V7qztXJ55-YGaflH970qcbMKk4E2S4hcZbx-zMAD00RcN24d-3O--OGVU5Vc3h4E4YBkCvh-JlYTWomlhu1_8qMf_glEj7e3kLag_gjoC-T5XmJzc45lC6aSmb1yYx-ir0f3H2UcouxeuiTivgE2KwDYj1w%3D%3D)
I could ask for more – and you can give more if you want – but this is how I want to run this campaign, and I feel it’s an amount most people would be comfortable with.

[**It would make my day if you can participate**](http://links.martynevada.com/u/click?_t=3a5223257aca4a93ac027b228c2c976d&_m=073e5baf140541f5a82e2156bf5ba4ab&_e=rH0H3uL4wYIHnOWBdGuEpy4k8dY3qROd6MoX52-uyXpETeX2VuhcnrVVY4Ee8nip2_8zyhhyBTH24KTxTzh2asjCh89XGt_ycjsxvH2j3uQ4U-MsczvLysAXHu_JdiTOZAoi3GaOawqM4jHpx8fKmbk_mvJBx2O329raNb0SzCLy6hFCR0CUyRsAEU_4IC2feIymuO90HmbOTIkRIxrBZf-N9WP8afZyWCkykQL_RMdnINvn_HhmtrYHhB_V7qztYzlf2mB0dXqTAepktCdQc8iVlZCI6QMVKvfDblwYc7xKIY2FB2o9V1uzmbk8FGF1EaWM1aylCqdRJfFqjnP-DIKC6DZD7tV3yBAAewXGMgwZOUvms2S7HmDYlg3swpdo9Zv1pHtoUo8xe8vHXhLL5w%3D%3D), and it would be a big boost to our campaign during this critical month.

Thanks again for your support. Let’s finish the fight!

**Marty O’Donnell**
Republican for NV-03

[ ** CHIP IN $7 » **](http://links.martynevada.com/u/click?_t=3a5223257aca4a93ac027b228c2c976d&_m=073e5baf140541f5a82e2156bf5ba4ab&_e=rH0H3uL4wYIHnOWBdGuEpy4k8dY3qROd6MoX52-uyXpETeX2VuhcnrVVY4Ee8nip2_8zyhhyBTH24KTxTzh2asjCh89XGt_ycjsxvH2j3uQ4U-MsczvLysAXHu_JdiTOZAoi3GaOawqM4jHpx8fKmbk_mvJBx2O329raNb0SzCLy6hFCR0CUyRsAEU_4IC2feIymuO90HmbOTIkRIxrBZf-N9WP8afZyWCkykQL_RMdnINvn_HhmtrYHhB_V7qztzeOJyj-hwwfxFgSXIlFPhOsS0kK_kKwHkqFltbUgxH2Umo2JNPnYlTb1QDbwDdGtoYowVlmFRvr8LIiseiRgWwhlDb4GqnsHjeQeJYBTbaq69kz9kRZhhdUrsc3McCCZG6sHDYRyNZ6D1_Mog7dwFA%3D%3D)

| **ABOUT MARTY**
**Marty O’Donnell isn’t a politician** and he’s not taking any corporate PAC money. Marty will give us a voice – not special interests or Wall Street. It’s time to turn our nation around to make life better for Nevadans.

**Marty O’Donnell has an ear for solving problems.** He’s an award-winning composer who wrote the iconic soundtracks for the video games Halo and Destiny. Marty will cut through the noise in DC.

**Marty O’Donnell will be a champion for Nevada families.** As a husband, father, and grandfather, Marty can’t sit on the sidelines as local families struggle because of the problems created by Big Government.

name: Office of U.S. Senator Angela Alsobrooks
subject: Senator Alsobrooks Newsletter -- June 7
body:
|

---
Dear Friends and neighbors, I am excited to recognize Pride Month, and I am proud to stand up for and represent LGBTQ+ Marylanders. You make our state stronger, brighter, and more complete. Our LGBTQ+ friends, family, and neighbors deserve the same basic protections as everyone else - and we will not stop fighting until they get it. I look forward to participating in the festivities. Happy Pride! **Terrorism Will Not Be Tolerated** Antisemitism and callous acts of hate will not and cannot be tolerated in Maryland, DC, Boulder, or anywhere in our country. From Yaron Lischinsky and Sarah Milgrim, who were working toward peace when they were heartlessly executed outside the Capital Jewish Museum - to the eight people who were attacked at a march in Boulder, Colorado - which included a Holocaust survivor - I fully expect the perpetrators of these hateful acts to be prosecuted to the fullest extent of the law. I join Marylanders in praying for all the victims of the attacks, and their families. I also pray for peace across our nation. **State Work Period** As some of you may know, the Senate was in recess last week, which meant I had the opportunity to spend time doing what I love most: meeting with Marylanders all across the state. Below are some of the highlights from the state work period. \---- Small businesses are truly the backbone of Maryland's economy. There are over 600,000 small businesses in Maryland, making up 99.5% of Maryland businesses. I was in Montgomery County for a productive and robust discussion with business leaders from across the region to hear directly about their concerns, ideas, and how I can continue to support them. Republican cuts to Medicaid and Medicare are devastating our seniors. During a meeting in Annapolis last week, many told me they're worried about affording their prescription drug medications, cuts to VA benefits, and more. I promised that I will always fight to protect their health care and benefits and will oppose efforts to make vulnerable Americans pay more to offset the cost of tax breaks for billionaires. I'm committed to fighting for special education and support services - especially as Americans with disabilities are bracing for cuts to their Medicaid. We need more places like Harbour School in Annapolis - focused on learning, inspiring, and preparing students for the future. It was an honor to meet with staff and wonderfully engaged young Marylanders. Last week, I heard from experts on the ground who are combating Baltimore's opioid crisis. President Trump's recent cuts to funding could hurt the progress Baltimore has made in saving lives. I thank Mayor Scott and community partners for their insight. This is a battle that is far from over, and I will work to do my part to ensure the city - and other jurisdictions fighting the opioid crisis - have the resources that are required to heal our communities. I'm in the sandwich generation. As I'm raising my daughter, I'm also helping care for my aging parents. That's why I'll always fight for our seniors - like those I met in Baltimore City during an intimate town hall. I won't stand for Republican cuts to Medicare. It's so callous. It's imperative we care for those who have given so much to us, and I will always lead with love. Congratulations to the principals honored at the Heart of the Schools Awards in Baltimore! These educators are rockstars, who have gone above and beyond to educate our young scholars. And thank you to all of our principals and educators for your dedication to Baltimore children and their families -- we are forever grateful. I visited Western Maryland to meet with leaders from Midland, Lonaconing, Westernport, Luke, and the state, as towns continue to work to recover from the floods that slammed the region more than two weeks ago now. What's clear to me is that the communities I visited are resilient, and eager to rebuild and I will continue to work with my colleagues at the federal, state, and local levels to ensure we help our neighbors recover. I was honored to join the White Rose Foundation and the Yellow Rose Foundation for their Soulful Sunday Luncheon. I'm very grateful for their desire to give back. During these challenging times, I encouraged them to hold onto their optimism, hopefulness, and joy. **Fighting Through Legislation** I continue to work hard to fight for Marylanders. From holding industries accountable to protecting our children, and I wanted to share some of the legislation I cosponsored over the last couple of weeks. Equal Access to Justice for Victims of Gun Violence Act o The Equal Access to Justice for Victims of Gun Violence Act would repeal the Protection for Lawful Commerce in Arms Act and remove the liability shield protecting the gun industry from civil accountability. The legislation would allow civil cases to go forward against irresponsible actors in state and federal courts, just as they would if they involved any other product. Letting courts hear these cases would provide victims of gun violence their day in court, incentivize responsible business practices, and undo the special treatment given to the gun industry. Wear Orange Resolution o This resolution would designate June as National Gun Violence Awareness Month and Friday, June 6 as National Gun Violence Awareness Day. Safe Environment from Countries Under Repression and Emergency (SECURE) Act o The bill would allow qualified recipients of Temporary Protected Status (TPS) and deferred enforced departure (DED) to apply for legal permanent residency in the United States. These immigration statuses are granted to foreign citizens who face danger in their home country resulting from extraordinary events such as ongoing armed conflict, environmental disaster, or epidemic. Vote at Home Act o This bill would promote the ability of voters to vote by mail, expand options for casting ballots, fund the United States Postal Service, and enact automatic voter registration for eligible citizens. Kids Online Safety Act o This bill requires online platforms to exercise a duty of care to prevent and mitigate harms to minors, including cyberbullying, sexual exploitation, and exposure to harmful content. The bill also mandates platforms provide parental tools, limit addictive product features, and enhance default privacy settings for minors and requires independent audits and public transparency reports to hold platforms accountable. Kids Off Social Media Act o This bill prohibits children under 13, and in some versions under 17, from accessing social media platforms, bans platforms from serving personalized content or advertisements to minors, and requires deletion of accounts known to belong to underage users. **Congratulations to the Class of 2025** I had the honor of delivering Bowie State University's commencement address. It was wonderful seeing our future leaders who are ready to embark on the next leg of their journey and I am so excited to see the contributions they will make to our great state, and our nation. To our new graduates: You have a destiny, a purpose to make this world better. You belong in every room you step in. And believe me when I say that your presence will change the room. So be present. Be bold. Be confident. You can watch my commencement address [here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=14132.9233370.5402218.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.youtube.com%2flive%2faAikxaP8yss%3ft%3d5837s&redir_log=237528759895323). **Here to Serve You** Our constituent services team stands ready to assist you! If you are a veteran who needs help navigating the Department of Veterans Affairs, if you're having trouble navigating Social Security, the IRS or immigration, please reach out to our team by filling out the applicable form [here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=14132.9233370.5402218.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.alsobrooks.senate.gov%2fservices%2fcasework%2f&redir_log=48139330565369). **Stay Informed** I know these are difficult times. But please know that I will continue fighting for you every step of the way. We will not give up. We will not give in to this Administration, and I ask that you continue to fight alongside us. Please continue to reach out to us. You can call the office, connect with us, or find resources for those who have been laid off at [alsobrooks.senate.gov](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=14132.9233370.5402218.7190525&report_id=&redirect=http%3a%2f%2falsobrooks.senate.gov&redir_log=983830187668200). You can also follow us on Bluesky, Instagram, Facebook, Threads, YouTube, and X. We are in this TOGETHER. Sincerely, Angela D. Alsobrooks
United States Senator

Stay Informed I know these are difficult times. But please know that I will continue fighting for you every step of the way. We will not give up. We will not give in to this Administration, and I ask that you continue to fight alongside us. Please continue to reach out to us. You can call the office, connect with us, or find resources for those who have been laid off at . You can also follow us on Bluesky, Instagram, Facebook, Threads, YouTube, and X. We are in this TOGETHER. Sincerely, Angela D. Alsobrooks United States Senator

[**MESSAGE FROM NAVY SEALS TIM SHEEHY, ELI CRANE, & RYAN ZINKE**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=c896321f7b81427d9c567c1a411686cd&_e=dgiRqgOQfm-QUZJLYs0YzVJsi9n7Z7ZtDou2FGLvVvdTNK54-3HGaAifRaWUNrtOtIJCFRMUsYXvqhLftpabFOWgtJyRruhEVvQuQqLerq55xXEN3Fv14xaGhTfv-z23UQu8ZFnWwCw7ImXt4OUgfYYwut0ldCu3XOrqmHwZEQimVh-tcBjHzJ6QiXx_IhzWtN0FTjfGrQ-4-wvtuQ3VfGpKO-4tbggUbDClx3fcQCDtXylgMhatcJv9Pnkru3aVDuY06wxbeAtAHN6Po4ckdcOJdLI4KqNhj_1pPby9YiDXk-oxzf6Y3tO6pnnMwoTeWT9bks1JK3eu6mTmOm-MzDrdSx1ADiCXv-dEeZ9FQHVNEy2EzGW7z5aWIDOo8_WqfTDlqqcsUOfkGZrHKmXMOQ%3D%3D)

Peter,

Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one’s shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway.

The out-of-touch fake news “reporters” at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs.

We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can’t abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country.

_**Yet the liberal news corporations, who _desperately_ want to keep the status quo, _attacked us_ for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government.**_

All of us –**Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke** – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we’re up against more than just the DC establishment. We’re up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats.

**We need you, Peter to keep us on the frontlines, bucking the corrupt status quo! **[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=c896321f7b81427d9c567c1a411686cd&_e=dgiRqgOQfm-QUZJLYs0YzVJsi9n7Z7ZtDou2FGLvVvdTNK54-3HGaAifRaWUNrtOmq_RhSyHVNUhLlmW2QCUFGiqlJ5NiThzpTfKJqAiMIucYYctiUyrUEVCRAlDzX0Cuyq90RgK_xfncQ_xVPWCdV7B-lmcWegsrzzzssj2JKe7yonxx3XKUJCwJvFNEw1dCXprDKKcN1qbixWyW_ICatWtONUscwuaV_4wjlWFVyXhFRpNvdr7v49VOCKLeN2Rc5kWqlNpTxE7PFOvZsARgNWiT6lt03idNIblGHVEV1zM7oIqgbnrk73IOMh9awRZGJH_EnYNWIkujLUGk6p8-yaTU4OBCwqypunIisuiKpp-WQ6qQHw4ilp-vjWpaL9kl0DOVyvEtzGJ0KhxRKbxTQ%3D%3D)

clean_body: Washington’s a different kind of warzone—high stakes, relentless battles, and no shortage of enemies. But I’m no stranger to tough fights. | Peter, Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one’s shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway. The out-of-touch fake news “reporters” at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can’t abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country. Yet the liberal news corporations, who desperately want to keep the status quo, attacked us for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government. All of us –Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we’re up against more than just the DC establishment. We’re up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats. We need you, Peter to keep us on the frontlines, bucking the corrupt status quo! → If the media wants to attack us for having a “warrior mentality” – the mentality to do whatever it takes to achieve a mission... → If the media wants to attack us for supporting President Trump’s MAGA movement – the movement that says we can make America great... → If the media wants to attack us for taking on the government corruption, fraud, and waste – which has been exposed by Trump’s DOGE department... ...Then they don’t understand WHY Donald J. We’re going to shoot straight with you, too: This hit piece was horsesht and part of a larger conspiracy to silence us. If they can silence us, they can sure as hell silence you. TRUMP TO THE DEEP STATE: Hands Off Our Social Security!

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: 30 years
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Immigrants like me understand the promise of America, which is why I know we can do better
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1661%2E791427%2EpKv4Gy)

Friend, this year marks a huge milestone for me. Thirty years ago, my family came to America.
I was born in Somalia and raised in a refugee camp after my family was forced to flee violence and instability. I came to the US as an asylum-seeker, and eventually earned my citizenship.
Of course, there were many roadblocks along the way. Legal hurdles, financial hardship, xenophobia and bullying to name a few. But my family and I persevered, and I am proud to now represent my community here in Minnesota in Congress.
**Immigrants like me understand the promise of America, which is why I know we can do better,** and why I fight for a better future for ALL of us, every single day.
We can be a country that rejects the fear and hate of the far-right. We can guarantee healthcare, stable housing, and a quality education for everyone. We can do big things like tackle climate change and rebuild public infrastructure.
And yes, we can be a country that continues our legacy of welcoming immigrants from around the world who are looking for a better life just like I was.
These are long-term goals, I know that. But that’s why we’re building a grassroots movement – a movement that can endure through Donald Trump or any other obstacle to deliver on our vision of prosperity for all.
**[If you share that vision of the future, I am asking for your support today. Chip in $5 or whatever you can as we continue to build a movement to defeat the far-right create a better world for ALL of us, and not just the wealthy and privileged few.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-june25.Nm0oDJ&refcode=em250607-1-150&t=2&akid=1661%2E791427%2EpKv4Gy)

---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/15?c0=io-em-june25.rnqe4b&refcode=em250607-1-150&t=22&akid=1661%2E791427%2EpKv4Gy)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/8?c0=io-em-june25.7d8F-T&refcode=em250607-1-150&t=23&akid=1661%2E791427%2EpKv4Gy)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/9?c0=io-em-june25.NxH4u-&refcode=em250607-1-150&t=24&akid=1661%2E791427%2EpKv4Gy)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/10?c0=io-em-june25.FiK92s&refcode=em250607-1-150&t=25&akid=1661%2E791427%2EpKv4Gy)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/13?c0=io-em-june25.HI9zTQ&refcode=em250607-1-150&t=26&akid=1661%2E791427%2EpKv4Gy)**
---

America is and has always been a nation of immigrants. It’s now our job to make sure that everyone enjoys the safety, respect, and dignity they deserve. I hope I can count on you to join me in that fight.
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar

name: News Team @ Our Revolution
subject: Mass Protests for No Kings Day, Fighting the Big Bad Budget Bill, Actions on Capitol Hill, Endorsements & More!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

NEWS FROM THE POLITICAL REVOLUTION

HEADLINES: No Kings Day of Defiance | Big Bad Budget Battle |
Fighting Trump’s Crypto Corruption | Citizen Action Team on Capitol
Hill | New Endorsements! | & MORE!

★ ★ ★

Trump is escalating his authoritarianism in ways we’ve never seen —
from his crypto scheme to rake in billions to his push to hand our
data over to tech oligarchs at Palantir to spy on Americans using our
own tax dollars.

On June 14, he’ll make a spectacle of his birthday with a military
parade and literal tanks in the streets of Washington, D.C. It can
all feel so dystopian, but hope is not lost. WE ARE FIGHTING BACK.

Our Revolution, our nearly 60,000 activists, and our allies are
fighting at every turn to block the worst of the Trump agenda — in
the streets and in the halls of Congress. We’re deploying our
activists to confront Senators in person and organizing massive
protests nationwide to make it clear that America has NO KING.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31223?t=1011&akid=8717%2E5885482%2ECzVExl ]Chip in any amount to help power this critical work in these
uncertain times. Together, we can fight back against the worst of the
Trump regime.

★ ★ ★

[2]Fight Trump & The Oligarchs

★ ★ ★

BIG BAD BUDGET BATTLE

Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill” would eliminate health insurance for
over 10 million Americans, take food away from 4 million children,
cut Medicare and Medicaid by more than $1 trillion, and give the top
1% a $664 billion tax break.

With Trump and Elon Musk feuding over the bill, and masses of
Americans standing in unison to oppose it, there’s a real chance to
make an impact.

We’re keeping the heat on GOP Reps, with our activists directly
confronting many of them in the halls of Congress — and with
grassroots support, we’ll continue this work on Capitol Hill until
Republicans break.

When we encountered Rep. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/28754?t=1012&akid=8717%2E5885482%2ECzVExl ]Rich McCormick (GA-7), he literally RAN
up three flights of steps to avoid accountability for his support for
TRILLIONS to the Pentagon and wealthy billionaires at the expense of
healthcare and essential programs.

We only need to pick off a few Republicans, and some are already
showing weakness. Our direct organizing paired with Bernie’s rallies
in key red districts turned up the heat, leading 12 GOP Congress
members to publicly denounce the Medicaid cuts.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/28750?t=1013&akid=8717%2E5885482%2ECzVExl ]SAY NO TO TRUMP'S BUDGET BILL

★ ★ ★

NO KINGS DAY OF DEFIANCE

On June 14th, Trump will celebrate his birthday with an authoritarian
spectacle, with tanks rolling through the streets of our nation’s
capital.

It will be a horrifying display fitting of a dictator, but our
movement is rising up to drown it out and show Trump who’s really in
charge of this democracy — we the people!

The next MASSIVE nationwide protest is just ONE WEEK AWAY with 1,475
events coming together for No Kings Day of Defiance on June 14th.

We will be showing up in force from cities to small towns — from
Philly and Los Angeles to Bowie, MD, and Steamboat Springs, CO — we
will be all across the nation, demonstrating the strength of the
opposition against Trump and his regime.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31235?t=1014&akid=8717%2E5885482%2ECzVExl ]JOIN A NO KINGS ACTION

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31236?t=1015&akid=8717%2E5885482%2ECzVExl ]GET YOUR PROTEST PACK

Organizing protests coast to coast isn’t easy, and we rely on the
grassroots to power these actions, from boots on the ground to
setting up sound systems and providing transportation. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31223?t=1016&akid=8717%2E5885482%2ECzVExl ]Chip in a
few bucks or whatever you can afford to help us make this HUGE!!

★ ★ ★

FIGHTING CRYPTO CORRUPTION

The GOP is pushing a crypto bill — the so-called “GENIUS Act” — which
would allow the Trump family to make billions while destabilizing our
economy and leaving working people vulnerable to scams.

Our Revolution activists and allies greeted the Grifter-in-Chief and
his crypto financiers as they arrived at Trump National Golf Club to
buy influence with the president.

We were joined by Sen. Jeff Merkley and our allies at Public Citizen
to make it clear that AMERICA IS NOT FOR SALE. “This is the Mount
Everest of corruption,” the senator said.

The [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/30612?t=1017&akid=8717%2E5885482%2ECzVExl ]NY Times, [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31224?t=1018&akid=8717%2E5885482%2ECzVExl ]Common Dreams, and many other news outlets took
notice, amplifying our action to crack down on Trump’s crypto
corruption.

Joseph Geevarghese, executive director of [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31225?t=1019&akid=8717%2E5885482%2ECzVExl ]Our Revolution, said
Trump's meme coin is worthless without the access it buys. "Invest in
the coin and you'll get a seat at the table," he said. "We're here to
send a message to Trump: Our democracy is not for sale."

Our activists shouted 'shame, shame, shame' as the presidential
motorcade arrived. And, the White House felt the heat, putting out a
video of Trump saying he puts “the country way ahead of the
business.” Sureeee.

★ ★ ★

US Senators Elizabeth Warren and Jeff Merkley joined our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/28751?t=1020&akid=8717%2E5885482%2ECzVExl ]LIVE
Town Hall to break down Trump's crypto corruption — and this week,
our activists took to Capitol Hill to bird-dog Congress members —
including senators like [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31226?t=1021&akid=8717%2E5885482%2ECzVExl ]Cory Booker, who joined 15 other
Democrats to advance the bill.

Our Revolution also held a virtual town hall on Tuesday to hold Sen.
Angela Alsobrooks accountable for her vote for the GOP crypto bill.

The senator didn’t show up, but our movement did. And on Thursday, we
delivered your messages directly to Alsobrooks’ office and asked her
why she would enable Trump’s crypto corruption and empower the tech
oligarchs.

This is more than just about crypto — it’s about taking a stand
against the billionaire takeover of our government. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/28752?t=1022&akid=8717%2E5885482%2ECzVExl ]Sign the
petition and stop the crypto power grab!

★ ★ ★

[14]Take Back The Party

★ ★ ★

NEW ENDORSEMENTS!

We’re proud to endorse Adelita Grijalva for Congress in Arizona’s 7th
District! She isn’t just carrying the progressive legacy of her
father, Rep. Raúl Grijalva — she’s blazing her own trail as a bold,
principled leader.

As a Tucson City Council member and former school board president,
she’s been on the front lines fighting for Medicare for All, climate,
education, reproductive freedom, immigrant rights, and more.

Adelita is a lifelong fighter for working families who has proven
she's unafraid to stand up to corporate power and deliver real
solutions. Her campaign is people-powered—and we’re all in to help
send her to Congress.

★ ★ ★

Our Revolution proudly endorses Troy Jackson for Governor of Maine!

Troy isn’t your typical politician—he’s a logger, union leader, and
lifelong fighter for working people. He’s stood shoulder to shoulder
with workers on the picket line and never backed down from the
corporate elites.

As President of the Maine Senate, Troy delivered results: expanding
health care, lowering prescription drug prices, fighting for paid
family leave, and protecting collective bargaining rights. He’s
helped make Maine a leader on climate jobs and renewable energy,
while always putting working families, not wealthy donors, first.

That’s why Bernie is endorsing Troy, too:

“We need candidates who, unequivocally, will stand with working-class
families against the enormous power of the monied interests.”

With Trump and the billionaire class trying to tighten their grip on
power, we need governors like Troy Jackson—leaders who aren’t bought,
who won’t sell out, and who are ready to fight for the rest of us.

★ ★ ★

We’re happy to announce our endorsement of David Seligman for
Colorado Attorney General!

David is a proven champion for workers’ rights, economic justice, and
corporate accountability—and he’s running to put the power of the law
on the side of everyday people, not the wealthy and well-connected.

Founder of Towards Justice, David has spent his career fighting wage
theft, forced arbitration, and corporate abuse—using the legal system
to stand up for working families and challenge economic injustice at
its roots.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31227?t=1023&akid=8717%2E5885482%2ECzVExl ]Help us out-organize Big Money and elect progressives like these
up and down the ballot — every dollar helps!

★ ★ ★

UPCOMING ELECTION!

On June 17th — just one week from Tuesday! — Joshua Cole will be on
the ballot for re-election to Virginia’s House of Delegates.

Joshua has stood out as a progressive leader, championing policies
that prioritize working families and social justice. He’s been a
strong advocate for affordable healthcare, raising wages,
tuition-free community college, and much more.

★ ★ ★

VICTORY IN PHILLY!

Congratulations to Philadelphia District Attorney Larry Krasner for
his victory in the Democratic primary. His commitment to ending mass
incarceration, abolishing cash bail, and tackling corruption sets a
national standard.

From exonerating nearly 50 wrongfully convicted to reducing the
juvenile incarceration rate by 70% to cutting future incarceration
days by half - saving taxpayers millions and reuniting families -
Krasner’s leadership has transformed Philly's justice system.

★ ★ ★

A resource for you and your future

As we look forward to the future of Our Revolution, we invite you to
plan for your own future through our partnership with FreeWill.

Using their online estate planning tool, you can create a will or
revocable living trust 100% for free and protect the people,
communities, and causes you care about. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25487?t=1024&akid=8717%2E5885482%2ECzVExl ]Create your free plan
here.

★ ★ ★

[17]Action Center

★ ★ ★

Our Mission in this moment: Fight Trump and the Oligarchy. We have
built a powerful network of organizers and activists — nearly 60,000
connected across the country — and we’re getting to work!

And now we have a [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/28759?t=1025&akid=8717%2E5885482%2ECzVExl ]brand new tool to help you plug in the way you
want. Whether it’s pressuring lawmakers in their office or amplifying
the message online, there are tons of ways to help!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/28759?t=1026&akid=8717%2E5885482%2ECzVExl ]JOIN OUR CITIZEN ACTION TEAM

★ ★ ★

On June 14th, as Trump rolls tanks down the streets of Washington
D.C. for his birthday, our movement will be rising up with hundreds
of protests nationwide to reject Trump and drown out his
authoritarian spectacle.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31228?t=1027&akid=8717%2E5885482%2ECzVExl ]FIND A NO KINGS EVENT NEAR YOU

When you pick up these new [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31229?t=1028&akid=8717%2E5885482%2ECzVExl ]NO KINGS buttons (and other great NEW
merch!) you’ll help power our collective action on No Kings Day of
Defiance and fund our pressure campaigns to stop the worst of the
Trump agenda. Thank you.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/19903?t=1029&akid=8717%2E5885482%2ECzVExl ]MERCH STORE

★ ★ ★

[23]Thank you to all who Donate & Volunteer

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13011?t=1030&akid=8717%2E5885482%2ECzVExl ]WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN!

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=8717%2E5885482%2ECzVExl ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=8717%2E5885482%2ECzVExl ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=8717%2E5885482%2ECzVExl ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=8717%2E5885482%2ECzVExl ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=8717%2E5885482%2ECzVExl ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=8717%2E5885482%2ECzVExl ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13119?c0=revreport20250607.uS0-l8&t=1007&akid=8717%2E5885482%2ECzVExl ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13120?c0=revreport20250607.DG0Wlj&t=1008&akid=8717%2E5885482%2ECzVExl ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the

clean_body: [ stdin# ][IMG] NEWS FROM THE POLITICAL REVOLUTION HEADLINES: No Kings Day of Defiance | Big Bad Budget Battle | Fighting Trump’s Crypto Corruption | Citizen Action Team on Capitol Hill | New Endorsements! | & MORE! ★ ★ ★ Trump is escalating his authoritarianism in ways we’ve never seen — from his crypto scheme to rake in billions to his push to hand our data over to tech oligarchs at Palantir to spy on Americans using our own tax dollars. On June 14, he’ll make a spectacle of his birthday with a military parade and literal tanks in the streets of Washington, D.C. It can all feel so dystopian, but hope is not lost. WE ARE FIGHTING BACK. Our Revolution, our nearly 60,000 activists, and our allies are fighting at every turn to block the worst of the Trump agenda — in the streets and in the halls of Congress. We’re deploying our activists to confront Senators in person and organizing massive protests nationwide to make it clear that America has NO KING. [ ]Chip in any amount to help power this critical work in these uncertain times. Together, we can fight back against the worst of the Trump regime. ★ ★ ★ [2]Fight Trump & The Oligarchs ★ ★ ★ BIG BAD BUDGET BATTLE Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill” would eliminate health insurance for over 10 million Americans, take food away from 4 million children, cut Medicare and Medicaid by more than $1 trillion, and give the top 1% a $664 billion tax break. With Trump and Elon Musk feuding over the bill, and masses of Americans standing in unison to oppose it, there’s a real chance to make an impact. We’re keeping the heat on GOP Reps, with our activists directly confronting many of them in the halls of Congress — and with grassroots support, we’ll continue this work on Capitol Hill until Republicans break. When we encountered Rep. [ ]Rich McCormick (GA-7), he literally RAN up three flights of steps to avoid accountability for his support for TRILLIONS to the Pentagon and wealthy billionaires at the expense of healthcare and essential programs. We only need to pick off a few Republicans, and some are already showing weakness. Our direct organizing paired with Bernie’s rallies in key red districts turned up the heat, leading 12 GOP Congress members to publicly denounce the Medicaid cuts. [ ]SAY NO TO TRUMP'S BUDGET BILL ★ ★ ★ NO KINGS DAY OF DEFIANCE On June 14th, Trump will celebrate his birthday with an authoritarian spectacle, with tanks rolling through the streets of our nation’s capital. It will be a horrifying display fitting of a dictator, but our movement is rising up to drown it out and show Trump who’s really in charge of this democracy — we the people! The next MASSIVE nationwide protest is just ONE WEEK AWAY with 1,475 events coming together for No Kings Day of Defiance on June 14th. We will be showing up in force from cities to small towns — from Philly and Los Angeles to Bowie, MD, and Steamboat Springs, CO — we will be all across the nation, demonstrating the strength of the opposition against Trump and his regime. [ ]JOIN A NO KINGS ACTION [ ]GET YOUR PROTEST PACK Organizing protests coast to coast isn’t easy, and we rely on the grassroots to power these actions, from boots on the ground to setting up sound systems and providing transportation. [ ]Chip in a few bucks or whatever you can afford to help us make this HUGE!! ★ ★ ★ FIGHTING CRYPTO CORRUPTION The GOP is pushing a crypto bill — the so-called “GENIUS Act” — which would allow the Trump family to make billions while destabilizing our economy and leaving working people vulnerable to scams. Our Revolution activists and allies greeted the Grifter-in-Chief and his crypto financiers as they arrived at Trump National Golf Club to buy influence with the president. We were joined by Sen. Jeff Merkley and our allies at Public Citizen to make it clear that AMERICA IS NOT FOR SALE. “This is the Mount Everest of corruption,” the senator said. The [ ]NY Times, [ ]Common Dreams, and many other news outlets took notice, amplifying our action to crack down on Trump’s crypto corruption. Joseph Geevarghese, executive director of [ ]Our Revolution, said Trump's meme coin is worthless without the access it buys. "Invest in the coin and you'll get a seat at the table," he said. "We're here to send a message to Trump: Our democracy is not for sale." Our activists shouted 'shame, shame, shame' as the presidential motorcade arrived. And, the White House felt the heat, putting out a video of Trump saying he puts “the country way ahead of the business.” Sureeee. ★ ★ ★ US Senators Elizabeth Warren and Jeff Merkley joined our [ ]LIVE Town Hall to break down Trump's crypto corruption — and this week, our activists took to Capitol Hill to bird-dog Congress members — including senators like [ ]Cory Booker, who joined 15 other Democrats to advance the bill. Our Revolution also held a virtual town hall on Tuesday to hold Sen. Angela Alsobrooks accountable for her vote for the GOP crypto bill. The senator didn’t show up, but our movement did. And on Thursday, we delivered your messages directly to Alsobrooks’ office and asked her why she would enable Trump’s crypto corruption and empower the tech oligarchs. This is more than just about crypto — it’s about taking a stand against the billionaire takeover of our government. [ ]Sign the petition and stop the crypto power grab! ★ ★ ★ [14]Take Back The Party ★ ★ ★ NEW ENDORSEMENTS! We’re proud to endorse Adelita Grijalva for Congress in Arizona’s 7th District! She isn’t just carrying the progressive legacy of her father, Rep. Raúl Grijalva — she’s blazing her own trail as a bold, principled leader. As a Tucson City Council member and former school board president, she’s been on the front lines fighting for Medicare for All, climate, education, reproductive freedom, immigrant rights, and more. Adelita is a lifelong fighter for working families who has proven she's unafraid to stand up to corporate power and deliver real solutions. Her campaign is people-powered—and we’re all in to help send her to Congress. ★ ★ ★ Our Revolution proudly endorses Troy Jackson for Governor of Maine! Troy isn’t your typical politician—he’s a logger, union leader, and lifelong fighter for working people. He’s stood shoulder to shoulder with workers on the picket line and never backed down from the corporate elites. As President of the Maine Senate, Troy delivered results: expanding health care, lowering prescription drug prices, fighting for paid family leave, and protecting collective bargaining rights. He’s helped make Maine a leader on climate jobs and renewable energy, while always putting working families, not wealthy donors, first. That’s why Bernie is endorsing Troy, too: “We need candidates who, unequivocally, will stand with working-class families against the enormous power of the monied interests.” With Trump and the billionaire class trying to tighten their grip on power, we need governors like Troy Jackson—leaders who aren’t bought, who won’t sell out, and who are ready to fight for the rest of us. ★ ★ ★ We’re happy to announce our endorsement of David Seligman for Colorado Attorney General! David is a proven champion for workers’ rights, economic justice, and corporate accountability—and he’s running to put the power of the law on the side of everyday people, not the wealthy and well-connected. Founder of Towards Justice, David has spent his career fighting wage theft, forced arbitration, and corporate abuse—using the legal system to stand up for working families and challenge economic injustice at its roots. [ ]Help us out-organize Big Money and elect progressives like these up and down the ballot — every dollar helps! ★ ★ ★ UPCOMING ELECTION! On June 17th — just one week from Tuesday! — Joshua Cole will be on the ballot for re-election to Virginia’s House of Delegates. Joshua has stood out as a progressive leader, championing policies that prioritize working families and social justice. He’s been a strong advocate for affordable healthcare, raising wages, tuition-free community college, and much more. ★ ★ ★ VICTORY IN PHILLY! Congratulations to Philadelphia District Attorney Larry Krasner for his victory in the Democratic primary. His commitment to ending mass incarceration, abolishing cash bail, and tackling corruption sets a national standard. From exonerating nearly 50 wrongfully convicted to reducing the juvenile incarceration rate by 70% to cutting future incarceration days by half - saving taxpayers millions and reuniting families - Krasner’s leadership has transformed Philly's justice system. ★ ★ ★ A resource for you and your future As we look forward to the future of Our Revolution, we invite you to plan for your own future through our partnership with FreeWill. Using their online estate planning tool, you can create a will or revocable living trust 100% for free and protect the people, communities, and causes you care about. [ ]Create your free plan here. ★ ★ ★ [17]Action Center ★ ★ ★ Our Mission in this moment: Fight Trump and the Oligarchy. We have built a powerful network of organizers and activists — nearly 60,000 connected across the country — and we’re getting to work! And now we have a [ ]brand new tool to help you plug in the way you want. Whether it’s pressuring lawmakers in their office or amplifying the message online, there are tons of ways to help! [ ]JOIN OUR CITIZEN ACTION TEAM ★ ★ ★ On June 14th, as Trump rolls tanks down the streets of Washington D.C. for his birthday, our movement will be rising up with hundreds of protests nationwide to reject Trump and drown out his authoritarian spectacle. [ ]FIND A NO KINGS EVENT NEAR YOU When you pick up these new [ ]NO KINGS buttons (and other great NEW merch!) you’ll help power our collective action on No Kings Day of Defiance and fund our pressure campaigns to stop the worst of the Trump agenda. Thank you. [ ]MERCH STORE ★ ★ ★ [23]Thank you to all who Donate & Volunteer [ ]WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN! **I know I can count on you, Friend.** You've been a rock-solid supporter of our conservative movement for years, fighting alongside me and House Republicans against the Radical Left's attempts to undermine our values and destroy everything we've worked for.

__**[But I need you to renew your Membership today.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=0fd84634a581404ea5e59b2250ee0929&_e=CVRJ-ApfPip6vJpJHO3_fjjyYHurlm717EOXIXzxLOihZ2INHzYglwLEA6EmipS4OW3ucl3BbDcKGGew3EmCLl6cmuCvifOcFImUc1NPBI6XnyHU5n5jFtY1xMF50K7wrUeXPCGCg1IksClfRzpoch0q5qAODxkMH3GWYTtdfw6Ylt0JaMKHH_otqCYkdZjn8E7b4tAiebKKHJ0KkTx-EIPId2I-2u_FMiWU2iREH5y8WrkaB8jphL_w1OWzIsaevrZveN0uT8AqLRGTCu3y3Ri_evduX0JGC7LC6KFGy2Z0nmtpTBVOCxq18n1INOgXDHxEtJwl0r7ud_e2cIBKEuJ4NjZ23VxuKDkhz6m61M2cWaiaJBlwF2pWWbfqr3B7n6kk88nOcH1sbipO895kYw%3D%3D "But I need you to renew your Membership today.")**__ We're on the cusp of the biggest battle of our lives, and I need to know if you're with me. **The Radical Left is gearing up to take down our conservative leaders and destroy everything we've worked for. We can't let that happen.**

Don't let the Radical Left gain the upper hand. _**[Renew NOW, Friend.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=0fd84634a581404ea5e59b2250ee0929&_e=CVRJ-ApfPip6vJpJHO3_fjjyYHurlm717EOXIXzxLOihZ2INHzYglwLEA6EmipS4OW3ucl3BbDcKGGew3EmCLl6cmuCvifOcFImUc1NPBI6XnyHU5n5jFtY1xMF50K7wrUeXPCGCg1IksClfRzpoch0q5qAODxkMH3GWYTtdfw6Ylt0JaMKHH_otqCYkdZjn8E7b4tAiebKKHJ0KkTx-EIPId2I-2u_FMiWU2iREH5y8WrkaB8jphL_w1OWzIsaefX1uyUBIvTBzOe4wNXbB2cCT0sNd9aCUFkMoA4qZ15AFEo1ztehaCkM8Z9TMPlXev0hIwPwGvzGmKlE0j0zwZfOPrfQ-qlUC_9-bR1ESbwYWNCLQ_KrofjlqJjn-Enihn8IGcIGOs1wFBL6RjUyDoA%3D%3D "Renew NOW, Friend.")**_

name: The Democrats
subject: New contest: Your chance to meet Barack Obama
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
---
$3. That's the contribution we’re asking you to make to support the DNC’s work. And when you do, you’ll get your name in the running in our latest contest — **where one lucky winner (and a guest!) will get to meet President Obama later this summer.** This contest only lasts for a limited time, so if that’s all you need to hear, use this link to contribute and you’ll be automatically entered to win: [**https://democrats.org/go/obama-sweepstakes**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-meet-obama-sweepstakes-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250607_3666_fr&refcode2=3666_22930333_1R-1bh&akid=3666%2E22930333%2E1R-1bh) We know your inbox is probably flooded with messages like this one asking for $3 to support candidates and causes you care about. With so much going on in the news right now, we know what you might be thinking: Can $3 really make a difference? The answer is yes, it can. Here at the DNC, we’re making a $1 million monthly investment in every single Democratic state party. We’re taking Trump to court to protect voters and our democracy. We’re organizing everywhere, in red, blue, and purple states alike. So when you see Democrats fighting back in your community and beyond, your support is a big reason we have the resources to do it. And today, your donation also gets you entered for a chance to meet President Obama. **[So what do you say? name: Sarah McBride
subject: I saw the Joni Ernst video
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
The GOP’s budget proposal is so bad that their only justification for it is that “we’re all going to die” eventually.
#
I saw the Joni Ernst video.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250607-1?refcode=em20250607-2074&amount=5&refcode2=2074_21716_Az2KvA&akid=2074%2E21716%2EAz2KvA)
The GOP’s budget proposal is so bad that their only justification for it is that “we’re all going to die” _eventually_.
**Let’s not pretend that it has to be this way.**
We don’t have to cut Medicaid.
We don’t have to slash medical research.
None of it.
**We should be _investing_ in working people.** Raising wages, lowering costs, creating good-paying jobs, making healthcare more affordable, protecting union rights – despite what the GOP says, this is possible.
That’s what I ran for Congress to do. And that’s the future I’m fighting for, not whatever the hell Joni Ernst is talking about.
[**If you’re with me, please chip in $5 to fuel our fight to defend everyday people from the GOP’s “Let Them Die” agenda.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250607-1?refcode=em20250607-2074&amount=5&refcode2=2074_21716_Az2KvA&akid=2074%2E21716%2EAz2KvA)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250607-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250607-2074&refcode2=2074_21716_Az2KvA&akid=2074%2E21716%2EAz2KvA)**
In solidarity,
—Sarah

clean_body: The GOP’s budget proposal is so bad that their only justification for it is that “we’re all going to die” eventually. I saw the Joni Ernst video. The GOP’s budget proposal is so bad that their only justification for it is that “we’re all going to die” eventually. Let’s not pretend that it has to be this way. We don’t have to cut Medicaid. We don’t have to slash medical research. None of it. We should be investing in working people. Raising wages, lowering costs, creating good-paying jobs, making healthcare more affordable, protecting union rights – despite what the GOP says, this is possible. That’s what I ran for Congress to do. And that’s the future I’m fighting for, not whatever the hell Joni Ernst is talking about. In solidarity, —Sarah

| | It’s important you download your concealed carry certificate before it's banned for good.

Due to increased pressure from lawmakers, a website offering you a certificate for America’s Top CCW Gun Permit **could be shut down at any moment.**

Which is why it’s important you download your **Concealed Carry Certificate ASAP**.

Wait even one more day and we won’t be able to guarantee this certificate will be available to download.

This certificate is great for gun owners because it takes advantage of a little-known (but 100% legal) loophole - **[allowing you to get a CCW certification from this website](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21562/6374453/a7b01b5602715c3f550ef9ef177c3a6848c783c0/588d083b136f4132c93fd2642d0c251e44542c1e). You don’t even have to leave your house to do it!**

This loophole ensures you encounter:
* Zero government red tape (and no exposing your private info to the Feds)...
* Zero lines, classroom time or books to read...
* Zero gun range time (you don’t even need to fire a gun to get this permit).

**[It’s as simple as visiting this site and answering a few questions (they’re simple)](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21562/6374453/a7b01b5602715c3f550ef9ef177c3a6848c783c0/588d083b136f4132c93fd2642d0c251e44542c1e).**

Plus you can complete the entire certification process online.

Download it directly to your phone or computer in as little as 30 minutes.

**You don’t even need to own a gun to get this permit...** that’s why it’s named America’s #1 Concealed Carry Permit.

31 states have agreed to accept this permit so far. That’s because it’s simply the closest and easiest path to a semi-nationally recognized permit that’s available right now.

This permit isn’t just a basic concealed carry permit either. **It’s one of a kind... and is available to you No Matter what state you reside in.**

**Hurry and get it now.**

**[There are no guarantees this website](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21562/6374453/a7b01b5602715c3f550ef9ef177c3a6848c783c0/588d083b136f4132c93fd2642d0c251e44542c1e)** will be able to legally deliver this certificate to your email address after today!

name: Andy Kim
subject: Three things in Trump's budget that you probably won’t see on the front page
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey
body:
I spent some time digging into Donald Trump’s proposed budget, and it’s worse than I expected.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109159165/550188625/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmJkNzMxYi1hZjQzLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nNxMxUJb4sTvMmOrTolGXKQBeMmepg2yYsE7wWVwzME=&emci=054ea462-2642-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=b2bd731b-af43-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=26261389)
---

| | I spent some time digging into Donald Trump's proposed budget, and it's worse than I expected. **On top of slashing Medicaid and handing out tax cuts to the ultra-wealthy, there are three things in this budget that you probably won't see on the front page, but they matter deeply.** These aren't just numbers in a spreadsheet – they're cuts that will hurt real people and make our country less safe. **First: A brutal hit to our fight against cancer and other diseases.** Trump wants to slash the National Institutes of Health by $18 billion – nearly half of its budget. That includes $2.7 billion in cuts to cancer research alone. This isn't just reckless. It's cruel. Every family has been touched by cancer. Why would we walk away from the research that gives people hope and saves lives? **Second: Turning off the heat – literally – for millions of Americans.** Trump's budget eliminates funding for LIHEAP, a vital program that helps over 6 million people afford heat in the winter and cooling in extreme summer heat. Seniors, kids, and families living on the edge count on this to survive dangerous weather. Cutting it means some people could literally freeze or overheat to death. It's inhumane. **Third: Gutting our defenses against cyberattacks, including election security.** Trump's budget cuts over 1,000 jobs from CISA, the agency that protects our infrastructure from cyberattacks – including power plants, water systems, and our elections. It also defunds election cybersecurity efforts – while Trump continues to spread lies about election integrity. If he truly cared about secure elections, he wouldn't be trying to dismantle the very agency that protects them. **These kinds of cuts don't make us stronger. They make us sicker, more vulnerable, and less safe.** That's why I'm speaking out and why I'm fighting against Trump's budget. The fine print in this budget tells us a lot about Trump's priorities, and they're deeply out of touch with what our families and communities actually need. Thanks for staying informed and for standing with me in the fight for a better future. More soon, _Andy_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Andy Kim instantly:

name: John Kasich
subject: What an incredible story!
body:
I recently had the honor of participating in an event for Convoy of Hope, a remarkable organization I highlight in my new book Heaven Help Us| | | [](http://links.heavenhelpusbook.com/s/c/UaQzSCjFeqI4kVpYKab_QsH9jccxvh4f2z089Zy8Pk1L0MM82N2fuiFusddKG_zW1oP24dG1E5af7F4GWGz-SmqKhJG4mfLpJ-KWbZASb45xTHYfRgT_-uLGttVFwgoiLz7WDLrp2sV5jcbNq1wBdk6CvtCKiJkooisf631vnkIHlMltCREgf0mZqUFxhhoRfXeHnS2KTsujnJLbvbpcVzwd7A5vENYF0atpZDvCTJvnbiW6MytmZGGYuWjHQoiP9rQiWGrtLyYMPbpfLRr1x0N37TeR5g/Pp5-IXljVjGh31Rg5Gepv3D4wBRfcnvo/9)
---
| | Peter, I recently had the honor of participating in an event for Convoy of Hope, a remarkable organization I highlight in my new book, _Heaven Help Us_. Convoy of Hope is one of the most inspiring humanitarian efforts I’ve ever encountered.
---
[](http://links.heavenhelpusbook.com/s/c/RXTH9IAuVExv1j8mfCRArD40ONvGaN9Fr2HPlqughazGh_6yA9StZSOE78EVhl5RSPFBhMRetvM2fukeHT26Q-TmHyJNTz0E1HILQcVvYEOGCrFFvh_qEpfd9mRwGoRN8RsYtKnCcGvnogURx1eht8kqm-2ZQHV9J4mgnYYCqzHfsK7LUBS5Cv7Tucnteg_-MrjNSQ3SxLaAQBGH5xIny1UQfFBTLdKGY1iZgKsQbVhHogCNUxHHWejkhzhtibpzwD8/rf-OYTIRtfQAHNnkdb40t5_DCAYM_Y08/9)
---
After a terrible family tragedy, Hal Donaldson and others founded [Convoy of Hope](http://links.heavenhelpusbook.com/s/c/Hrg4rQxqdT7MyP-VKtbv3_yL93kPBE1znlCYnAUtn4X-iQ3WY83IV4Bv2RXVw3kiz2_1wdODyXIxbA0HEXhqY0AUNBVIlCGdJS_Ldg_BayRaTSjS1jsDvScvqbh6b3GCMlvdasXaTHulYypDoNwAJV_oKFE9t9zz4dq2fSQWC_kf0iW0acgBIrfx18jXIatV5axAHCZrSoysZyC_nACdDRSEwJIadr4YHFzTiehJM3K9WYMnCtd268ooXsFxehAyKVw/cUcPiGXWwCLNeEYMUAw5LqHWOmgj5aoR/9) in 1994. Since then, they have served more than 250 million people in more than 130 countries. Every day, they feed over 571,000 children, train thousands of mothers to launch businesses, and equip tens of thousands of farmers to build sustainable futures. They have delivered more than $2.5 billion in food and supplies and have been a lifeline in the aftermath of over 750 disasters, both natural and man-made.

But it is not just the numbers that impress me. What moves me most is what Hal calls “people-building.” **Convoy of Hope is not just about relief. It is about restoration. It is about helping people get back on their feet with dignity, opportunity, and hope**.

That is what real service looks like. That is what faith in action looks like. And that is why Convoy of Hope is a model worth lifting up for all of us.

clean_body: I recently had the honor of participating in an event for Convoy of Hope, a remarkable organization I highlight in my new book Heaven Help Us| | | | | Peter, I recently had the honor of participating in an event for Convoy of Hope, a remarkable organization I highlight in my new book, Heaven Help Us. Convoy of Hope is one of the most inspiring humanitarian efforts I’ve ever encountered. After a terrible family tragedy, Hal Donaldson and others founded in 1994. Since then, they have served more than 250 million people in more than 130 countries. Every day, they feed over 571,000 children, train thousands of mothers to launch businesses, and equip tens of thousands of farmers to build sustainable futures. They have delivered more than $2.5 billion in food and supplies and have been a lifeline in the aftermath of over 750 disasters, both natural and man-made. But it is not just the numbers that impress me. What moves me most is what Hal calls “people-building.” Convoy of Hope is not just about relief. It is about restoration. It is about helping people get back on their feet with dignity, opportunity, and hope. That is what real service looks like. That is what faith in action looks like. And that is why Convoy of Hope is a model worth lifting up for all of us. If you'd like to read this and other stories that will warm your heart and provide you with more hope for the future, lease consider picking up a copy of Heaven Help Us! While I was there, I also enjoyed the opportunity to meet some of the Convoy of Hope team members, thank them for their service, and sign some book! We really are stronger when we work together. Thank you for all that you are doing to help get this message out in our communities! -John Follow Gov. John Kasich: | | | ---|---|--- | | | If you no longer wish to receive these emails, .

body:
National Republican mega-donors like the DeVos family, are pledging to drop millions into Michigan to cover more ground.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109159948/550190865/32658279?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2025-06-07_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmI2N2QxMS1iMDQzLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U6nnC4v3RD60evQndRZXE_LBaRGXD8O-PSiDb-fufpw=)
---
| In 2022, we sent the first pro-choice woman in MI-03’s history to Congress. And in 2024, we were once again one of the most competitive races in the country. Now, national experts have released their forecasts for 2026, and we’re back on the list:

**▶️ **The Cook Political Report has listed **MI-03 as one of the most competitive in the nation.**

**▶️ ****Two Republican opponents** are already lining up to take this seat.
