name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: How Psychedelics Can Save Lives
body:
[Your campaign brief for June 7, 2025](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/d696e47168a8f315)

Peter-

This week, I continued to highlight an issue that hits incredibly close to me and fellow veterans: psychedelic therapy to treat PTSD. This is a policy that I have been leading on for years now, and I’m encouraged about the potential for progress under President Trump’s administration. I also continued to debunk lies being spread about President Trump’s Big Beautiful Bill that passed out of the House and is currently being considered in the Senate.

My primary is heating up. Multiple candidates have jumped in the race against me, even though they live outside of my district, have no experience relevant to Congress, and would be dreams for Democrats itching to take back my seat. The only way I can win my primary is with help from committed supporters like you. I need to stock up my campaign with the resources to win, which I can only do with your donations. Any amount helps, and I greatly appreciate your support:

[CONTRIBUTE NOW >>](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/d696e47168a8f315)

Now, here's your brief.

HOW PSYCHEDELICS CAN SAVE LIVES

[Rep. Crenshaw: "I wouldn't be a believer if I hadn't come across so many friends over the years...who had actually done this and just seen massive benefits and gotten off all meds and stopped drinking alcohol..."]

[CLICK HERE TO WATCH](https://x.com/WillCainShow_/status/1930368145002532995)

Giving veterans and active duty service members access to psychedelic therapy to treat PTSD has been a top priority for me for years now in Congress. This mission has always been personal. I’ve lost brothers to invisible wounds of PTSD, and I’ve watched others recover when nothing else worked.

That’s why I passed a law authorizing trials on psychedelic therapies like psilocybin and ibogaine through the Department of Defense. Stanford’s study on ibogaine showed an 88% drop in PTSD symptoms, 87% reduction in depression, and 81% decrease in anxiety for veterans with traumatic brain injury. These promising treatments can save lives.

I’m more encouraged about the potential for progress on this issue than I have been in a long time. President Trump has real advocates for this therapy in top positions within his administration, including Health and Human Services Secretary RFK Jr. With the Trump Administration's openness and strong bipartisan support for this policy, we’re closer than ever to ensuring we fully research the potential clinical benefits of breakthrough therapies so we can get veterans the treatment they need.

BERNIE'S LIES ABOUT THE BIG BEAUTIFUL BILL

[Bernie Sanders: The Republican reconciliation bill which makes massive cuts to Medicaid in order to pay for huge tax breaks for billionaires is not just bad policy. It is not just immoral. It is a death sentence for struggling Americans.]

This tweet from Bernie Sanders basically sums up the left’s argument against anything Trump does: “PEOPLE ARE GOING TO DIE!!”

This is the case for everything. President Trump wants to cut taxes? A death sentence according to the left! President Trump thinks we should use reliable fossil fuels instead of unreliable solar and wind? He’s killing everyone on the planet, Greta Thunberg screams! President Trump believes we should secure the border? Children will die!

So, it’s no surprise that we’re seeing the same hyperbolic rhetoric about President Trump’s Big Beautiful Bill. But Bernie’s claim that the bill will kill 51,000 people every year is just absurd, dangerous, and flat out wrong. Here are the facts.

First off, Bernie asked Yale and Penn to produce a number he could weaponize, and they obliged. I read their letter. Here's why it's built on bad assumptions and politics, not facts.

They claim 11,300 people will die from losing Medicaid or ACA coverage. What do they leave out? Most of those losing coverage are: 1.4 million Illegal immigrants, 2.8 million duplicate or enrollees who make too much money to be on these programs in the first place, 4.8 million able-bodied adults who don’t need to be on government-subsidized healthcare.

We’re restoring the program to serve those who truly need it. That’s fair, and it puts Medicaid on a better financial footing for the people it was intended to serve.

They say 18,200 seniors will die from losing automatic access to drug subsidies. That’s not how this works. These seniors can still apply and get help. The letter assumes no one re-enrolls. This is just updating eligibility, like every program does. They say 13,300 will die if we repeal a nursing home staffing mandate. But that mandate isn’t funded, and many nursing homes, especially in rural areas, can’t meet it. Keeping it would force closures. Repealing it actually keeps care available.

Now here’s what the bill really does: It protects Medicaid for seniors, kids, people with disabilities, and pregnant women. It cuts out waste, fraud, and ineligible use. And yes — it brings back work requirements. The work requirement provision simply says if you’re healthy, not in school, and have no kids, you have to work, volunteer, or train 20 hours a week to keep benefits. According to polling, 81% of Americans think that sounds fair.

So, no Bernie, we are not killing people. We are preserving government programs for people who actually need them and Americans agree with our efforts. Fear mongering is not going to work against common sense.

THE PERFECT GIFT FOR PRO-2A DADS

[ENDEX FITNESS](https://endexfitness.com/products/side-winder-holster)

The Sidewinder Holster from ENDEX—engineered for function, comfort, and serious EDC support.

✔️ 5 carry positions for compact & sub-compact pistols
✔️ 6 integrated mag holsters
✔️ Ambidextrous: capable of right or left hand draw
✔️ Fully removable—fits with any pants or shorts (not just Endex gear)

Best part? Every purchase helps fuel the conservative movement. 100% of profits support Republican campaigns across the country—and since it’s official Dan Crenshaw campaign merch, it’s tax-free.

[GET 25% OFF SITEWIDE NOW](https://endexfitness.com/products/side-winder-holster)

SOCIAL MEDIA

[Some things are obviously wrong. Puberty blockers for kids, double mastectomies on healthy girls, chemical castration, and enabling mentally troubled people to mutilate their bodies in the name of “gender affirmation.” It’s not health care. It’s twisted activism and brainwashing by an industry set on creating lifelong patients. And it all ends with the Crenshaw Amendment.](https://x.com/DanCrenshawTX/status/1928505480265273523)

[Big win for kids. Secretary Kennedy is forcing hospitals to explain how they get “informed consent” from minors — something kids are clearly incapable of providing. Dr. Oz is exposing the money behind it all. Between these actions by President Trump’s administration and the Crenshaw Amendment cutting off federal funds, we’re ending this barbaric ritual.](https://x.com/DanCrenshawTX/status/1928882415558127640)

[Pastor Dave Welch was called home to the Lord on Sunday. He’s been my friend and mentor since 2018 and I will miss him deeply. Pastor Dave was a tireless servant of God, relentlessly committed to uniting the faith community and strengthening the bonds we share. We often use the word “leader” too loosely, but Pastor Dave was the true embodiment of a leader. He inspired everyone around him with his unshakable faith in Christ and his fearless determination to confront the evils in our culture and government. His passing is a tremendous loss for our community. Please join me in praying for Pastor Dave and his family.](https://x.com/DanCrenshawTX/status/1929621011344904651)

[The latest projections from the Congressional Budget Office show that my amendment banning taxpayer-funded gender transitions will result in more than $2.5 billion in savings over the next decade. Out of over $1 TRILLION in savings from House Commerce Republicans.](https://x.com/DanCrenshawTX/status/1930399949146972381)

NEWS

NOTUS: [Transgender People May Soon Be Barred From Using Federal Funds for Gender-Affirming Care](https://www.notus.org/congress/transgender-federal-fund-ban)

FOX NEWS: [ICE storms cartel-run nightclub, arrests 72 migrants including murder suspect](https://www.foxnews.com/us/ice-storms-cartel-run-nightclub-arrests-72-migrants-including-murder-suspect)

WASHINGTON TIMES:[Trump administration turns up heat on hospitals with financial oversight of gender-affirming care](https://www.washingtontimes.com/news/2025/may/28/trump-administration-turns-heat-hospitals-financial-oversight-gender/)

That's it for this week's campaign brief. Thank you for reading.

In service,

[Congressman and Former Navy SEAL](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/d696e47168a8f315)

Dan Crenshaw

[CONTRIBUTE NOW >>](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/d696e47168a8f315)

These updates are only possible with the generous gift of supporters like you! If you'd like to donate by check, please make your check payable and mail to:

Dan Crenshaw for Congress, 12645 Memorial Drive, STE F1
Box 211
Houston, TX 77024

[Twitter](https://twitter.com/DanCrenshawTX)
[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/CrenshawforCongress/)
[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/dancrenshawtx/)

No longer want to receive these emails? [Unsubscribe](https://manage.kmail-lists.com/subscriptions/unsubscribe?a=S4BaSF&c=01J1QTVQWPYECZHVSD48W6BZXF&k=d7a252b5a9aa2f11f013663142d1414b&m=01JX59FTNMTD18CKMP7A7D0T9A&r=01JX5DNS14ECS7A1A6QP3MGJBG).
Team Crenshaw, 12645 Memorial Drive, STE F1, Box 211, Houston, TX 77024

name: Deb Haaland
subject: It’s National Trails Day! 🥾
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
I can’t walk this path without you.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=2453%2E400544%2EyMMYL9)
Hey! It's Deb.
I’m emailing because today is National Trails Day, a celebration of our beloved hiking trails and the stewards who care for them.
Each of us has a responsibility to preserve our air, water, and natural landscapes so they can be enjoyed by future generations. It’s what I’ve fought for in Congress, as a former Secretary of the Interior, and what I’ll do as the next governor of New Mexico.
**[Before you head out to enjoy the outdoors today, can you pitch in your very first $5 donation to our campaign? I’d be so grateful.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250607_1_trails?amount=5&refcode=em20250607-2453&refcode2=2453_400544_yMMYL9&akid=2453%2E400544%2EyMMYL9)**
[****](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250607_1_trails?amount=5&refcode=em20250607-2453&refcode2=2453_400544_yMMYL9&akid=2453%2E400544%2EyMMYL9)_Overlooking the sparkling blue-green waterfalls stewarded by the Havasupai Tribe_
**I’m incredibly proud that we added _hundreds more miles_ to the National Trails System during my time leading the Department of the Interior.** Protecting our trails ensures that families today and in future generations get to enjoy these breathtaking landscapes together. I still cherish the memories I made hiking with my dad when I was a young girl. To this day, I never pass up an opportunity to enjoy the trails here in New Mexico and all across the country.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250607_1_trails?amount=5&refcode=em20250607-2453&refcode2=2453_400544_yMMYL9&akid=2453%2E400544%2EyMMYL9)_Enjoying a stunning view of Bears Ears National Monument_
Much like hiking across our nation’s beloved trails, our campaign for a fairer New Mexico will be a challenging journey. I have no doubt we’ll face some tough climbs along the way, but I know we can brave them together by lacing up our boots and working as a team. That’s why, before you hit the trails or head outdoors today, I have to ask:
**[Will you make your first $5 contribution to grow our grassroots campaign for New Mexico? I can’t walk this path without you by my side.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250607_1_trails?amount=5&refcode=em20250607-2453&refcode2=2453_400544_yMMYL9&akid=2453%2E400544%2EyMMYL9)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250607_1_trails?amount=5&refcode=em20250607-2453&refcode2=2453_400544_yMMYL9&akid=2453%2E400544%2EyMMYL9)**
See you out there,
Deb
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250607-1&t=2&refcode2=2453_400544_yMMYL9&akid=2453%2E400544%2EyMMYL9)**
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=3&akid=2453%2E400544%2EyMMYL9)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=4&akid=2453%2E400544%2EyMMYL9)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO

To hold this chamber in 2026, we’ll need to ensure we have the resources to compete with Trump and MAGA billionaires. [That starts with early investments from you. We can’t let that happen. A $7 donation to the DLCC could help fuel efforts to elect state Democrats everywhere, including:
✅ Targeted digital ads for our candidates
✅ On-the-ground staff in key districts
✅ Organizing and mobilization efforts, like canvasses and phone banks

name: Letitia James
subject: Why I fight for New York families
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY 2026
body:
From Brooklyn to the courtroom, I've never stopped standing up for New Yorkers.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109161408/550194483/-1997846894?refcode=jtk1957-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWE0N2FjOC1iMDQzLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=arI-TMTFnRWG4T2tPo7DQ17KfVn3W2X3tqP6WGKbIB4=)
Peter, I grew up in a Brooklyn neighborhood filled with working families just like mine.

I didn't grow up with power or privilege. But I grew up with public schools, with libraries, and with parks. I grew up in a community that looked out for one another, even when no one else would.

I spent my childhood escaping the summer heat in the cool quiet of our local library, reading about worlds I wanted to help build. I saw firsthand how policies and systems could fail entire communities, especially when no one in power was willing to speak up.

So I decided I would be that voice.

When I became New York’s attorney general – the first Black woman elected statewide in New York history – I didn’t take that title lightly. I took it as a responsibility. I promised to protect the most vulnerable, to hold the most powerful accountable, and to never, ever back down from doing what’s right.

**I’ve gone after corporations that put profit before people. I’ve stood up for reproductive freedom, immigrant families, LGBTQ+ youth, and workers across our state. And yes – I’ve held Donald Trump and his administration accountable in court.**

But I don’t do this work for headlines. I do it for every kid sitting in a public library dreaming about what’s possible. For every family struggling to make ends meet. For every New Yorker who needs someone in their corner.

**And I do it with the strength of people like you standing with me.** **[If you believe in this work just as much as I do, I hope you'll consider donating to my campaign today. Every dollar you give helps us keep fighting – and winning.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109161409/550194485/-2022258813?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1957-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWE0N2FjOC1iMDQzLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=arI-TMTFnRWG4T2tPo7DQ17KfVn3W2X3tqP6WGKbIB4=)**

clean_body: From Brooklyn to the courtroom, I've never stopped standing up for New Yorkers. | | | = Peter, I grew up in a Brooklyn neighborhood filled with working families just like mine. I didn't grow up with power or privilege. But I grew up with public schools, with libraries, and with parks. I grew up in a community that looked out for one another, even when no one else would. I spent my childhood escaping the summer heat in the cool quiet of our local library, reading about worlds I wanted to help build. I saw firsthand how policies and systems could fail entire communities, especially when no one in power was willing to speak up. So I decided I would be that voice. When I became New York’s attorney general – the first Black woman elected statewide in New York history – I didn’t take that title lightly. I took it as a responsibility. I promised to protect the most vulnerable, to hold the most powerful accountable, and to never, ever back down from doing what’s right. I’ve gone after corporations that put profit before people. I’ve stood up for reproductive freedom, immigrant families, LGBTQ+ youth, and workers across our state. And yes – I’ve held Donald Trump and his administration accountable in court. But I don’t do this work for headlines. I do it for every kid sitting in a public library dreaming about what’s possible. For every family struggling to make ends meet. For every New Yorker who needs someone in their corner. And I do it with the strength of people like you standing with me. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you. – Letitia James | With so many tough and crucial fights ahead, I am counting on people like you to fuel my fight for justice, progress, and true equality. Will you make a monthly donation to make sure I can continue using the full power of the Attorney General's office to make a difference for everyday people and families? | | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. James for NY 2026 PO Box 20656 Brooklyn, NY 11202 United States | | Paid for by James for NY 2026

name: Chris Pappas
subject: The spirit of Pride
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
We’ve come so far since I was a kid, but it wasn’t always easy.
Peter,
**I’m Chris Pappas, Democratic candidate for U.S. Senate in New Hampshire.** Heartland Patriots said I could reach out to you today with a special message about Pride.
Growing up in New Hampshire, I often wondered if there would be a place for me here — if I’d be able to live openly and authentically in the state I love. I certainly never imagined I could one day be elected to public office as my authentic self.
But after I finished college, I came home and ran for the state legislature because I wanted to give back to the community that had given me so much.
**And somewhat to my surprise, not only did my community accept me, they gave me their trust and sent me to Concord to serve them in the legislature.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89390?refcode=em20250607-8990&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8990%2E614464%2E-YorN6) _Celebrating with supporters on Election Night 2018_
I’ll never forget the first speech I made from the State House floor. At the time marriage equality was far from the law of the land, and the legislature was debating a bill that would have prohibited New Hampshire from recognizing same-sex marriages performed in other states.
I urged my colleagues, Republicans and Democrats alike, to vote this bill down.
I told them that it ran counter to the “Live Free or Die” spirit we’re so proud of in New Hampshire. And that we shouldn’t be legislating based on fear or hate or trying to punish people for who they love.
Unfortunately the bill passed, and we lost that fight. **But we didn’t give up.**
We persevered, and not long after we passed a new bill recognizing civil unions between same-sex partners. And a few years after that, New Hampshire became the first state in the nation to legalize marriage equality through legislative action.
**Then in 2018 I was elected to Congress as New Hampshire’s first openly gay member** — part of a rainbow wave that ushered in the most pro-equality majority in congressional history.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89390?refcode=em20250607-8990&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=8990%2E614464%2E-YorN6) _Delivering my victory speech on Election Night 2018_
**That’s the spirit of Pride, Peter.** It’s not just about celebrating — it’s about persevering in the face of what can seem like overwhelming odds and refusing to give up, even after a devastating loss.
**And although we’ve come a long way since I was growing up, we have to keep persevering today.** Because right now anti-equality extremists are renewing their attacks on LGBTQ+ rights, targeting trans kids, banning books, and spreading fear to divide us.
That’s one of the reasons I’m running for U.S. Senate. New Hampshire needs a voice in Washington who will stand strong for equality, dignity, and freedom — a voice who will continue to uphold our state’s “Live Free or Die” motto.
**I’ll never forget the trust my community has placed in me over the years, and I’ll _always_ keep up the fight to make sure every single person in New Hampshire and our country has the freedom to live openly, authentically, and with pride.**
**[If you’re with me, I hope you’ll split a donation to support my campaign and Heartland Patriots today. New Hampshire is going to be one of the most closely-watched races in the country, and I’m counting on your help to win.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89390?refcode=em20250607-8990&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=8990%2E614464%2E-YorN6)**

clean_body: We’ve come so far since I was a kid, but it wasn’t always easy. Peter, I’m Chris Pappas, Democratic candidate for U.S. Senate in New Hampshire. Heartland Patriots said I could reach out to you today with a special message about Pride. Growing up in New Hampshire, I often wondered if there would be a place for me here — if I’d be able to live openly and authentically in the state I love. I certainly never imagined I could one day be elected to public office as my authentic self. But after I finished college, I came home and ran for the state legislature because I wanted to give back to the community that had given me so much. And somewhat to my surprise, not only did my community accept me, they gave me their trust and sent me to Concord to serve them in the legislature. Celebrating with supporters on Election Night 2018 I’ll never forget the first speech I made from the State House floor. At the time marriage equality was far from the law of the land, and the legislature was debating a bill that would have prohibited New Hampshire from recognizing same-sex marriages performed in other states. I urged my colleagues, Republicans and Democrats alike, to vote this bill down. I told them that it ran counter to the “Live Free or Die” spirit we’re so proud of in New Hampshire. And that we shouldn’t be legislating based on fear or hate or trying to punish people for who they love. Unfortunately the bill passed, and we lost that fight. But we didn’t give up. We persevered, and not long after we passed a new bill recognizing civil unions between same-sex partners. And a few years after that, New Hampshire became the first state in the nation to legalize marriage equality through legislative action. Then in 2018 I was elected to Congress as New Hampshire’s first openly gay member — part of a rainbow wave that ushered in the most pro-equality majority in congressional history. Delivering my victory speech on Election Night 2018 That’s the spirit of Pride, Peter. It’s not just about celebrating — it’s about persevering in the face of what can seem like overwhelming odds and refusing to give up, even after a devastating loss. And although we’ve come a long way since I was growing up, we have to keep persevering today. Because right now anti-equality extremists are renewing their attacks on LGBTQ+ rights, targeting trans kids, banning books, and spreading fear to divide us. That’s one of the reasons I’m running for U.S. Senate. New Hampshire needs a voice in Washington who will stand strong for equality, dignity, and freedom — a voice who will continue to uphold our state’s “Live Free or Die” motto. I’ll never forget the trust my community has placed in me over the years, and I’ll always keep up the fight to make sure every single person in New Hampshire and our country has the freedom to live openly, authentically, and with pride. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: We’ve come a long way, Peter. But we’re not done yet. So let’s keep persevering together. In solidarity, Chris Pappas | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.

name: Seth Magaziner
subject: more than 90% of crime scenes
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Magaziner for Congress
body:
Seth is in Congress to fight for the middle class and those working hard to join it. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.sethmagaziner.com/p/9_n7o1XMskam_GoKXFDAdg2?unsubscribedata=PrYviaXjuim4PKMSJ9oYukd1wScUe2b4AgYqXr8fMQ9CJbdEBOHM1PLrjZPrMRNXX%2BSW%2BvwZH%2BrsX%2FEqc%2FH5c%2FrfY1uDaRlEEgVJa%2FktaR7rjZcVdsUoJ57bd1%2FDJtQIPWdH%2B%2BwP7Wi%2BYDSqMku9q2XCWGC9j9SpTCgxg66wpel6Bpx79KamkzJMQK3bmop3nHuMTx7XMCN08UWlxY3hJAb0om%2BOsVmFGbOIiRS8Z4pc1vDol3nQdZGuLHdcqVLxdSxwLSYbYXUzWB1pX4o8BsdgwiGgBvSrdSYkkIdP7mpEol20lj3%2FUqjPY65lJ9aiERLQQPXRM5s%2B5aHUSSVnJXgjDHO5w%2FU8EvABXsrBQyN1%2BZMqDhJWmUwgRhmJBxy8b6VDV8X4Rv%2FAcrjUCmlZejylBiQaUvFpPmbY28RlotRWztJrIcfRbpkOQFc6%2Fg1b)
---
| |
---
Peter,

This month is Gun Violence Awareness Month, a time to recommit ourselves to taking action to keep people safe from senseless violence.

More than 90% of firearms recovered at crime scenes in the U.S. can be traced back to just 5% of gun dealers. We must crack down on rogue dealers selling guns illegally to those who shouldn’t have them. Lives depend on it.

**That’s why earlier this week, I reintroduced a bill to crack down on these bad actors, give law enforcement the tools to hold them accountable, and help stop the flow of illegal firearms used in incidents of violence.**

This bill targets those who knowingly arm criminals – strengthening penalties for dealers who knowingly break the law, increasing the number of Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms and Explosives inspections, giving the DOJ more flexibility with the issuing of firearm licenses, and more.

Peter – the impact of gun violence is felt right here in Rhode Island.

_In our schools.

In our churches.

In our grocery stores._

Gun violence reaches every corner of American life, and this is an epidemic that has gone on far too long. We owe it to our kids to build a country where safety is a right, not a privilege.

These tragedies are preventable, but only if we stand together in holding these bad actors accountable. If you’re with me in this fight — I hope you’ll consider chipping in to help fuel this work.

**[If you’re able, please consider making a contribution here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109162681/550197916/1152910433?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_SM_20250607_FR_GunViolence_0_1MO_SethMagaziner_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODkwZGI2Zi1iMzQzLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h2b-8cq-IznNuBco36tioj_NBEADyJU3lVtHoRpSh7o=)**

Thank you for standing with me,

Seth

clean_body: Seth is in Congress to fight for the middle class and those working hard to join it. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Peter, This month is Gun Violence Awareness Month, a time to recommit ourselves to taking action to keep people safe from senseless violence. More than 90% of firearms recovered at crime scenes in the U.S. can be traced back to just 5% of gun dealers. We must crack down on rogue dealers selling guns illegally to those who shouldn’t have them. Lives depend on it. That’s why earlier this week, I reintroduced a bill to crack down on these bad actors, give law enforcement the tools to hold them accountable, and help stop the flow of illegal firearms used in incidents of violence. This bill targets those who knowingly arm criminals – strengthening penalties for dealers who knowingly break the law, increasing the number of Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms and Explosives inspections, giving the DOJ more flexibility with the issuing of firearm licenses, and more. Peter – the impact of gun violence is felt right here in Rhode Island. In our schools. In our churches. In our grocery stores. Gun violence reaches every corner of American life, and this is an epidemic that has gone on far too long. We owe it to our kids to build a country where safety is a right, not a privilege. These tragedies are preventable, but only if we stand together in holding these bad actors accountable. If you’re with me in this fight — I hope you’ll consider chipping in to help fuel this work. = Thank you for standing with me, Seth | = PAID FOR BY Magaziner for Congress PO BOX 40993, PROVIDENCE, RI 02940 If you’d like to unsubscribe, . You can also =**.

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d6e32903-fff3-458d-8114-e904737db676?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Democrats recently announced a two-year, 20-million dollar plan named SAM--an acronym for "Speaking with American Men"--to figure out why in the SAM hill men are running from the Democrat party faster than Joe Biden's ice cream melts on a summer day.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..BQ0mOgAiHOIMEKwjqHXcFxQinoShMQOL4J375cJrOlw?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=165354368)
The Dems keep losing when they run inauthentic, robotic candidates. And their solution is to pay millions to fund a massive study, which is spearheaded by Ilyse Hogue, a radical left-wing FEMALE who ran a pro-abortion group for over a decade. This study focuses on learning the modern "male syntax," though they would be better off going to a rural diner if they want to hear real answers from someone with actual balls.
Allow me to explain why the Democrats are paying activists millions to research whether the sky is blue.
**[During an interview with Politico](https://substack.com/redirect/9425727b-0641-4411-973b-8e6ff3601982?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , Hogue said Democrats can't win elections without, "speaking the language that young men are speaking." Using focus groups to figure this out would be like paying chemists to figure out the best way to change a tire.
Therein lies the problem. Democrats have become the party of the moneyed intelligentsia, incapable of communicating with common Americans because they have spent the last four decades isolating themselves inside ivory towers.
**A message from our sponsor (piece continues below)**
* * *
**[Together with Goldco](https://substack.com/redirect/8588617e-da75-4408-ac1f-14c07694705f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8588617e-da75-4408-ac1f-14c07694705f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
# **Trump 's Push For America First**
What we are seeing right now is truly historic.
President Trump has been pushing the limits on what is possible. I haven't seen anything like this since President Ronald Reagan.
But with this unbelievable push for an American First agenda, comes a few problems. Well, as President Trump said in a recent interview I had with him...
"There could be a little disruption. What we're doing is building a foundation for the future."
If you want to learn more about **[Trump's Great American Reset](https://substack.com/redirect/88a59eea-88a8-497c-963a-176fbd4bcb41?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**, go ahead read this **[great article](https://substack.com/redirect/88a59eea-88a8-497c-963a-176fbd4bcb41?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that just went up. It's filled with some valuable information about what's in store for America, and what we could potentially be up against.
**[Read The Great American Reset now.](https://substack.com/redirect/88a59eea-88a8-497c-963a-176fbd4bcb41?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Read The Great American Reset](https://substack.com/redirect/8588617e-da75-4408-ac1f-14c07694705f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Yours Truly,
**SEAN HANNITY**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8588617e-da75-4408-ac1f-14c07694705f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* * *
**(Continued)**
They think they are morally superior for saying things like "walls don't work" while the border is flooded by millions of unvetted individuals from all over the world. They claim their leader is of sound mind when the whole nation watched him bumble and mumble through public events for four years. They told us to "trust the science" when the "science" did nothing to stem the tide on the Coronavirus, and side effects undoubtedly harmed an entire generation of young Americans who have seen scant economic opportunities for the entirety of their adult lives. They claimed inflation was "transient" while the price of eggs went through our citizens' leaky roofs. This is exactly what gave Trump the opportunity to carve out the Democrats' working class base. Compared to the Dems' carefully tailored corporate duck speak, Trump's matter-of-fact communication style goes down like a cold beer on a hot day.
**[As the New York Times so boldly summarized](https://substack.com/redirect/21b3bf16-1576-40cd-84fa-b97314628ce6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) ,** "Fierce ideological debates over policies -- whether to push for a stricter stand on immigration, defend transgender rights less forcefully or embrace anti-corporate economic populism -- are already playing out on Capitol Hill and on the nascent 2028 campaign trail."
Here's a tip for Democrats: your immigration policies need to be stricter, your push for transgender rights has alienated average Americans who just want their kids to piss in peace, and the "anti-corporatism" you speak of stemmed from the fact that American corporations have thoroughly screwed over the American worker for over 40 years.
So forget the studies. Ditch the pollsters and the activists whose understanding of the American populace comes from Netflix and MSNBC. It's time to go back to the basics. Sack up and start talking like normal people rather than robots walking on overpriced eggshells--eggshells their corporate overlords cracked to make omelettes that fill their bellies while the rest of Americans starve.

name: Jahana Hayes
subject: People are demanding answers, and Republicans are nowhere to be found.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jahana Hayes
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109163161/550199561/-1295403277?refcode=AU_JH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250607_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTIwZTY1Ny1iNDQzLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=usP2EEzHMOCPt92QEejZrDrumg6BNn5N7r-4pzAsm6U=&emci=5520e657-b443-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=5a20e657-b443-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=15529135) | Team, some of the most respected news outlets have reported that constituents and voters around the country are voicing their frustrations about their Republican members of Congress ghosting their communities. Closed-door town halls. Invite-only online meetings. The people are demanding answers, and Republicans are seemingly nowhere to be found. **That is not the way we do things around here.** Earlier this year, I participated in a bipartisan town hall on _CNN_ for the entire nation to see. We are consistently holding community events in union halls and community centers around the district, including one just last week in Kent. **[Whether I am in a room of 10 people or 1000 people, I am going to be the same me — I will call it like it is and fight for what is right. Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. name: Gloria Giffords
subject: My daughter, Gabby
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
It’s a surprise!
#

Hi friend,
My name is Gloria Giffords. I’m Gabby Giffords’s mom. I stand in awe of my daughter.
I know every mom will tell you her child is perfect, but Gabby is just about as close as it comes.
Growing up, she was always a good kid. She was a loyal friend. And to know Gabby Giffords is to know one thing: _Don’t ever -- not for one moment -- underestimate her._
If she thought she could do something, she put her mind to it until it was done. And to anyone who thought she wasn’t capable of something...well, she quickly proved them wrong.
Our nation has seen what Gabby is capable of since that awful morning in January 2011. It’s been a long road to recovery, but she keeps fighting -- not only for herself, but for families all across our country.
She inspires me every day, and I know I’m not alone.
**There’s a reason why I’m reaching out: Gabby’s birthday is this Sunday, and I wanted to surprise her.**
[**So I want to ask: Will you sign Gabby’s birthday card? You can even leave a personal note if you’d like >>**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_q22025_gabbybirthday//?source=em250607-1-b&refcode2=10553.3935704.katTcP&akid=10553%2E3935704%2EkatTcP)
[](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_q22025_gabbybirthday/?t=1&akid=10553%2E3935704%2EkatTcP)
Growing up, Gabby never asked for anything extravagant (unless you count that one time she wanted a horse). But I know that, more than anything, she wants to make the world safer from gun violence.
And I know she won’t stop fighting until we can achieve that. Together, this movement can help Gabby continue fighting for a safer future.
[**Will you help me celebrate Gabby’s birthday by signing her card today?**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_q22025_gabbybirthday//?source=em250607-1-b&refcode2=10553.3935704.katTcP&akid=10553%2E3935704%2EkatTcP)
**[SIGN THE CARD](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_q22025_gabbybirthday//?source=em250607-1-b&refcode2=10553.3935704.katTcP&akid=10553%2E3935704%2EkatTcP)**
This proud mom thanks you for all you’ve done for my Gabby and for this movement. Thank you.
Sincerely,
Gloria Giffords
**[DONATE](https://go.giffords.org/go/62200?t=2&akid=10553%2E3935704%2EkatTcP)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=10553%2E3935704%2EkatTcP) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: we lose Georgia, we lose EVERYTHING
body:
Georgia has been the tipping point in some of the biggest political fights of the last decade. Next election WILL be the same.
We've JUST learned that Trump’s allies are plotting a full-scale power grab in the MOST CRUCIAL SWING STATE of Georgia... and it’s ALREADY in motion!!!
A new report just revealed that Gov. Brian Kemp is quietly working to boost Trump’s preferred Senate candidate.
The goal? Flip Georgia red and cement Republican control of the Senate.

name: David Hogg
subject: I want to be transparent
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Here's why we're doing this:
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250607-1&t=1&akid=2226%2E587540%2EIBWszl)
Peter,
Leaders We Deserve recently announced a $20 million effort to primary out-of-touch, ineffective incumbent House Democrats to replace them with generational young leaders. **[If you can, I’m asking you to chip in $5 to power this urgent work.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250607_1_transparent?refcode=em20250607-2226&amount=5&refcode2=2226_587540_IBWszl&akid=2226%2E587540%2EIBWszl)**
I want to be transparent about why we made this announcement when we did – and why your support today will determine whether or not we can put young people on the ballot in 2026.
Right now, there are too many politicians occupying safe blue seats who aren’t putting up enough of a fight against Donald Trump. They’re failing to meet the moment, and it’s leaving more and more voters disillusioned about what Democrats even stand for.
**But as you read this, there are young, inspiring, and brave leaders out there who are in the process of deciding whether to run for office.** If we can demonstrate that there’s a loud, powerful, and well-funded movement who’s ready to support their campaigns with everything we’ve got, then maybe – _just maybe_ – they’ll decide to get into the arena and lead our party into the future. But if they decide their campaigns are over before they even begin, there won’t be any Gen Z leaders for us to vote for come Election Day in 2026.
**That’s why our work needs to happen now, Peter.** Next spring or next fall will be too little, too late. It’s why Leaders We Deserve recently made our big announcement about supporting young progressives who decide to challenge asleep-at-the-wheel House Democrats in safe seats. And it’s why we’re counting on you to commit to this work today:
**[Will you donate $5 to elect the next generation of young leaders who will rebuild our party? What we do right now will determine whether Democrats are in a position to win back the House in 2026.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250607_1_transparent?refcode=em20250607-2226&amount=5&refcode2=2226_587540_IBWszl&akid=2226%2E587540%2EIBWszl)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250607_1_transparent?amount=5&refcode=em20250607-2226&refcode2=2226_587540_IBWszl&akid=2226%2E587540%2EIBWszl)**
Thanks for being a part of this,
David Hogg
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250607-1&t=2&refcode2=2226_587540_IBWszl&akid=2226%2E587540%2EIBWszl)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=2226%2E587540%2EIBWszl)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2226%2E587540%2EIBWszl)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003

subject: Trump's collapse is here, y'all: >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hey folks, it's James Carville.

I warned y'all _weeks ago_ that Trump's collapse was just around the bend, and boy was I right.

I said this guy was flailing, he was muckin' everything up, he was surrounding himself with weirdos and cranks... and now look:

Trump's poll numbers are in the toilet, he's dealing with MASSIVE protests across the country, and Democrats are _winning_ special elections left and right. **Nothin' -- and I mean _nothin'_ \-- is gonna come easy against Trump and the Republicans, but I'm fired the hell up!**

**[If you're feelin' it too, then let's hit MAGA where it _really_ hurts: Will you say "hell yes, James, I'm fired up too!" and pitch in $5 or more to the DSCC to elect Democrats and flip the Senate blue?](https://go.dscc.org/go/21369?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250607-JamesCarville-TrumpCollapseWarningFR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250607-JamesCarville-TrumpCollapseWarningFR-Pros-sl1&akid=20418%2E9716520%2E0-piEF)**

Look, Trump is giving us one hell of an opening, but it won't mean _squat_ if Democrats like us just sit on our thumbs for the next two years. And that's for one simple reason:

Winning. Elections. Is. EVERYTHING.

How do we _stop_ Trump and the Republicans from ripping up whole agencies and threatening the economy? From undermining voting rights and attacking the free press? **We win elections, that's how --_and this next one's gonna be a BIG one._**

**[We've got to make this count, y'all, so I'm asking you directly: Will you pitch in $5 to the DSCC to fight for a strong Democratic Senate majority? Any amount before the deadline will help stick it to Trump's MAGA cronies >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/21369?amount=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250607-JamesCarville-TrumpCollapseWarningFR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250607-JamesCarville-TrumpCollapseWarningFR-Pros-sl1&akid=20418%2E9716520%2E0-piEF)**

name: Team Crow
subject: Dark money is flooding our politics — Jason’s fighting back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Jason believes that the government should work for the people — not for the ultra-wealthy, dark money donors, or corporate lobbyists.

But right now, the power of special interests is drowning out the voices of everyday Americans. That’s why Jason is working to pass the End Dark Money Act and partnering with End Citizens United to stand up for Coloradans who are sick and tired of a system rigged for the wealthy.

Here’s the truth: Since Citizens United , dark money groups have spent more than $1 billion to secretly influence our elections.

Wealthy mega-donors like Elon Musk can spend unlimited sums to sway voters and buy power — all while keeping their identities hidden.

Jason’s bill would expose that corruption. The End Dark Money Act would finally hold shady “social welfare” groups accountable, close loopholes, and force them to disclose their donors or lose their tax-exempt status.

Jason’s been fighting this battle since Day One in Congress. And he’s not backing down now. But he can’t take on the ultra-wealthy class alone. He’s counting on this grassroots team to stand with him.

clean_body: Jason Crow For Congress [] Jason believes that the government should work for the people — not for the ultra-wealthy, dark money donors, or corporate lobbyists. But right now, the power of special interests is drowning out the voices of everyday Americans. That’s why Jason is working to pass the End Dark Money Act and partnering with End Citizens United to stand up for Coloradans who are sick and tired of a system rigged for the wealthy. Here’s the truth: Since Citizens United , dark money groups have spent more than $1 billion to secretly influence our elections. Wealthy mega-donors like Elon Musk can spend unlimited sums to sway voters and buy power — all while keeping their identities hidden. Jason’s bill would expose that corruption. The End Dark Money Act would finally hold shady “social welfare” groups accountable, close loopholes, and force them to disclose their donors or lose their tax-exempt status. Jason’s been fighting this battle since Day One in Congress. And he’s not backing down now. But he can’t take on the ultra-wealthy class alone. body:
We must fight this travel ban and protect our communities from racist attacks. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWS51GdgTOpMx_o523etmvfUteZcXUTJ9PUFoQvgJ7SmqZsdL5fLeAFXEkj1xuUX_RSLPG-t2RoRl_LCfjRMdoJliVZ8l2AXZBdZxRrVTmudv8FihBXxWmSIxDTBqwQDFNanBm3rv00FZEkjOZ7gaaKfvlT72Ml9vl8b0SvYmbVM5o4rn77ubDZAP1144gb7H8/4h5/T_QjO3KIRRSPvMiMoEoEkQ/h0/h001.4U-npRjrOR-FXKEDR_XWIRyLG-x_nUznKXgNfK6Tewk)
---
Friend, This week, Trump released an executive order implementing his racist, unconstitutional Muslim and African ban. This policy will separate families and endanger people’s lives—overwhelmingly targeting Black and brown people from countries in Africa, the Middle East, and the Caribbean. We must fight back against this expanded travel ban and the white nationalism it’s rooted in. We’ve defeated this ban before, and we must come together to defeat it again. **In Congress, I’m co-leading the**** _NO BAN Act_****, which would limit presidents’ ability to issue travel bans.** It would also strengthen anti-discrimination protections and require that any suspension of entry into the United States be narrowly tailored, backed by credible evidence, and subject to appropriate consultation with Congress. [**Will you sign on today to fight back against Trump’s racist travel ban and urge Congress to pass the**** _NO BAN Act_****?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm381rcfdHkIQD_K7aziRYYN5ptAFwUIvdIUuYIYDICyAYiEu-wdVdNOb9soibMyJ_VsmcPIl7WFrbX2qoTg4zTin2Cpdn-x-_cC0CmkTphPoivhy83Od7UIBCm8vhd1jmiK1cRplfVj0P6l6eT6xsKPSilK5yTh8qgZ8nufMLOCCwmtrsdsVlg6oKDU_a0jI0jNLeh3Y2ptv7MK41wf3Qk3DPSS2qvJm7B6BgdQgMHqO7lkUNGYeJll3QeWqOrn7EuODStixDPAeDU_Udt13nRZlD_dPvbg2TK0T_cEAjODUP4ASqMXyDiZwiUEm4ZkuDi5TYK13C7zvRJgHLAmOZnUUS0zovR8kaW2isdZVnAx9DvXd1BK1lCOZ58vosN_6bKDrp3hRNSL6TkF-NF4RT11F/4h5/T_QjO3KIRRSPvMiMoEoEkQ/h1/h001.TL5F5AnELHzWEiVyDSJRSYPbxUwI5bsy1YumTpE85jA) | [SIGN ON](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm381rcfdHkIQD_K7aziRYYN5ptAFwUIvdIUuYIYDICyAYiEu-wdVdNOb9soibMyJ_VsmcPIl7WFrbX2qoTg4zTin2Cpdn-x-_cC0CmkTphPoivhy83Od7UIBCm8vhd1jmiK1cRplfVj0P6l6eT6xsKPSYF9tS43GuSuBzLoxF6oQ3NNlIPaFEBUOqyTsD7BFz63EIDbs7Vy99m6pdLY6e-_bWk8FypUbTT_w9chSWprjgJuNo5pTiweCquL9tYIhFQi9u0swkfg7o1a48i6IZNrlE0j-gKmCcPE5_eiakCOSYbWC_uwVFICLkW-pM-LEX1c-gxKwgRXL0vkR9jTd7PuLvtnOcXS646c0ScbZzXPgFK4BdFChxxEto9Yyoy4l1Pg_gfRA4l4VGLbUxgNpQdzr/4h5/T_QjO3KIRRSPvMiMoEoEkQ/h2/h001.S51rBUWabOaFQJo7or-YGu23JC-uKsgq-VZ7NlAqYa4)

Thank you for taking action. Together we will continue fighting for our rights, our shared humanity, and a better future where we can all thrive.
You can learn more about the travel ban and what countries and people it applies to on [this page](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMVspLR7dEUYdBDIY81da9UuhFJTtnlXBn6kIz4T-OoYcGy2EjBEoqgGLSZO67Nk9K1BJJFvww2cbACAEpffUdDmyojrLRbLmI8As3ntEGVnnHOgLW99k4BDE2186w5bEZ7D0OUaNCcOrxHPxDbeY3h6_tJ5ks2hpgjcuDg5fFklOAJwt1bzQmRE1oUXf_6cpdqtZX_53-hi1921hGA_6KiGdkHCh-RKZu8xxSPpMGPSiSHSbHJGsGK-du1wnOQ-lGpEN6Eajx7kWZKxBWRHC4RednRITgUMoObh8QyVYcOb0dMa7JQnnWx1dtE-PyLyUav4DbyAkfpIW-jPRDG_eVmc/4h5/T_QjO3KIRRSPvMiMoEoEkQ/h3/h001.EIH8fxo_sKDhbW_0sFQHcLY-N5T5gRR0UMN3L7A7GvU) from the National Immigration Law Center.
In solidarity,
Rashida
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Rashida Tlaib******
Date: Fri, Jun 6, 2025
Subject: [sign] Fight Trump’s Muslim and African ban
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
Trump just issued an unconstitutional and racist travel ban—attacking countries with Black, brown, and Muslim populations.
This is a shameful expansion of his first term’s Muslim and African ban, now targeting people from 19 countries. Rooted in white nationalism, this policy will separate families and put people’s lives in danger.
We must reject ideologies and policies that seek to divide us. All humans have equal rights and worth, and we will keep pushing back against the ongoing dehumanization of our communities.
We defeated this ban before, and we can come together to defeat it again. One way we can fight back is by passing the **_NO BAN Act_** in Congress. I’m co-leading this legislation that would **strengthen anti-discrimination protections** and **limit presidents’ ability to issue travel bans**.
****[**Can you sign on today to oppose this racist travel ban and demand Congress pass the _NO BAN Act_?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm381rcfdHkIQD_K7aziRYYN5ptAFwUIvdIUuYIYDICyAYiEu-wdVdNOb9soibMyJ_VsmcPIl7WFrbX2qoTg4zTin2Cpdn-x-_cC0CmkTphPoivhy83Od7UIBCm8vhd1jmiK1cRplfVj0P6l6eT6xsKPSFK5wTbIqAPqAiCBgRdTAPy8Q9k-iJIVRX8QHJ33leYmNNLyAi-kYQrPSWiBhu2fLhoXapW_xNZcfC-I1owfej5jbCVqoZBzqK2XURrvirQhJq4W-pmAw5quggidA1Wl-LTndntBmthIqO4xFsXVrHZtsNcRP7iQ3mqQneUQpBtZmbvNUblZqSi_FlVXpI1q_0SWj3MO19ebNeovHnYg5Nggjj5mMsnWbUhdCA1BrdFOx585JKyi81pK1ohGGSwKe/4h5/T_QjO3KIRRSPvMiMoEoEkQ/h4/h001.zzp0Z1xuBZn4ZJgEiiTtGgDCM16KTW7RC3JxxeAFpQY)****
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm381rcfdHkIQD_K7aziRYYN5ptAFwUIvdIUuYIYDICyAYiEu-wdVdNOb9soibMyJ_VsmcPIl7WFrbX2qoTg4zTin2Cpdn-x-_cC0CmkTphPoivhy83Od7UIBCm8vhd1jmiK1cRplfVj0P6l6eT6xsKPSc8xGfh9c8N1DLNLxt1haKn0CBqipcDziY78nZFdRq42UcuxevnM3COxGTM7cajX3jnHTFydUGxwJtpqUC4PKCaV5p8Lr2O9-VbhtG2zjmc4VCV5z7abxHgylu49IXSkMIYIvY0cxdaKQZARqy1vg1h0CGsjsoNj6Dp60L8lelYkkF5IOI1xsksVaeDCTNOC0VQDD8_NPG0nSXBG8WD4n406rI_7KUoL9at4O43ZLOmwBwvFzOkvzWYuSxzuCDyIR/4h5/T_QjO3KIRRSPvMiMoEoEkQ/h5/h001.cuD_hQyyQDodvHosiBao0lPqLNHc4pWcyXrLYbU3Ok4)
---
This new expanded travel ban overwhelmingly targets Black and brown people from countries in Africa, the Middle East, and the Caribbean.
It targets people fleeing the violence of U.S. bombs, sanctions, and interventions in countries like Yemen, Haiti, Venezuela, Cuba, Libya, and Iran. It would also prevent Americans from seeing their loved ones.
If you want to read more details about the travel ban, check out the National Immigration Law Center’s analysis below.1
In response to this expanded ban, the National Immigration Law Center wrote: _“The impact of this new ban will be deeply racialized, as it will effectively bar hundreds of millions of Black and Brown people from entering the United States.”_
**I’ve been fighting Trump’s Muslim ban since before I served in Congress.** When he came to speak in Detroit as a candidate in 2016, I interrupted the event by standing up and loudly demanding he read the Constitution—calling out his plans for a travel ban.
****[**Will you fight back against Trump’s new travel ban and urge Congress to pass the _NO BAN Act_?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm381rcfdHkIQD_K7aziRYYN5ptAFwUIvdIUuYIYDICyAYiEu-wdVdNOb9soibMyJ_VsmcPIl7WFrbX2qoTg4zTin2Cpdn-x-_cC0CmkTphPoivhy83Od7UIBCm8vhd1jmiK1cRplfVj0P6l6eT6xsKPSuChTxxxd9j6XPqFyC1CaT2wHJw4hFeIVp7cSzrm2LjLbVGmJvl4WU0xOqRDKxKyYq-Asc4LGTrTLW4gHyAbz_cnqK9mHBJW86BP7UeNhdvRTu97NDA2MeQGZfQbqWS7iJyjyi8NW_tLPdnQBd_brddQft4JKySHXIB9yvOfz60_erYHMagTTLofsH3QEJurlE4frEQk7TTM4DSI3NgaGfcay3bURTa0l7Li4OsMzeKHz3xhgAoDCWmt8wn0d5MF1/4h5/T_QjO3KIRRSPvMiMoEoEkQ/h6/h001._h8K1Ss0i6j_tXni42EqzPUG6ML0HsmER6oGJBT0CCA)****
Thank you. Together, we’re standing up for our shared humanity and pushing back against attacks on all of our communities.
With you in the fight,
Rashida

Together, we’re standing up for our shared humanity and pushing back against attacks on all of our communities. With you in the fight, Rashida 1\. * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109164457/550203280/906044162?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Elon_250607_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTFmNzk1ZS1iODQzLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-_nspFWi7dtIgvLANPXEBlJHKzlI12rLSz0eWy7E46c=) Well, Derek, we all knew this was coming.

It’s time to say good riddance to Donald Trump and Elon Musk’s terrible bromance.

Sure, I know we’ve found their feud a bit amusing, but I think we ought to reflect on how ridiculous this makes us look on the world stage – the president of the United States and the world’s richest man are in a public dispute.

**This kind of fight makes America look ridiculous. It’s ugly. It’s petty. And it weakens our position in the world and makes us less safe, too.**

I also can’t help but also think about the nearly 60,000 federal employees – many of them Virginians – who have had their jobs cut because of this bromance. What a disgrace.

We have to do better, Derek.

We have to bring back accountability. Accountability for ridiculous, dangerous pettiness from our country’s leader. Accountability for our ex-unelected co-president that slashed thousands upon thousands of federal jobs. Accountability for the rampant corruption.

And the best way we can bring back accountability is by taking back the majority in the Senate – and that starts with holding seats like mine.

name: George Whitesides
subject: These attacks are deeply personal.
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109164974/550205175/1606932672?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzI5YmQ3Mi1iODQzLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=srIO3GANlbY0SQWOQhUjG_UGifwcHWfsdj8jHA7PKcc=)
Peter,

Here’s something that’s flown under the radar: The Trump Administration has proposed a _25% cut to NASA_ in what would be the largest-scale attack on the agency in history.

Not only is this deeply damaging to the scientific community and our democracy, it’s personal to me: **In 2009, I was chosen by President Obama to serve as the NASA Chief of Staff.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109164975/550205176/1606932672?refcode=em-6.7.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzI5YmQ3Mi1iODQzLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=srIO3GANlbY0SQWOQhUjG_UGifwcHWfsdj8jHA7PKcc=)
Leading NASA was nothing like I’m seeing in Congress today. People of all political backgrounds put their pride and differences aside to move the country forward.

Now, the Trump agenda is poised to set back NASA back by decades by:

❌ Terminating critical missions and risk our scientific leadership in the US and abroad
❌ Scaling back the workforce and harming our ability to grow the future in STEM
❌ Harming our ability to monitor climate hazards including devastating wildfires

I’m pushing back hard against these cuts not only to NASA, but to critical programs including Medicaid and SNAP. But it’s nearly impossible to reverse this damage without control of the House majority.

People of all political backgrounds put their pride and differences aside to move the country forward. Now, the Trump agenda is poised to set back NASA back by decades by: ❌ Terminating critical missions and risk our scientific leadership in the US and abroad ❌ Scaling back the workforce and harming our ability to grow the future in STEM ❌ Harming our ability to monitor climate hazards including devastating wildfires I’m pushing back hard against these cuts not only to NASA, but to critical programs including Medicaid and SNAP. subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Allied and Axis investments and strategies

_**A message from our sponsor...**_ | | | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=d9f4cf244d8242de80e2e07c16beb30f&_e=UE5LdWCn0L07YWrMVeB47dxAC5bmUSTHi71-Ovjfs3-vVE7ycGi1aCLC6buXW4-rzsTELWo5vbCbyNDCFQRe0I47tADdYgDZcNeOP9ZX8XNB0T1IwoioiXlESuESB_vXRI2oRykgPrsESYv087CVnywAjyElXdJF7MZgowjaeMWBlRqDTePb4_Z5Qe7LFHdxPA8duBSDlZ4inbk5-6n_5otv-4bjihnRwEMfdxWkUYAo5bDD5-wEh6mbZ4PkbpuEoDiyGnGu-MxKNywVf937kqD-gzJ8xxK_VETL-_ALfhfaZQCukAIur3LgE9dXE9tRnWYAat4FB9q3iLmNO712JXK8M7-zXzEMUHKnF7cW7yhAlvhSFqm4jl970H4cG0U5WCZGlcG65U9KuoX2awfprQTtqUQubNgr9kis1fHr-F3ydjkUvlZxPJOa0jxU3AwN)

| | Peter, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. We must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=d9f4cf244d8242de80e2e07c16beb30f&_e=UE5LdWCn0L07YWrMVeB47dxAC5bmUSTHi71-Ovjfs3-vVE7ycGi1aCLC6buXW4-rzsTELWo5vbCbyNDCFQRe0I47tADdYgDZcNeOP9ZX8XNB0T1IwoioiXlESuESB_vXRI2oRykgPrsESYv087CVnywAjyElXdJF7MZgowjaeMWBlRqDTePb4_Z5Qe7LFHdxPA8duBSDlZ4inbk5-6n_5otv-4bjihnRwEMfdxWkUYAo5bDD5-wEh6mbZ4PkbpuEoDiyGnGu-MxKNywVf937kqD-gzJ8xxK_VETL-_ALfhc1bwn5vt4Ah5tGhVEGGfGdtxc5CwUv95IHtvXr6BDb9RtHq-6qiQhzaJOxIU6p7TpYexWCzIQuJMJ4CtR9jyf-j3Vot4xZRYOSiv93QMp4MxgoOq7GcRMuBeoRF2jLKt0RqzJQA9Kb8YYUDF9iF_zR)**[The Second World Wars.”](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=d9f4cf244d8242de80e2e07c16beb30f&_e=UE5LdWCn0L07YWrMVeB47dxAC5bmUSTHi71-Ovjfs3-vVE7ycGi1aCLC6buXW4-rzsTELWo5vbCbyNDCFQRe0I47tADdYgDZcNeOP9ZX8XNB0T1IwoioiXlESuESB_vXRI2oRykgPrsESYv087CVnywAjyElXdJF7MZgowjaeMWBlRqDTePb4_Z5Qe7LFHdxPA8duBSDlZ4inbk5-6n_5otv-4bjihnRwEMfdxWkUYAo5bDD5-wEh6mbZ4PkbpuEoDiyGnGu-MxKNywVf937kqD-gzJ8xxK_VETL-_ALfhcq6Tw_Nomcg-VqwkSLdyVMG9vlA-N27Q3jpZ7zH7sTog40va7L4AQtUuVozLJWKZ_MlTCFor_CBaF8Duuw4HfxE67DqS5yivdXFYSwSQ_nSDSLVtbbx6oeQoS_oOA3VvRFWLIu5ulZ5q23iWv3Dj43) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. clean_body: Allied and Axis investments and strategies A message from our sponsor... | | | | | Peter, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. We must preserve the lessons learned from this world war. | | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian Victor Davis Hanson of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. | | | Simply use this secure link to reserve your copy of “The Second World Wars” on DVD today: Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Me, Bernie, and Medicare For All
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
[ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250607-5119-footer&t=1001&akid=5119%2E420207%2EE7pMVo ]Pramila Jayapal

My friend, Senator Bernie Sanders, tweeted some timely words about
Medicare for All.

[ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/pj-em-20250607?source=em20250607-5119&akid=5119%2E420207%2EE7pMVo ]A screenshot of a tweet from Senator Bernie Sanders talking about the
need for Medicare for All.

I recently re-introduced the House version of Medicare for All this year,
with Bernie re-introducing M4A in the Senate. With Republicans going after
Medicaid, it’s critical that we keep up our fight for single-payer health
care in America.

[ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/pj-em-20250607?source=em20250607-5119&akid=5119%2E420207%2EE7pMVo ]Will you add your name in support of Medicare for All at this critical
moment? Bernie and I are counting on grassroots supporters to step up and
show the strength of our movement for guaranteed, high quality health care
for all!

[ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/pj-em-20250607?source=em20250607-5119&akid=5119%2E420207%2EE7pMVo ]Add Your Name

Medicare for All is the popular, necessary, and urgent solution to a
broken, for-profit health care system that leaves more than 87 million
Americans uninsured or underinsured every year. This bill ensures everyone
gets the care they deserve. That’s health care WITH primary care, vision,
dental, prescription drugs, mental health, long-term supports and
services, reproductive care, and more. It’s health care WITHOUT copays,
private insurance premiums, deductibles, and other out-of-pocket costs.

The recent debate over Trump’s budget bill has only highlighted our
broken, for-profit health system that was already leaving out far too many
people and sticking folks with huge bills and a lifetime of medical debt —
even as they cut pills in half and make impossible decisions between
paying for their rent or their care.

We can no longer allow profits to get in the way of people’s health and
well-being in this country. With your help, Bernie and I will continue
taking on corporations, Big Pharma, and the status quo as we organize and
build up support for Medicare for All in Congress and across this country.

[ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/pj-em-20250607?source=em20250607-5119&akid=5119%2E420207%2EE7pMVo ]If you’re with me and Bernie in the fight for Medicare for All, please
add your name to support guaranteed health care for all. This is an
important moment in our fight to ensure health care is a human right.
Let’s put people over profits and care over corporations.

[ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/pj-em-20250607?source=em20250607-5119&akid=5119%2E420207%2EE7pMVo ]Add Your Name

We will prevail in passing single-payer health care legislation in
America, but only if we keep our fight going.

In solidarity,

Pramila

Contribute to Pramila Jayapal: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250607-5119-footer&t=1002&refcode2=5119_420207_E7pMVo&akid=5119%2E420207%2EE7pMVo

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.pramilaforcongress.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=5119%2E420207%2EE7pMVo

Paid for by Pramila for Congress.

name: Team Schiff
subject: You’ll never guess who insulted Adam on Fox News
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=8663%2E5257348%2EAyu6aS ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek — You’ll
never guess who attacked Adam on Fox News last week.

None other than corrupt Rod Blagojevich, disgraced former governor of
Illinois, who served almost eight years in prison for selling a vacant
Senate seat.

Yeah, that guy. And his choice of insult was... unique, to say the least.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q22025_abs_em.gs9A_9&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250607_AM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=8663%2E5257348%2EAyu6aS ]Fox News headline: Blagojevich roasts Dems: Calls Schiff the Elvis of
Liars

Yes, a man who was impeached because of his corruption and found guilty of
24 federal charges — including lying to the FBI — called Adam the “king of
Democratic liars.”

Ok then.

The only reason Rod Blagojevich can appear on Fox News right now is
because Donald Trump commuted his sentence and pardoned him. All it took
was saying some compliments of Trump, going on Fox News, and insulting
Democrats. It’s patently corrupt, and it’s just plain wrong.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=q22025_abs_em.PyXMxO&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250607_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=8663%2E5257348%2EAyu6aS ]The attacks against Adam aren’t stopping anytime soon — and neither is
our work to hold the Republicans attacking him accountable for their
corruption and lies. Pitch in to help us keep up this important work.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

name: AOC
subject: Communist manifesto
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
Fox News and the right wing would have you believe that my American values are something out of the communist manifesto.
But I don’t believe in healthcare, labor, and human dignity because I’m an extremist.
**I believe these things because I was a waitress**.
Because I’ve worked double shifts to keep the lights on.
Because I did lose a parent to cancer and I saw my mom open the hospital bill a couple of days later.
Because on my worst day, **I know what it feels like to feel left behind**.
I don’t want any of us to live like this anymore. We deserve better.
But together, we've built a movement that is pushing harder than ever for guaranteed healthcare, bold action on our climate crisis, and so much more.
[Help us continue the fight by making a grassroots donation today.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250607.y9e26m&refcode=em20250607-9039-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9039%2E2526796%2Ez_dXIa)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250607.y9e26m&refcode=em20250607-9039-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=9039%2E2526796%2Ez_dXIa)**
In solidarity,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250607?refcode=em20250607-9039-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=21&refcode2=9039_2526796_z_dXIa&akid=9039%2E2526796%2Ez_dXIa)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250607-9039-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=22&akid=9039%2E2526796%2Ez_dXIa)**

name: General John King
subject: I locked up drug dealers and gangbangers
disclaimer_text: Paid For By John King For Senate Inc
body:
During my career in law enforcement, I locked up drug dealers, arrested and deported criminals here illegally, and did everything I could to keep the community safe. |
[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=20cbd821eca44a159f8d9e7ddb089d2d&_e=Q-gz122ITb-tIGczz9zt6XGC4qMZaQ3ibpBbDJ4kVMkBZX5BEn2JTA2Sot_CTRUCviS5xNtDBWg3Mk7FOB-B2RV_ZARWNo9LzdQlS5BULZC5BPli88SjvTbi1kzLOdFaFYtF0hlhXAEeQW6l-Gyq8CQTbSyhNk7_bEe1AY32Ai0bdzhBOubJ7-mXc1zkAeEh_oBosZQ691q2JS_1cZhZefwdkrLxXJIxziJ-MGl54GmSvt-_q7GqWByr-yYznLStoiRQJqGjw4Fy3wrZRw2DAUt20gMfj9BOQT9z53YVONGkTggA48KIGfbjVsWkRUzT8uhOSSwiMTnyIY0XwbqmuQz69hkEUr9Gd0uJOzdf1Pstf9vOR6tGjpw9ke9tF4-IvvrAaPIRonHYsOzDUT4jhw%3D%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative, four decades ago, I joined the Atlanta Police Department as a beat cop.

My first assignment was walking high crime foot patrol on Auburn Avenue. Eventually, I became chief of police in Doraville, a small community northeast of Atlanta. During my career in law enforcement, I locked up drug dealers, arrested and deported criminals here illegally, and did everything I could to keep the community safe.

**I have some scars to show for it: I was shot and stabbed in the line of duty.**

That didn’t break me; it strengthened my resolve. During my career as a law enforcement officer, I busted criminals, yes, but I also built bridges with diverse communities and saw neighbors helping neighbors.

**I know how important it is to support law enforcement and first responders.

Soft-on-crime policies and weak leadership make our communities less safe. In the Senate, I’ll always Back the Blue and work with President Trump to make our country safer and more secure.**

[**But I can’t do it without your support.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=20cbd821eca44a159f8d9e7ddb089d2d&_e=Q-gz122ITb-tIGczz9zt6XGC4qMZaQ3ibpBbDJ4kVMkBZX5BEn2JTA2Sot_CTRUCviS5xNtDBWg3Mk7FOB-B2RV_ZARWNo9LzdQlS5BULZC5BPli88SjvTbi1kzLOdFaFYtF0hlhXAEeQW6l-Gyq8CQTbSyhNk7_bEe1AY32Ai0bdzhBOubJ7-mXc1zkAeEh_oBosZQ691q2JS_1cZhZefwdkrLxXJIxziJ-MGl54GmSvt-_q7GqWByr-yYznLSt4rwKrMKmoY1YFXQVZYOke5F1I10wMN6QOyBoittS2rCm3O2exH7UPYZ2BB081iJqJLqYXJOcvx_wUaQGykXnJBDsQW7-1p9cDm3fuAAFAaWV1jYqV8psLPzso9kd0l2MU6ImXiwwhO0ZOR9Hh6Ya5A%3D%3D)

When it comes to supporting law enforcement, Jon Ossoff has been totally AWOL. He refuses to call out his own party’s insane anti-police policies, and he refused to speak up when __**"Cop City"**__ protesters threatened Atlanta’s police training center.

He must be defeated.

[**Whether it’s $10, $25, or $100, your donation will help me bring determination, resolve, and support for our law enforcement officers to the U.S. Senate.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=20cbd821eca44a159f8d9e7ddb089d2d&_e=Q-gz122ITb-tIGczz9zt6XGC4qMZaQ3ibpBbDJ4kVMkBZX5BEn2JTA2Sot_CTRUCviS5xNtDBWg3Mk7FOB-B2RV_ZARWNo9LzdQlS5BULZC5BPli88SjvTbi1kzLOdFaFYtF0hlhXAEeQW6l-Gyq8CQTbSyhNk7_bEe1AY32Ai0bdzhBOubJ7-mXc1zkAeEh_oBosZQ691q2JS_1cZhZefwdkrLxXJIxziJ-MGl54GmSvt-_q7GqWByr-yYznLStlqBlPWCYO8sIWHZFSSr8HmjjrfJuCH0rnbxlrEybba-ma9CNkoHQ3mtdTVi24-zTuUYz0w4JlVoI7cv6uoZiPwtMvZud6v9libWPqT2yQ5lh3g4wamLPVnnHXXr89J5aT6V3LtlvUr2bIP31wCZnRA%3D%3D)

clean_body: During my career in law enforcement, I locked up drug dealers, arrested and deported criminals here illegally, and did everything I could to keep the community safe. | Fellow Conservative, four decades ago, I joined the Atlanta Police Department as a beat cop. My first assignment was walking high crime foot patrol on Auburn Avenue. Eventually, I became chief of police in Doraville, a small community northeast of Atlanta. During my career in law enforcement, I locked up drug dealers, arrested and deported criminals here illegally, and did everything I could to keep the community safe. I have some scars to show for it: I was shot and stabbed in the line of duty. That didn’t break me; it strengthened my resolve. During my career as a law enforcement officer, I busted criminals, yes, but I also built bridges with diverse communities and saw neighbors helping neighbors. I know how important it is to support law enforcement and first responders. Soft-on-crime policies and weak leadership make our communities less safe. In the Senate, I’ll always Back the Blue and work with President Trump to make our country safer and more secure. When it comes to supporting law enforcement, Jon Ossoff has been totally AWOL. He refuses to call out his own party’s insane anti-police policies, and he refused to speak up when "Cop City" protesters threatened Atlanta’s police training center. He must be defeated. I started my career as a beat cop and became a police chief. I know bullets and budgets, and I’m ready to fight for you in the Senate. Let’s win this together. Thank you, Maj. Gen. John King (retd.) - STAND WITH OUR LAW ENFORCEMENT OFFICERS - | General John King is a soldier, lawman, and the first Hispanic elected statewide in Georgia history. He’s running for the Senate now because Georgians need a leader who will fight for them, fight for President Trump’s agenda, and put America First. | | | Paid For By John King For Senate Inc. Use of military images or rank does not imply endorsement by the U.S. Dept. of Defense or any Service Branch._
