TOP NEWS "First trial of immigrant accused of trespassing on Texas border military zone ends in acquittal, " Texas Tribune'sUriel J. Garcia - "A federal jury and judge acquitted a 21-year-old woman from Peru on Thursday of illegally entering a national defense area and military reservation after she crossed the Rio Grande from Mexico into Texas last month, in what lawyers say is the first trial of an immigrant since the Trump administration declared parts of the New Mexico and Texas border as a military zone. Adely Vanessa De La Cruz-Alvarez was detained by soldiers and arrested by a Border Patrol agent on May 12 after they found her alone sitting next to the gate on a bollard wall near Tornillo, 40 miles east of El Paso. "Hopefully, this sets the tone for the federal government," said Veronica Teresa Lerma , one of her defense attorneys, adding, "so they know what the El Paso community will do with these charges." Earlier this year, the Trump administration designated 180 miles of the New Mexico border with Mexico and 63 miles in West Texas as a national defense area, overseen by U.S. Army commands based out of Fort Huachuca in Arizona and Fort Bliss in El Paso. At the start of the trial, De La Cruz-Alvarez, who has been in immigration agents' custody since her arrest, faced three misdemeanor charges: entering the country illegally, violating national defense property and trespassing onto a military base. She was found guilty of entering the country illegally and was already facing deportation as soon as she was arrested. She was sentenced to time served plus one business day by U.S. Magistrate Judge Laura Enriquez. Even though she was acquitted of trespassing onto a military zone, De La Cruz-Alvarez will most likely get deported, said Shane Michael McMahon , her public defense attorney. "She knew exactly what she was doing," Phillip Douglas Countryman , the federal prosecutor, told the judge, asking for a 45-day jail sentence. Crossing the border illegally "should come with some sort of punishment." The verdict is the latest blow to the Trump administration, which pursued additional misdemeanor charges in addition to the usual misdemeanor charge of entering the U.S. improperly or the felony charge of reentering the country after being denied. Tacking on the trespassing charges, is the latest tactic the administration is trying in its attempt to deport and punish 1 million immigrants annually, including some who have entered the country legally." #TXLEGE "Speaker Dustin Burrows, once tagged as "liberal," kept skeptics at bay by leaning into a conservative agenda," Texas Tribune'sKayla Guo - "Back in December, Rep. Dustin Burrows ' grasp on the speakership was, at best, tenuous. His main rival, Rep. David Cook of Mansfield, had already won the endorsement of the House Republican Caucus, a victory his backers argued should've clinched his ascent to speaker of the GOP-controlled Texas House. Instead, Burrows, surrounded by Republicans willing to defy caucus rules, that the race was over and that he had the 76 votes needed to lock up the gavel. He touted an even mix of Democratic and GOP support, though some Republicans immediately asked for their names to be removed, pushing him back under the threshold to win. The competing pronouncements deepened a bitter, months-long power struggle within a Republican Party that had churned through three speakers in four sessions, and it amplified demands by grassroots activists to sideline Democrats and lean into the party's most partisan impulses. Cook carried the banner of the hardline, so-called "reformers," whose maligned Burrows as a "liberal" intent on empowering Democrats. Burrows, in fact a staunch conservative and a key player in the inner circle of House leadership, represented a continuation of the establishment that the party's rightmost faction had spent years fighting to depose. Burrows , finally, on the first day of the legislative session, with a coalition made up of 49 Democrats and 36 Republicans. His reliance on the minority party prompted from his right flank and fueled charges that he would cater to the Democratic bloc that drove his victory. Some of the newly seated "reformers" openly threatened retribution in next year's primaries for colleagues who had backed him. The speaker's race was over, but now Burrows would have to govern a House wracked by months of acrimony, raising questions about how much could get done with one chamber of the Legislature at war with itself. Instead, the Lubbock Republican emerged 140 days later from his first session wielding the gavel with a laundry list of new conservative laws to point to, having almost entirely avoided the turmoil his election portended. "With 150 members, you're always going to have 150 perspectives -- that's part of what makes our chamber unique," Burrows said in a statement. "But the speaker's job isn't to force uniformity or go to battle with the Senate on every topic, it's to protect the institution by making sure members have the tools and support they need to succeed on behalf of their districts and go home to show real accomplishments to the people they represent. I think we accomplished that." Burrows began the session with a clear eye toward retaining the speakership and detaching himself from the tenure of his now-politically radioactive predecessor, Beaumont Rep. Dade Phelan. He aligned the House closely with Lt. Gov. Dan Patrick , the powerful presiding officer of the Senate and frequent antagonist of past speakers, and built goodwill with Gov. Greg Abbott by prioritizing school vouchers, the governor's top priority. And he worked methodically to win over skeptical members of his caucus, giving some committee chairmanships and making sure others saw their pet issues reach the floor. A careful tactician with years of experience in House leadership, Burrows managed to deliver almost all major Republican priorities, including vouchers, tougher bail laws and a raft of socially conservative policies. Yet he did so without fully alienating the Democrats who powered him to the speaker's chair, even as they saw their party's priorities die and failed to stop most of the GOP's top items. "We really didn't know what to expect because of how he was elected," said Rep. Mitch Little, a Lewisville Republican and Cook devotee who Burrows' supporters for making a "brazen attempt to circumvent the will of the voters." "But to be quite honest," Little said at the end of the session, "if he had been elected by all Republicans, I don't know how this session would have really gone any differently." Complaining about the few unfinished items, he added, would be "picking nits more than anything."" STATE GOVERNMENT "Legislators give Texas Space Commission $300M for grants and the power to close highways and beaches, " Houston Chronicle'sAndrea Leinfelder - "Texas legislators approved $300 million in grant money and gave it new authority to close highways and beaches "to promote space-related industries" during the final days of the state's 89th Legislative Session. The ability to close public areas was a last-minute addition languished in the House. "The future is being shaped right here in Texas," state Rep. Greg Bonnen , R-Friendswood, . "What is happening in our state is literally equivalent to what happened at Kitty Hawk in 1903 when the Wright brothers first flew." Bonnen led the legislation that created the Texas Space Commission during the 2023 legislative session, and he authored this session to clarify the commission's powers and duties. The bill still needs to be signed by Gov.Greg Abbot t. This legislation covers a wide variety of topics, but the ability to close highways and beaches caught legislators' attention. HB 5246 gives the commission's board the power to close highways, venues and beaches - with approval of the city where these are located - to keep the public safe during rocket launches. This most directly relates toElon Musk 's SpaceX, which needs to close a public highway and beach when it launches its Starship rocket in South Texas. Cameron County has been in charge of closing the road and beach, and starting Sept. 1 the Space Commission will work with the newly created city of Starbase - not the county - to shut down access. "Who is in the best position to have the public interest in mind in closing a public beach?" said state Rep. Rafael Anch ia, D-Dallas. "It's not the people in the company town that is effectively a wholly owned subsidiary of SpaceX. And it's not the Space Commission. It is the elected officials who are closest to the people, and that is county government." Cameron County Judge Eddie Trevi ño Jr. that he was disappointed with the change, which he described as widely unpopular. He wants the Space Commission and Starbase to respect the public's environmental concerns and beach access - though the county has received its share of criticism regarding these topics. "I think this is raising a lot of questions and concerns with regards to the future authority and regulation of the closures," Treviño said. "As county judge I'm responsible for the people. A lot of people are upset." Starbase did not immediately respond to a request for comment. A spokesperson for the Texas Space Commission said it's reviewing the legislation "to be prepared when those new laws take effect."" ($) 2025 "Early votes up, but voter turnout for June 7 mayoral runoff 'still abysmal'," San Antonio Express-News' Molly Smith - "After the field of 27 mayoral candidates was cut to two last month, San Antonio voters have gotten more excited about selecting the city's next leader. More than 98,000 city voters cast in-person ballots during the eight-day early voting period, which ended Tuesday. That's up 33% from the nearly who voted early for the May 3 election, which featured municipal races in San Antonio, Balcones Heights, Olmos Park, Kirby and Von Ormy, in addition to a slew of school board elections and an Alamo Community College District bond. Only five San Antonio city races are on the : the open mayor's seat and four City Council seats. Gina Ortiz Jones , a one-time Air Force undersecretary, and Rolando Pablos , a former Texas secretary of state, are battling to succeed term-limited Mayor Ron Nirenberg. The in-person votes and the nearly 4,000 mailed-in ballots exceed the 101,150 San Antonians who voted in the May election, both early and on election day. One possible reason? "Now that it's whittled down to two, you don't have to do as much work to understand who they are and what they stand for," said campaign consultant Laura Barberena. "You're asking a little bit less of the voter and I think that they're more receptive to participating in a place where they don't feel like they're making an uninformed vote." Barberena managed Councilman Manny Pelaez 's unsuccessful mayoral campaign (he came in fifth place) and is currently managingIvalis Meza Gonzalez 's campaign for Pelaez's open District 8 seat on the Northwest Side. Campaign spending could be another factor behind the bigger early voting totals. "A lot of money has been put on the ground to raise peoples' awareness that this election is going on," Barberena said. Political action committees, many of which have a partisan bent, in recent weeks trying to get their preferred candidate elected by blanketing voters with mailers and television and digital ads." ($) "Jolanda Jones jumps into race for Houston's 18th Congressional District, " Houston Chronicle's Taylor Goldenstein - "Houston Democratic state Rep. Jolanda Jones is throwing her name in the hat for a run in Texas' 18th Congressional District, formerly held by the late Sylvester Turner. Jones, who has represented the south and southeast Houston in the Texas House since 2022, was waiting until the end of the legislative session on Monday to make a decision about whether to run. "After much encouragement and serious consideration, I have decided today to become a candidate for Congress in the historic 18th district," Jones said in a statement Thursday. Jones joins an increasingly crowded field that includes Harris County Attorney Christian Menefee , former Houston City Council member Amanda Edwards and a former senior advisor to the late U.S. Rep. Sheila Jackson Lee , Isaiah Martin. The district leans heavily Democratic and has a long history of being represented by Black legislators. In 2023, as a freshman, Jones made headlines , alleging she created an "abusive and hostile" work environment. They claimed in a leaked resignation that Jones hid an inappropriate relationship between her son and an intern and allowed him outsized say in state business. Jones never addressed the allegations directly, saying she could not discuss personnel matters. In this latest legislative session, she authored successful bills for longer than the maximum term of confinement for their alleged crime and as part of their social studies curriculum. Jones previously served on the Houston City Council from 2008 to 2012 and Houston ISD's school board from 2016 until 2020. The criminal defense attorney also owns her own firm." ($) 2026 "Can an astronaut, pastor or linebacker help Democrats finally win in Texas? " Houston Chronicle's Jeremy Wallace - "A pastor, an astronaut and a linebacker walk into a bar. Actually, it's not a bar, but the potential Democratic primary looming in 2026 for John Cornyn's U.S. Senate seat. And don't count out the former punk rock guitarist who might just have another run in him. With Austin state Rep. James Talarico , a 36-year-old former teacher and pastor, Edward McKinley this week that he is thinking about getting into the race, that colorful primary field is starting to look more plausible. "The legislative session just ended, and I am having conversations about how I can best serve, and that does include the Senate race," Talarico said. In Houston,Terry Virts , a former astronaut and retired fighter pilot, has been building up potential staff and using social media to give a flavor of the type of campaign he might run on if he gets in. "Our draft-dodger in chief is throwing himself a $50M birthday party with Tanks, APCs, Missiles, and 6,600 soldiers -- all while cutting kids' cancer research," last week blasting President Donald Trump. The linebacker, of course, is Colin Allred , the 42-year-old former Dallas Congressman who ran against U.S. Ted Cruz in 2024. He has , which Cornyn has held since 2002. Meanwhile Beto O 'Rourke, the former punk rock guitarist and El Paso congressman, was just in Humble for , making clear he hasn't ruled out taking another shot at higher office. "The bottom line for me is I'm gonna do whatever I can that is most helpful and most useful -- if that's running, if it's not running. I have no pride in this," the 52-year-old said." ($) BUSINESS NEWS "New Linde facility in Freeport expected to double liquefied carbon dioxide production, " Houston Chronicle's Yvette Orosco - "Linde, , will add a second carbon dioxide-producing facility at its Freeport site, according to a . Once completed in 2027, the facility would liquefy carbon dioxide collected at MEGlobal American's Oyster Creek ethylene glycol facility, which is supplied with oxygen by Linde's air separation plant. Linde says the new facility would feed growing demand for carbon dioxide production. "Our investment further strengthens Linde's robust CO2 network, enabling reliable supply to customers throughout the region while positioning us for future growth," Linde CEO Amer Akhras said in the company's news release. Linde said capturing and reusing carbon dioxide from industrial production prevents it from being emitted into the atmosphere. Carbon dioxide is used to create the fizz in carbonated beverages. It can also be used in food preservation and in making dry ice. Carbon dioxide is a colorless, odorless gas that naturally forms in the Earth's atmosphere, according to CO2 emissions, however, are recognized as pollutants that contribute to climate change, are regulated by the EPA under the Clean Air Act. Environmental advocacy groups such as the and , have cited a study in 2024 that details potential environmental threats created by liquefication plants, including carbon and methane emissions and the possible effects on air and water quality." ($) TRUMP ADMINISTRATION "Young UTSA grad 's first big job? He's head of federal counterterrorism office," San Antonio Express-News' Sig Christenson andScott Huddleston - "At 22,Thomas Fugate III is going places fast in the Trump administration. A MAGA loyalist, he's risen from working onDonald Trump 's 2024 presidential campaign to heading up, apparently on an interim basis, a counterterrorism office in the Department of Homeland Security -- a job that in the past required the boss to have a thicker resume. Fugate, who graduated magna cum laude from the University of Texas at San Antonio in 2024, has no previous experience combating terrorism. DHS defended the decision to hire Fugate, saying he's a self-starter who has impressed the department's higher-ups. "Tom Fugate has performed well in his current role as a confidential assistant in our Immigration & Border Security suboffice," a DHS official told the San Antonio Express-News. "Due to his success, he has been temporarily given additional leadership responsibilities in the Center for Prevention Programs and Partnerships office (CP3). This is a credit to his work ethic and success on the job." Bill Braniff , the director Fugate replaced, is an Army veteran who'd previously served as Consortium for the Study of Terrorism and Responses to Terrorism. He is currently the executive director of American University's Polarization and Extremism Research and Innovation Lab. He stepped down as CP3 director on March 3 as the Trump administration began cutting his staff. "Over the course of the weekend prior, eight dedicated and effective public servants were wrongfully terminated via email due to their probationary status," Braniff said in a statement posted on his LinkedIn page. "As my term appointment was ending, the best thing I could do for them and for CP3 was to resign alongside of them, as some agencies and departments have rehired people in mission critical offices once they were made aware of the implications of those terminations." ProPublica, a nonprofit news organization that broke the news of Fugate's appointment, reported that CP3 staffers expressed shock at how little Fugate knows about the basics of his role and likened meetings with him to "career counseling." DHS did not address questions from the Express-News about his experience." # [While Boise State Closes D.E.I. Centers, Northwest Nazarene Doubles Down on Woke](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2114823&post_id=165425808&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY1NDI1ODA4LCJpYXQiOjE3NDkzMjM4NjUsImV4cCI6MTc1MTkxNTg2NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTIxMTQ4MjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.CGY0zJttfEQ9R9vclVXJpzbb1fwHMLsamo_Hz0xC4Ks)

| | [Brian Lenney - Nampa's Senator](https://substack.com/@brianlenney)

---

Last year, in anticipation of the Idaho legislature kneecapping D.E.I. indoctrination in Idaho colleges, [Boise State University and others closed down their Gender Equity D.E.I. Alphabet Soup centers](https://substack.com/redirect/8cfd9a67-a20c-4dab-b7b4-0257847ee705?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Pretty wild, right?
And they were right to do so, as in April 2025, we passed [SB 1198](https://substack.com/redirect/5221bc7c-546d-446f-8df2-25ab4c9b874f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), which curb-stomped D.E.I. in Idaho higher education.
So imagine my surprise (kind of, but not really) to find that a "Christian" university in my own town, my own district even, is pushing woke nonsense on kids... right now (today, June 2025).
_**Would Jesus approve of Northwest Nazarene University in Nampa, Idaho, rolling out the red carpet for "Pride Month"? **_
**(** They receive state funds via the socialist "Idaho Launch" program as well)...
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3b94aa45-8c1c-4f51-8d21-9db3fe15d4b4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a8ac29d9-c336-4e77-a291-f9f3c4d13469?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/45be5ae8-93b7-4f22-b7d9-74ae333984cc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Andrew Breitbart famously said,
# _" Politics is downstream from culture."_
This is why CULTURE matters more than "politics."
The so-called "culture war" isn't a sideshow, it's the main battleground.
Every political fight _we bleed for_ starts in the culture.
When institutions like Northwest Nazarene University, a supposed "Christian" institution, simp for Pride Month points (while pocketing state funds), they're not just betraying their suppossed Christain principles...
_**They 're undermining the foundations of a moral, cohesive society**_.
The fight against D.E.I. in Idaho, with victories like SB 1198, shows we can push back and win.
But laws won't save us if our churches, schools, and communities are hollowed out by woke dogma. If we let our values be replaced by alphabet soup activism, no legislative win will hold.
_We fight the culture wars because they 're the front line._
Borders, language, culture...
Lose here, and you lose the soul of the nation.
Stand firm, or there's nothing left to stand for.

name: Scalise, Steve
subject: I am NOT “canceling” your GOP Membership
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
| | | Some folks write you emails pretending to be President Trump.

**I won 't do that to you. **

Some folks pretend donations will somehow fund DOGE.

**I prefer to be honest with you.**

This is Steve Scalise. As your House Majority Leader, I work hand and glove with President Trump, and I love what DOGE is doing for our country.

And when I ask you for support, I want to treat you with respect and be transparent about where your money is going.

You are not an ATM. You are a valued member of our MAGA movement. You deserve to be treated that way.

**_[So that's why I 'm dropping into your inbox right now:](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=03063d69a3b34e7c9e24ef884aa6a7f2&_e=IAJp7CZ7ysnRgmzTPDOHKZ9RGkEra0pS20fUYWf8ziqfCuHidksAMCC6dKptQUeHufgNC1mPZL4Nqq355IsDRn4fqzDB3lDQB4lg4-jwEhYgy9Y9c2rYabezfoNnI4IFWdsX2XxTsvxc8_TPK3x27O5D-cf3HHS4PjUb2FHqV6iZrntWaECH-44dBLhojYHRZbv_zbveGR7WGbFCIPC9ejoTpXNqK1LPCJCVX7MvFzGRuGHqggNL7nXixaDi933tzMmVfwvCx75m2RTvkIBmXVuYeUNvvNMEzyvhsK_KlpFPH8xkDcjSpui88g4cC93kB62718w8JQytiBHVsSQKIG3OHBjMQL8Ntp-sScRbTO4fSYQNhoFuGcWPBz_Wi8DNqDRezakRQFELm3-9JWNR6A%3D%3D)_**

The Democrat Machine is firing on all cylinders to undermine, stonewall, and sabotage everything President Trump and DOGE are doing to make our government more efficient and cut waste.

Of course, the DC Swamp can't have that.

That's why they're mobilizing the courts, Deep State operatives, and Congressional Democrats to unleash a coordinated political hatchet job against the Trump Administration.

_Democrats are suing him. They 're pushing for partisan investigations. They're firing off hit piece after hit piece in the press. They're introducing legislation to block DOGE's access._

Their plan is simple:
**1.** Attack the Trump Administration
**2.** Drag them into court battles
**3.** Slow them down at every turn
**4.** Use the press to attack their work
**5.** Unload millions to win the Midterms
**6.** Block Trump's ENTIRE legislative agenda
**That 's where House Republicans - and most importantly, YOU - can make a major difference. **

Democrats have already pledged 50 million dollars to win the Midterm elections, take control of Congress, and exploit that power to sabotage EVERYTHING President Trump is doing to save the country. That includes the critical work of DOGE.

Cook Political Report just highlighted EIGHT toss-up districts that will determine who wins the House. If Democrats win even a few seats, it's over. They win the House.

That's why I'm tapping our entire grassroots movement for help.

_**[If you can afford to do so, I 'm imploring you to pitch in a few bucks to save our House Majority - and President Trump's entire legislative agenda along with it.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=03063d69a3b34e7c9e24ef884aa6a7f2&_e=IAJp7CZ7ysnRgmzTPDOHKZ9RGkEra0pS20fUYWf8ziqfCuHidksAMCC6dKptQUeHufgNC1mPZL4Nqq355IsDRn4fqzDB3lDQB4lg4-jwEhYgy9Y9c2rYabezfoNnI4IFWdsX2XxTsvxc8_TPK3x27O5D-cf3HHS4PjUb2FHqV6iZrntWaECH-44dBLhojYHRZbv_zbveGR7WGbFCIPC9ejoTpXNqK1LPCJCVX7MvFzGRuGHqggNL7nXixaDi933txliKTS8DbG48ncrzY9Czus-Vu5EGUyjt3UBEjOfA1VElQ-ZeUu33ZQL8gj8mejNtveTXb3y-hO-kc5cjZMeOnufXuWqlgQdJMLJaGymEMRpby3WHkL27jp1QgvDD59WHVb4FIFs0v9ZAAhpKrhc8CA%3D%3D)**___

|

[PLEASE CONTRIBUTE NOW
](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=03063d69a3b34e7c9e24ef884aa6a7f2&_e=IAJp7CZ7ysnRgmzTPDOHKZ9RGkEra0pS20fUYWf8ziqfCuHidksAMCC6dKptQUeHufgNC1mPZL4Nqq355IsDRn4fqzDB3lDQB4lg4-jwEhYgy9Y9c2rYabezfoNnI4IFWdsX2XxTsvxc8_TPK3x27O5D-cf3HHS4PjUb2FHqV6iZrntWaECH-44dBLhojYHRZbv_zbveGR7WGbFCIPC9ejoTpXNqK1LPCJCVX7MvFzGRuGHqggNL7nXixaDi933tSR3stiiJZJIf4lsoypE6X2nfU3_62zl-Q8tt-bbHcug2HarsPeyAwerC_wiLmrPYE2kzGj0-rYsAgr3a0XsGfTsuzBbBab3VYLXCYWFXwSbSVnBcNGMOhLjcLpqKAb1eHbVzY215uWdTHOifjboXLA%3D%3D)

clean_body: | | | Some folks write you emails pretending to be President Trump. I won 't do that to you. Some folks pretend donations will somehow fund DOGE. I prefer to be honest with you. This is Steve Scalise. As your House Majority Leader, I work hand and glove with President Trump, and I love what DOGE is doing for our country. And when I ask you for support, I want to treat you with respect and be transparent about where your money is going. You are not an ATM. You are a valued member of our MAGA movement. You deserve to be treated that way. The Democrat Machine is firing on all cylinders to undermine, stonewall, and sabotage everything President Trump and DOGE are doing to make our government more efficient and cut waste. Of course, the DC Swamp can't have that. That's why they're mobilizing the courts, Deep State operatives, and Congressional Democrats to unleash a coordinated political hatchet job against the Trump Administration. Democrats are suing him. They 're pushing for partisan investigations. They're firing off hit piece after hit piece in the press. They're introducing legislation to block DOGE's access. Their plan is simple: 1. Attack the Trump Administration 2. Drag them into court battles 3. Slow them down at every turn 4. Use the press to attack their work 5. Unload millions to win the Midterms 6. Block Trump's ENTIRE legislative agenda That 's where House Republicans - and most importantly, YOU - can make a major difference. Democrats have already pledged 50 million dollars to win the Midterm elections, take control of Congress, and exploit that power to sabotage EVERYTHING President Trump is doing to save the country. That includes the critical work of DOGE. Cook Political Report just highlighted EIGHT toss-up districts that will determine who wins the House. If Democrats win even a few seats, it's over. They win the House. That's why I'm tapping our entire grassroots movement for help. | Again, I'm NOT pretending this money is going to fund DOGE or anything these other groups are alluding to. This money will go directly to the most important battleground districts in the country so we can win the Midterms and keep delivering on President Trump's MAGA agenda. If you agree this is a noble cause to support, please consider pitching in right now. God bless you, - Steve STEVE SCALISE House Majority Leader A personal note from Majority Leader Steve Scalise: I'm humbled to announce that I am your new House Majority Leader. My first order of business is checking in with our best supporters, so I just launched my new MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY for that specific reason. "I’d be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link."** | "RESPOND NOW →" Thank you, Steve Scalise House Majority Leader | | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. Team Scalise is committed to restoring a Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a member of the Team Scalise Conservative grassroots network. Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without "green cards," and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer of each individual who contributes over $200 in a calendar year. You can donate via mail by sending a check to: 320 First Street SE 2nd Floor Washington, DC 20003

Because we support President Trump and the America First agenda. It's time to set the record straight, Fellow Patriot. I'm launching the to show the world who we really are: patriotic, hard-working Americans who love our country and want to see it thrive. 👉 Do you believe MAGA Republicans are being unfairly smeared? 👉 Do you support President Trump's plan to slash bureaucracy, enforce our border, and rebuild the economy? 👉 Do you want a full four years of conservative reforms -- backed by a Republican Senate? If you agree with these statements, then make your voice heard. Your input matters. Don't let the Left speak for you. ---
Peter,

The Trump Administration is pushing the boundaries of our Constitution, and we don’t know what our country will look like on the other side.

We’re seeing history repeat itself, seeing our friends, family, neighbors, and more ignore the warning signs of fascism that are screaming in our faces.

**It may feel like it’s too late to reverse course and stop Trump, but it is not. We still have elections, and we can still stop a MAGA takeover.

clean_body: | | Peter, The Trump Administration is pushing the boundaries of our Constitution, and we don’t know what our country will look like on the other side. We’re seeing history repeat itself, seeing our friends, family, neighbors, and more ignore the warning signs of fascism that are screaming in our faces. It may feel like it’s too late to reverse course and stop Trump, but it is not. We still have elections, and we can still stop a MAGA takeover. This fight starts with our Courts. Hey Everyone! I am excited to announce that this month we will be joined at our monthly meeting by State Rep. Brandi Bradley, who is on the front lines at the state capitol and is deeply involved in the fight against HB 25-1312, the radical transgender law that Governor Polis signed last month.
We will also provide an update this month on the attempt to call a special meeting of the Colorado GOP to vote on the 2026 primary opt-out, as well as updates on the Unity Scorecard and a recap of the RNC Spring Training held in Miami last month.
Next month, we will hear from another Colorado GOP Gubernatorial Candidate, and I am hopeful that we can keep the momentum of our grassroots movement strong as we lead into the November 2025 School Board Elections.
As always, click the image or button below to RSVP for our meeting on Tuesday.

name: EMILYs List
subject: So long Elon 👋
body:
He's gone, but our work isn't over. |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109175472/550243135/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE616_20250607_ElonOut_ALL_v1s2&sourceid=1056325&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGQ4Mjg4NC1kYTQzLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OCU3CKKKsGyvC96UHG0p9s6tLrJSi3peUGfEVe2pl9c=) Peter,

After his "DOGE" left the federal government in dangerous disarray, unelected billionaire Elon Musk is officially leaving the White House.

Here's what happened:

FIRST: Elon Musk spent $200 million to get Trump to the White House.

THEN: He created and used "DOGE" to gut federal agencies, destroy thousands of jobs, and obliterate more than 50 years of democratic progress.

BUT NOW: Elon just announced he's leaving the White House because he doesn't want to "take responsibility for everything this administration's doing."

With Elon out of the immediate picture, we need to move quickly to capitalize on our momentum and shut this unelected billionaire and his cronies down for good. Because, unfortunately, Elon Musk is far from the last extremist billionaire bankrolling Republicans. clean_body: He's gone, but our work isn't over. | = Peter, After his "DOGE" left the federal government in dangerous disarray, unelected billionaire Elon Musk is officially leaving the White House. Here's what happened: FIRST: Elon Musk spent $200 million to get Trump to the White House. THEN: He created and used "DOGE" to gut federal agencies, destroy thousands of jobs, and obliterate more than 50 years of democratic progress. BUT NOW: Elon just announced he's leaving the White House because he doesn't want to "take responsibility for everything this administration's doing." With Elon out of the immediate picture, we need to move quickly to capitalize on our momentum and shut this unelected billionaire and his cronies down for good. Because, unfortunately, Elon Musk is far from the last extremist billionaire bankrolling Republicans. (And Musk himself is still deeply invested in destroying our democracy and investing in dangerous extremists nationwide.) **=** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you for stepping up, the EMILYs List team = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. I’ve spent my life in service to our communities, state, and country. I served as a JAG attorney in the U.S. Air Force for 27 years with the rank of Colonel. In the Air Force, I successfully negotiated several hostage crises and prosecuted violent criminals and child sex offenders. I'm a nonprofit founder for legal services veterans and seniors in need, ordained minister, and the Floor Leader of the Kentucky House Democrats. I know firsthand the challenges Kentucky and our country are up against. [**So now, after 27 years of serving our state and our country, I am running for Senate, but I can't start this fight alone. That’s why I’m reaching out to you personally: Will you split a $10 donation between my campaign and Serve America before my deadline at midnight TONIGHT to help me kick off my campaign strong and show the world I have what it takes to win this race? >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109175752/550244130/-1129875431?refcode=250607_Serve_Stevenson_McConnell&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjI2Y2Q1MS1kZTQzLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7vzBvOgVBR-T8mZD82p-s7Tt7qbVDEzq2kSR95yqZr8=) I’m ready to run for Senate to defend our freedoms and build an economy that works for everyone – no matter your background. Every American deserves access to food, clean water, healthcare, education, and shelter. **But Mitch McConnell and the GOP do not see things the same way.** During his 40 years in the Senate, he’s put his personal quest for power and his special-interest allies ahead of our state, nation, and Constitution every time. I’m ready to turn the page. But I need you with me. [**I promise you I will put everything I have into winning this race and being a voice for every single American. But I can’t do it alone — and I’ll need the help of grassroots supporters like you every step of the way. So I’m humbly asking: Will you split a $10 between my campaign and Serve America before my deadline at midnight tonight and help me kick off my campaign with an unbeatable show of support? >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109175753/550244131/-1129875431?refcode=250607_Serve_Stevenson_McConnell&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjI2Y2Q1MS1kZTQzLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7vzBvOgVBR-T8mZD82p-s7Tt7qbVDEzq2kSR95yqZr8=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109175754/550244132/-1129875431?refcode=250607_Serve_Stevenson_McConnell&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjI2Y2Q1MS1kZTQzLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7vzBvOgVBR-T8mZD82p-s7Tt7qbVDEzq2kSR95yqZr8=) In the Air Force, they taught us to live by “Duty. ## Obama Doc Throws Team Biden Under the Bus, Explains What They Should Have Done About Ole Joe – RedState
Barack Obama’s former physician didn’t mince words in explaining what Joe Biden and the administration should have done to answer the public’s questions about his obviously deteriorating mental health while in office: take a cognitive test. Paging Captain Obvious, we have a new contender for your job. name: Voter Action Project
subject: Disenfranchising millions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
We MUST stop this bill in the Senate and more like it but we need to unite and fight now, before opponents of voting rights in the Senate start checking voter suppression bills off their to-do list. Why? Listen to Senator Richard Blumenthal of Connecticut: [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2]
U.S. Senator Richard Blumenthal speaking against the SAVE Act [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/SAVE_RB.jpg]
RUSH $25 or more right now to stop the SAVE Act, defend our right to vote, and stop opponents of voting rights from destroying our democracy >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2]
Voter Action Project [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20.00&contactdata=lscCUanpfgW5B88ZApRVep/Ku2Rv5JRmr0xvzZ2VRngFIzJej5DguYVZ/QNSZ5G8qs8lJPgImXKrOihcexoc3b9KYl/rQXjMmcQ7U/J9Gvc=]
The Senate is standing up to stop the SAVE Act in its tracks, folks.
Defenders of voting rights know that non-citizen voting is already illegal, extremely rare, and that this bill is written in a way that could disenfranchise millions of eligible women across the country. Here's Colorado Senator Michael Bennet:
U.S. Senator Michael Bennet speaking against the SAVE Act [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/SAVE_MB.jpg]
Opponents of voting rights in Congress -- and in the White House -- favor this bill because they know it could suppress millions of eligible voters, changing the composition of the electorate and potentially empowering them and their party for years to come.
Please, Team, join these brave Senators today. Fuel our efforts to stop this dangerous legislation with $25 or whatever you can and ensure millions of women's voices continue to be heard in our elections >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2]
If you've saved your payment information with FastAction, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=15.00&tknfa=CrR_ID3tVZm9CvdqA69Emf_JWC91AoQ08uLDaBxocqk=&contactdata=lscCUanpfgW5B88ZApRVep/Ku2Rv5JRmr0xvzZ2VRngFIzJej5DguYVZ/QNSZ5G8qs8lJPgImXKrOihcexoc3b9KYl/rQXjMmcQ7U/J9Gvc=] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=25.00&tknfa=CrR_ID3tVZm9CvdqA69Emf_JWC91AoQ08uLDaBxocqk=&contactdata=lscCUanpfgW5B88ZApRVep/Ku2Rv5JRmr0xvzZ2VRngFIzJej5DguYVZ/QNSZ5G8qs8lJPgImXKrOihcexoc3b9KYl/rQXjMmcQ7U/J9Gvc=] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=50.00&tknfa=CrR_ID3tVZm9CvdqA69Emf_JWC91AoQ08uLDaBxocqk=&contactdata=lscCUanpfgW5B88ZApRVep/Ku2Rv5JRmr0xvzZ2VRngFIzJej5DguYVZ/QNSZ5G8qs8lJPgImXKrOihcexoc3b9KYl/rQXjMmcQ7U/J9Gvc=]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=100.00&tknfa=CrR_ID3tVZm9CvdqA69Emf_JWC91AoQ08uLDaBxocqk=&contactdata=lscCUanpfgW5B88ZApRVep/Ku2Rv5JRmr0xvzZ2VRngFIzJej5DguYVZ/QNSZ5G8qs8lJPgImXKrOihcexoc3b9KYl/rQXjMmcQ7U/J9Gvc=] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=250.00&tknfa=CrR_ID3tVZm9CvdqA69Emf_JWC91AoQ08uLDaBxocqk=&contactdata=lscCUanpfgW5B88ZApRVep/Ku2Rv5JRmr0xvzZ2VRngFIzJej5DguYVZ/QNSZ5G8qs8lJPgImXKrOihcexoc3b9KYl/rQXjMmcQ7U/J9Gvc=] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=20.00&contactdata=lscCUanpfgW5B88ZApRVep/Ku2Rv5JRmr0xvzZ2VRngFIzJej5DguYVZ/QNSZ5G8qs8lJPgImXKrOihcexoc3b9KYl/rQXjMmcQ7U/J9Gvc=]
We know the SAVE Act was fast-tracked by opponents of voting rights to be in place before the next election, folks. This bill is a stunning assault on our fundamental right to vote, and we can not afford to let this anti-democratic legislation become law.
If you missed it: This bill would force every voter to present proof of citizenship to register, either a passport or a birth certificate that matches their current first and last name -- something millions of eligible American women don’t have. And that’s the point.
The bill would also obliterate popular methods of voter registration for all voters, including:
* Registration by mail

* 3rd party voter registration drives

* Online voter registration in states that allow it

* Automatic voter registration
Some estimates say that this bill could disenfranchise anywhere from 11 million to 65 million eligible Americans , especially women and those who live in under-resourced communities.
“ There’s never been an attack on voting rights out of Congress like this ,” said Alexander Keyssar, a professor of History and Social Policy at the Harvard Kennedy School, and a leading historian of voting rights. “ It’s always been the federal government trying to keep states in check on voting rights, for the most part. ”
The consequences of a bill like this passing would be simply catastrophic for our democracy. Chip in with $25 or whatever you can today to stop the SAVE Act and other voter suppression bills from becoming law >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2]
https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20.00&contactdata=lscCUanpfgW5B88ZApRVep/Ku2Rv5JRmr0xvzZ2VRngFIzJej5DguYVZ/QNSZ5G8qs8lJPgImXKrOihcexoc3b9KYl/rQXjMmcQ7U/J9Gvc= [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20.00&contactdata=lscCUanpfgW5B88ZApRVep/Ku2Rv5JRmr0xvzZ2VRngFIzJej5DguYVZ/QNSZ5G8qs8lJPgImXKrOihcexoc3b9KYl/rQXjMmcQ7U/J9Gvc=]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2]
Donate Now [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20.00&contactdata=lscCUanpfgW5B88ZApRVep/Ku2Rv5JRmr0xvzZ2VRngFIzJej5DguYVZ/QNSZ5G8qs8lJPgImXKrOihcexoc3b9KYl/rQXjMmcQ7U/J9Gvc=]

Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=lPIw9%2FAG3ErmBgG36m23VLFSxL46BO5JyOJ69V3SAO4B%2B6ya%2FD18NBfIll7V1TnM02KdMqPJ5fVroIjuXuKLqarMRGhcX4fVB1iO8gSZvtf4xYJlOHTEr3lExjjqipLpPYm%2BCb3T49N3zQoDG2V%2FIuOyreARKCrM3qOYTQC1ykTV4yFmi6YN5AcW3pe2NILF9wu60DJzub%2F3cfxsagRE4CjI%2F3uHFVrvOE%2F6szxchFlrVJYOPY7OXJLbRDFTx5qDe9wSDXiWQSrepZgd%2FlXh%2BV4wCIfmO5upS5%2Fo5dStml7dywSTmclgGOEIFdpaAOeIrdA8EJWOiS9LmJNrX6itKmTrNVPMCbeXFku56BIP0kOn9bem9KOnbXYAxAiGn3A2Fj7M3Y1HXXHnNQKNvJUffX30e5g2voGfA1F7vL9oxQU%3D .

name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: First he came for the media. Now this.
body:
FIRST: Trump launched a war on the free press - smearing journalists, silencing dissent, and undermining public trust in truth itself.
NEXT: He tried to overturn the election, fueled an insurrection, and installed loyalists across government to shield himself from accountability.
NOW: He’s targeting ActBlue with an Executive Order that instructs the DOJ to target and investigate it.
ActBlue is the infrastructure that powers everyything from school board races to the fight to flip the House. It’s the tool MILLIONS of grassroots donors use to fight for reproductive freedom, LGBTQ+ rights, climate action, and more.
And Trump has declared war on it.

body:

---
_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109176448/550246742/-1590518309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTA2NDY2ZC1lNjQzLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JaKtfQpEeWxpjhlJ2cVWws7qMpEzmaUE5q5mQZmn-y8=&emci=e3f810a4-fc42-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=d906466d-e643-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=7878003)

Join the resistance. | | | | | | Friend, The Oregon Senate has just passed HB 3789 – a bill so outrageous that it would make even California flinch. What does it do? 👉 Criminalizes telling workers they have the right to leave the union.👉 Silences free speech if it threatens union power. 👉 Protects Democrat donors, not working Oregonians. All backed by Tina Kotek and her radical Leftist allies. | | | | | Make no mistake: this is political thuggery, designed to protect the Democrat machine at the expense of your rights. They’re not even hiding it anymore. This isn’t about “fraud” or “misinformation.” It’s about control. Union bosses fund the Democrat agenda – and the Democrats are paying them back with legislation that censors the truth and strips workers of their freedoms. It’s time to FIGHT BACK. We’re building a war chest to take this fight to the ballot box, expose every Democrat who supported this bill, and elect true conservative fighters who will RESTORE your rights. name: Mazie Hirono
subject: Medicaid keeps people healthy at every stage of life
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
|
#
---
Peter, Through every stage of life, Medicaid provides crucial health care to those who need it most. So let me be clear when I say this: **Republicans’ proposed cuts to Medicaid would be devastating for generations of Americans.** Each year, Medicaid covers over 5,000 births in Hawaii, ensuring mothers and their newborns receive the care they need. Republican cuts to Medicaid would fundamentally disrupt this care, as well as 56% of kupuna — _our elders_ — in Hawaii’s nursing homes. There’s nothing “pro-life” about Republicans’ proposed legislation. Impacting care for thousands of moms and their babies and more than half of Hawaii's seniors living in nursing homes is a **big NO** for me. I'm fighting back against Republican cuts to Medicaid. Mothers, their keiki, and our kupuna deserve nothing less. **[If you stand with me, please chip in an amount that’s meaningful to you today. Every dollar helps us send a message that this team is ready to fight back against Republicans and their cruel agenda.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109176579/550247244/-171743829?amount=&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250607_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDNkMWU4MC1lOTQzLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kki7wnx9ieilP3B6upLKUkVFVHEf6nDjwpyblfbrBjE=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109176580/550247245/-1316975115?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250607_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDNkMWU4MC1lOTQzLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kki7wnx9ieilP3B6upLKUkVFVHEf6nDjwpyblfbrBjE=)

clean_body: | Peter, Through every stage of life, Medicaid provides crucial health care to those who need it most. So let me be clear when I say this: Republicans’ proposed cuts to Medicaid would be devastating for generations of Americans. Each year, Medicaid covers over 5,000 births in Hawaii, ensuring mothers and their newborns receive the care they need. Republican cuts to Medicaid would fundamentally disrupt this care, as well as 56% of kupuna — our elders — in Hawaii’s nursing homes. There’s nothing “pro-life” about Republicans’ proposed legislation. Impacting care for thousands of moms and their babies and more than half of Hawaii's seniors living in nursing homes is a big NO for me. I'm fighting back against Republican cuts to Medicaid. Mothers, their keiki, and our kupuna deserve nothing less. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you. — Mazie Friends of Mazie Hirono 335 Merchant Street #677 Honolulu, HI 96809 United States mailto:info@mazieforhawaii.com | Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii

waking up to the truth – you can't count on the system anymore.

So we gave our warehouse manager, Matt, one mission: PRODUCE AS MANY
KITS AS HUMANLY POSSIBLE.

And wow... did he ever deliver.

The result? A TIDAL WAVE OF INVENTORY JUST CRASHED INTO OUR WAREHOUSE
– MORE KITS THAN WE HAVE SPACE FOR.

Now we're on the hook for major storage costs... and we need your
help.

THIS IS YOUR CHANCE TO TAKE ADVANTAGE OF OUR MISTAKE.

We're slashing prices and practically *giving away* these premium
survival food kits – just to move them fast.

When you claim yours today, you're not only securing peace of mind for
your family... YOU'RE HELPING AN AMERICAN-OWNED COMPANY STAY AFLOAT
THROUGH A SUPPLY CHAIN NIGHTMARE.

And yes – YOU'LL GET A STACK OF FREE BONUSES as our thank you.

CLICK HERE TO CLAIM YOUR EXCLUSIVE DEAL ON THESE SURVIVAL FOOD KITS
WHILE WE STILL HAVE INVENTORY.

# [Yes, Trump is in The Epstein Files. In Fact, He's ALL OVER The Epstein Files](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=165434803&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY1NDM0ODAzLCJpYXQiOjE3NDkzMzQ0ODYsImV4cCI6MTc1MTkyNjQ4NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM3MjI1MzIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.s3iFEKwmkU54YRNvkegtgKF6vaNkPIw54R6Z3CeqsUA)

`Independent Media For $1.32/Week!`
_**We 're running a special! *Full Access* to Blue Amp for only $1.32 per week!**_
_**Please support our work covering stories corporate media ignores. And amplifying indy media to create a viable, powerful indy-media ecosystem**_
_**Amplify Good! Support Indy Media!**_
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.U6hC9iDqfH5P0PVvty9BytnhGGFlWdex1ZCFq1t3djA?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=165434803)
**by David Shuster**
Elon Musk said he was dropping a bomb. And when he wrote, "Donald Trump is in the Epstein files" the media covered his X post as earth shattering news. The implosion of the Trump-Musk relationship was indeed a big deal. As for the Epstein files, several news outlets diminished the allegation about Trump and called it a "dud" because, as CBS News reported, "Musk didn't provide any evidence."
**I am sorry to have to break this to my friends and former colleagues in the mainstream media: The Trump-Epstein connection doesn 't rise or fall based on Elon Musk.** Just look at the Epstein grand jury materials released in Florida last year.
Donald Trump is all over the Epstein call logs. Trump is also in Epstein flight manifests. There are also countless pictures of Trump with a virtual army of young women. And there is video - broadcast years ago by NBC News - of Trump and Epstein partying and then whispering to each other and pointing at the young women dancing in front of them.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/893f2d85-fe60-4694-a641-d4b7de108623?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
If anybody wants even more courthouse material or legal files, google Donald Trump and Katie Johnson. According to a Johnson lawsuit, she was 13 years old and an aspiring model in 1994 when she attended a series of parties at Jeffrey Epstein's Manhattan home. She claimed that Epstein raped her and that she was also tied to a bed and raped by Donald Trump.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c6e6f757-a677-4220-a5a9-cd26a0f61de8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
According to the Johnson lawsuit, quote: "During the course of this savage sexual attack, plaintiff Johnson loudly pleaded with Donald Trump to 'please wear a condom.' Defendant Trump responded by violently striking Plaintiff Johnson in the face with his open hand and screaming that he 'would do whatever he wanted' as he refused to wear protection.
After achieving sexual orgasm, the Defendant Donald J. Trump put his suit back on and when the Plaintiff, Katie Johnson, in tears asked Defendant Donald Trump what would happen if he had impregnated her, Defendant Trump grabbed his wallet and threw some money at her and screamed that she should use the money 'to get a fucking abortion.'"
Katie Johnson dropped her lawsuit against Trump in 2016 without providing a public explanation. But one of her attorneys in the case, Lisa Bloom, said Johnson "had received threats and was afraid." Tragedy compounded by additional tragedy.
As for Donald Trump, his lawyer in this matter - Alan Garten - dismissed the allegations as categorically untrue, saying the lawsuit was "completely frivolous and baseless." The lawsuit documents are separate from the Epstein grand jury materials that were released in Florida, and separate from other grand jury materials still under seal at the Department of Justice.
**Still, the point here is that nobody has to rely on Elon Musk for accusations that Donald Trump is some kind of sex criminal. Trump has already been found in a separate lawsuit to be an "adjudicated rapist." More than 20 women have accused Trump of sexual harassment or sexual assault.** And the Epstein grand jury materials that have already been released prove the Trump-Epstein connections.
**In this video we have a helpful summary of all of this:**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/0072f5f7-5732-42a6-8d0a-160f3341a8f2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
In my view, the most interesting part of the Elon Musk "bomb" as he called it, is his assertion that the Justice Department is still withholding additional Epstein files because they document the actions of Trump. The Justice Department promised to release all of the Epstein files many months ago.
`Independent Media For $1.32/Week!`
_**We 're running a special! *Full Access* to Blue Amp for only $1.32 per week!**_
_**Please support our work covering stories corporate media ignores. And amplifying indy media to create a viable, powerful indy-media ecosystem**_
_**Amplify Good! Support Indy Media!**_
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.U6hC9iDqfH5P0PVvty9BytnhGGFlWdex1ZCFq1t3djA?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=165434803)
Keeping this vast trove of potentially incriminating materials under lock and key has prompted speculation and rumors. Are there videos in these files of Donald Trump having sex with underage girls? Did grand jury witnesses, or even Jeffrey Epstein himself, implicate Donald Trump?
Trump certainly hasn't ever given the impression--from bragging about walking through teenage beauty pageant changing rooms to what he liked so much about spending time with Epstein--that he was anything other than an active participant:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/870e49dc-a42d-42df-a5ed-21ef96e8a55e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Elon Musk could do us all a favor by elaborating on what he knows about any effort by the Trump or those in the Trump Justice Department to squelch anything to do with his involvement in Epstein's nefarious activities. Given Musk's oversight of multiple government agencies, including the Department of Justice, Musk may have some insights.
Musk may have even had some conversations with Attorney General Pam Bondi about this. Or various other Trump Administration officials for whom the whole disgusting Epstein affair would be relevant to their jobs and their oaths of office. Do tell, Elon, the world is watching.
In any case, when you hear about Donald Trump and Jeffrey Epstein, just remember that Trump's sordid, sick and possibly criminal behavior goes **way beyond** just some post Elon Musk decided to toss up on X in anger. There is a whole history here, with documents, images, video and context when you know what else Trump has been accused of, and found guilty of by a federal judge.
I appreciate that it is easier and so much more convenient for mainstream media figures to read and report on angry social media posts, instead of digging through a myriad of grand jury transcripts, documents, and exhibits. The latter can be difficult and time consuming. Yet, all of these Epstein documents are **lousy with the name Donald J. Trump.**
And digging through those files would seem to fall somewhere under what one might call the media's job description. Trump was all over the Epstein Filed _long before_ Elon Musk got mad at Trump and lashed out by mentioning them on his social media platform. **Go find those materials, and tell the American people the truth!**
* * *
_David Shuster is an Emmy award winning broadcast journalist who is best known for his work at NBC News and as an anchor MSNBC. He is a contributor to Blue Amp and has his own Substack[you can subscribe to here](https://substack.com/@davidshuster)._

name: Deb
subject: a broken leg and three options
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
A few years ago while visiting Shenandoah National Park, I took a bit of a tumble.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=2437%2E400544%2EUC-9-0)
A few years ago while visiting Shenandoah National Park, I took a _bit_ of a tumble.
I was hiking up the side of a mountain when I slipped on a loose rock. It was a total freak accident — I couldn’t believe it! But there I was, covered in dirt with a pain in my leg and ankle and three options:
* Get airlifted down in a helicopter,
* take eight National Park staff away from their jobs to carry me down,
* or hike down myself.

**I chose to walk back down the mountain** because I couldn’t stomach the idea of taking our National Park staff away from their work, even for a few hours. It turns out I hiked down all that way with a broken leg. I’ll be honest, I didn’t think my leg was actually broken at the time.
The federal workers who care for our public lands have absolutely crucial jobs to do. They preserve and protect our public lands for millions of visitors each year and for future generations. **Donald Trump has made it clear he intends to auction off our lands to extractive industries like Big Oil. They’ve attempted to fire our dedicated National Parks and National Forests workers en masse.**
As Governor of New Mexico, I will be a fierce defender of our rivers, mesas, farmlands, and forests. I will always stand up for the dedicated workers who serve our communities. **[If you’re with me, will you donate $5 to support our campaign?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250607_2_brokenleg?amount=5&refcode=em20250607-2437&refcode2=2437_400544_UC-9-0&akid=2437%2E400544%2EUC-9-0)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250607_2_brokenleg?amount=5&refcode=em20250607-2437&refcode2=2437_400544_UC-9-0&akid=2437%2E400544%2EUC-9-0)**
As a former Secretary of the Interior, it breaks my heart to see what this administration is doing to exploit our lands and those who care for them.
**But just like the day I chose to hike down the mountain on my broken leg, I am determined to stand up and do right by the workers who proudly serve our nation.**
**[New Mexicans need a governor who isn’t afraid of the tough fights that lie ahead. I can’t win this campaign without you, so please chip in $5 if you can afford it today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250607_2_brokenleg?amount=5&refcode=em20250607-2437&refcode2=2437_400544_UC-9-0&akid=2437%2E400544%2EUC-9-0)**
Be fierce,
Deb
P.S. In case you’re wondering, not even a broken left fibula could keep me away from our beautiful parks for long. Here’s a photo of me from one of my favorite places to visit, Monument Valley Navajo Tribal Park.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250607_2_brokenleg?amount=5&refcode=em20250607-2437&refcode2=2437_400544_UC-9-0&akid=2437%2E400544%2EUC-9-0)
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250607-2&t=2&refcode2=2437_400544_UC-9-0&akid=2437%2E400544%2EUC-9-0)**
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=3&akid=2437%2E400544%2EUC-9-0)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=4&akid=2437%2E400544%2EUC-9-0)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)

subject: Do the courts have the final say on the U.S. Constitution?
body:
CNN claims, “There are warnings that the U.S. is dangerously close to a constitutional crisis.”

| _Please see a special message from our sponsor. There is a constitutional crisis, but it's not what CNN thinks it is.

**The far-Left wants the current administration to obey the dictates of federal district court judges rather than the will of a majority of the American people.**

But do federal judges control the executive branch? Does the judicial branch have the final say in determining what is or is not constitutional?

Because the far-Left has undermined informed patriotism by promoting a distorted view of our nation's history and Constitution--including the judicial branch--many Americans do not know the answers to these questions.

That's why your participation in Hillsdale College's [**National Survey on the U.S. Judicial Branch**](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/8lS1lMVeIG2b2kisP-hbpj0OXdDlK-AAxPhEI5XEIOvkmnAw8aUhiGqieC_tCo17M3r281YFWJC-FkUQDOhWV2AMXI-ENtt1PmfUmh7FnMnsFtYUQVefg5rSXn-Pa0Ok5jDljUFQMEJjvwvl39Kpg4JD3Bz9mXp2vk8iWR3UNBVQJfMNv0PJOxlkJPhULr54qz9ZjSnz6MtsM_rcqad1RiNOxdG3bAlh5BfmXePNiyy6Hbx8vJrvFzBWJScex_D1HnvlPTVLrBXtUwu670aRMOxc-Z2qyWoNLQY6lH2N_9AfJh54m9QN1c0gLSCmyHaYcCSx3eoPzNNBepzyTuZ5RzPkzfXYiuERbHTEhI9muYoYWCU6Pk9hgrtne8nnO6StDe6V2UAeXNvURcut_hbRGV9p2H2NAkeMlKEo35m6n-Eu76G5x4-lHvLG4Pu6Z_sznvRLeuiaG2KND-Jrvo0mXXMZTOwkGG7ppfA6AOmIlz1koZEwHNBM18D6oKQCgluUgDIPAU3mSCXx3TUcGnhdo2Dzlu0ehO_1zFF7Hn7vNwhHRvy5Q8tcjml9-_kIkoBdAjrZG5VV80jP2vV0-IsiQP4UB2MoLKIezNj-yL1gqNyAdvQgiCINO6LlXBXjEqDk6UTk-mYiUWapaxZ1YvcZsJcsxdongE_Onujom-0RW2MW2DXFhFTo-mGUdfmrAugf_cIs0pIqeqNn0zj5w6RC3ggRtWydSvcG5iH7DRV4YnzOmWmk5OnfpMQp_BPRV_gCREsmIrMp2AFqFfznAYmz/Rkh4PZEmtLQxEfcMi7n98xQhhjvtbpiZ/9) is urgently requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, and the survey topic is crucial to the future of liberty and separation of powers in America.

You will help Hillsdale College form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the separation of powers and checks and balances--including the judiciary's proper role in our government.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the U.S. Judicial Branch** using this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/national-survey-on-the-us-judicial-branch**](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/4RxgVKbxk48xdt74nP1fYLb2JC9-J85PGgPj21-EfMSRAS6Efi9vfL3Z5oEmf6UX2-QFxDlhVUMb7RXXZGLIoonbjUPq8E3z1wr1ZVpkbobc59zCtrjDVP0-FIJFAtTURMzHxImqAL0bhyOKi7NXjpPMR-GBYLVuMlhiwI54Gk8UA1iYNrSp9drJz-LKTWWDNlqPJ4O50fkwP0VLWMzmqdZIi_JIpDV4amX2nnwONkCtvFaTgFJraNntsCjd0ncYcNYRVHOqEyufuAzJBkXfMgMFKX_6WC9p3u_QGh6PETN3L4RHG5EzHi_31pjgRC8I-3aOW7Tvyl8nE36rlfcrdVqBkVVhAyqYHV2SUkYwRcPES57DxjTO6DbtUBLtO2OGd18n6oDzp3qTMwHHo44FhyWLAz-wj_fFDp9QcDX8LnCWq03LNNh4h7JjXLSqgph7ZYATqbEbL8W9ENQNEQxJ1thOu4hvJRoOcOIdGWhAYib6QjO2fzEBNgZaObeVUSyKIs94jFRCsB2l7C1wWdIDij1N87PnND6tdNYVK5m5QOFS0XXVGzpA8LLBsSS8eMm6FOy_FC4JxGDC-H8W0Hi5Pf8j17cFvjexRVq7qEZnluaHlCSbYVZrndtq064AVBEkdl5pIRvOPVMcDGVVfaPzy-aFFfQl05bZZY0kWZGniwtUm1ENJ2FdCRVk4rfJOvMak3iC4Q1nmRpO8Kq2NOQPRAKAHsrHu5t0DKjDq_MQZoPJDSYQQy-hFMqjChz-p4aVLSRO37NEECDanZHU9k6M/Lx_CNG4lYGvaxzH7b_s0A_aOzU1HXdVN/9)

Larry P. Arnn

Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene **[clashed with Rep. Jasmine Crockett](https://substack.com/redirect/93c35a4a-3fd0-4a4d-ae4f-8efdf040956b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** over Democrat backlash to DOGE disrupting the left's massive ideological bureaucracy, during a DOGE subcommittee hearing.
MTG shut Crockett right up...
[Watch The Video](https://substack.com/redirect/93c35a4a-3fd0-4a4d-ae4f-8efdf040956b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/93c35a4a-3fd0-4a4d-ae4f-8efdf040956b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"Trump has put a 'for sale' sign on the lawn of the White House, and has allowed wealthy donors to dictate how the government operates," Crockett argued, pointing the finger at the Heritage Foundation, the author of Project 2025, which she claims America is currently "living through the hell of."
**["It was the conservative playbook,"](https://substack.com/redirect/93c35a4a-3fd0-4a4d-ae4f-8efdf040956b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** she continued. "As far as I'm concerned, I don't know why we would ever look at the Heritage Foundation and think that it's anything but radical and 'addicted to government money.'"
Greene took the chance to respond to Crockett's one-sided rant. "As we've heard here today, American taxpayer dollars are being laundered through the revolving door of NGOs and Democrat officials," she explained. "We do not support politically connected NGOs who rake in billions of federal tax dollars to serve the Democrat party and their friends and their priorities!"
"Most of the time, all congress does if **[create more laws, more regulations and spend more of the American people's dollars!"](https://substack.com/redirect/93c35a4a-3fd0-4a4d-ae4f-8efdf040956b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** MTG sounded off. "But right here on the DOGE subcommittee,... we are actually making a difference, and we're going to be cutting government funding, government spending and waste, fraud and abuse!"
Watch the confrontation here:
[Watch The Video](https://substack.com/redirect/93c35a4a-3fd0-4a4d-ae4f-8efdf040956b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# **Trump 's Push For America First**
What we are seeing right now is truly historic.
President Trump has been pushing the limits on what is possible. I haven't seen anything like this since President Ronald Reagan.
But with this unbelievable push for an American First agenda, comes a few problems. Well, as President Trump said in a recent interview I had with him...
"There could be a little disruption. What we're doing is building a foundation for the future."
If you want to learn more about **[Trump's Great American Reset](https://substack.com/redirect/b308ca8a-8791-4395-a344-8c0f4c3fbe79?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**, go ahead read this **[great article](https://substack.com/redirect/b308ca8a-8791-4395-a344-8c0f4c3fbe79?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that just went up. # **Vance calls Musk's Epstein accusations against Trump a "huge mistake"**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4a13085d-ed63-42b4-aee7-9202cac37399?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The Vice President **[told comedian Theo Von](https://substack.com/redirect/4a13085d-ed63-42b4-aee7-9202cac37399?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that Musk's claim about Trump being in the Jeffrey Epstein files was wrong and defended the president, saying Trump "didn't do anything wrong with Jeffrey Epstein."
* **He warned that a "blood feud" between Trump and Musk would hurt both the country and Musk personally** \- Vance argued that continued conflict between the two powerful figures would be damaging for America and predicted it wouldn't end well for the Tesla CEO either.
* **Vance suggested Musk may have been pushed over the edge by attacks on his businesses and political pressures** \- He speculated that violent threats against Musk, including "firebombing some of his cars," combined with frustrations over the budget reconciliation bill, may have caused the tech billionaire to lash out inappropriately.
* **The Vice President acknowledged Musk's concerns about the spending bill while defending its overall purpose** \- Vance admitted the legislation wasn't "perfect" and understood Musk's frustrations with the slow-moving, bureaucratic D.C. process, but emphasized that the bill's main goal was preventing major tax increases rather than increasing spending.

* * *
# **Federal officials BLAST Democrats for inciting violence against ICE agents**
The Department of Homeland Security said violent protests in Los Angeles and New York **[followed rhetoric from Democrats](https://substack.com/redirect/da9599f3-29af-45d7-8c75-24fbf5124619?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** like Hakeem Jeffries, Tim Walz, and local mayors who "villainized and demonized" ICE law enforcement, leading to over 1,000 rioters surrounding a federal building and assaulting officers.
* **ICE agents are facing a massive spike in attacks and threats against their families** \- DHS reported a 413% increase in assaults against ICE officers, with agents' family members being doxxed and targeted, while protesters in LA slashed tires, defaced buildings, and attacked federal property during Friday's demonstrations.
* **The protests came after major ICE operations that arrested hundreds of illegal immigrants** \- ICE arrested 118 illegal immigrants in Los Angeles this week, including gang members and those with criminal histories involving drug trafficking, assault, domestic violence, and other serious crimes, while nationwide operations resulted in 2,000 arrests of illegal immigrants.

clean_body: "Our government is not a charity for the left to use to launder money through to their friends!!" | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? "Our government is not a charity for the left to use to launder money through to their friends!!" | | | Jun 7 | | | | | | | | | | | | Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene over Democrat backlash to DOGE disrupting the left's massive ideological bureaucracy, during a DOGE subcommittee hearing. MTG shut Crockett right up... "Trump has put a 'for sale' sign on the lawn of the White House, and has allowed wealthy donors to dictate how the government operates," Crockett argued, pointing the finger at the Heritage Foundation, the author of Project 2025, which she claims America is currently "living through the hell of." she continued. "As far as I'm concerned, I don't know why we would ever look at the Heritage Foundation and think that it's anything but radical and 'addicted to government money.'" Greene took the chance to respond to Crockett's one-sided rant. "As we've heard here today, American taxpayer dollars are being laundered through the revolving door of NGOs and Democrat officials," she explained. "We do not support politically connected NGOs who rake in billions of federal tax dollars to serve the Democrat party and their friends and their priorities!" "Most of the time, all congress does if MTG sounded off. "But right here on the DOGE subcommittee,... we are actually making a difference, and we're going to be cutting government funding, government spending and waste, fraud and abuse!" Watch the confrontation here: | | ---|---|--- Trump 's Push For America First What we are seeing right now is truly historic. President Trump has been pushing the limits on what is possible. I haven't seen anything like this since President Ronald Reagan. But with this unbelievable push for an American First agenda, comes a few problems. Well, as President Trump said in a recent interview I had with him... "There could be a little disruption. What we're doing is building a foundation for the future." If you want to learn more about , go ahead read this that just went up. It's filled with some valuable information about what's in store for America, and what we could potentially be up against. Yours Truly, SEAN HANNITY | | ---|---|--- Vance calls Musk's Epstein accusations against Trump a "huge mistake" | | ---|---|--- The Vice President that Musk's claim about Trump being in the Jeffrey Epstein files was wrong and defended the president, saying Trump "didn't do anything wrong with Jeffrey Epstein." He warned that a "blood feud" between Trump and Musk would hurt both the country and Musk personally \- Vance argued that continued conflict between the two powerful figures would be damaging for America and predicted it wouldn't end well for the Tesla CEO either. Vance suggested Musk may have been pushed over the edge by attacks on his businesses and political pressures \- He speculated that violent threats against Musk, including "firebombing some of his cars," combined with frustrations over the budget reconciliation bill, may have caused the tech billionaire to lash out inappropriately. The Vice President acknowledged Musk's concerns about the spending bill while defending its overall purpose \- Vance admitted the legislation wasn't "perfect" and understood Musk's frustrations with the slow-moving, bureaucratic D.C. process, but emphasized that the bill's main goal was preventing major tax increases rather than increasing spending. Federal officials BLAST Democrats for inciting violence against ICE agents The Department of Homeland Security said violent protests in Los Angeles and New York like Hakeem Jeffries, Tim Walz, and local mayors who "villainized and demonized" ICE law enforcement, leading to over 1,000 rioters surrounding a federal building and assaulting officers. ICE agents are facing a massive spike in attacks and threats against their families \- DHS reported a 413% increase in assaults against ICE officers, with agents' family members being doxxed and targeted, while protesters in LA slashed tires, defaced buildings, and attacked federal property during Friday's demonstrations. The protests came after major ICE operations that arrested hundreds of illegal immigrants \- ICE arrested 118 illegal immigrants in Los Angeles this week, including gang members and those with criminal histories involving drug trafficking, assault, domestic violence, and other serious crimes, while nationwide operations resulted in 2,000 arrests of illegal immigrants. | | POLL How should Trump react to Elon Musk's Epstein claim? | ? ? ?
