clean_body: Peter, we need to know: We've heard from Republicans across the country who are saying our emails aren't reaching them anymore. And if that's happening to you, we are in SERIOUS trouble. That's why they're trying to silence us by blocking our communications with you to stop our efforts to defend the Senate Majority. So we need to know for sure. \- NRSC HQ | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. |

name: SIGN THE THANK YOU LETTER (VPP)
subject: Justice Sotomayor just issued a stark warning:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
You need to read this
| **Justice Sotomayor just issued a dire warning about where our country is headed:** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90857?t=6&akid=20132%2E878179%2EqYw5Fo) Sonia Sotomayor has been on the frontlines of the fight against Trump — from SLAMMING the immunity decision to standing up for reproductive rights!

[**As one of the few defenders of our democracy left on the Supreme Court, we’re sending Sotomayor a letter thanking her for her incredible work. ONLY 30 SPOTS LEFT: SIGN YOUR NAME NOW! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90857?t=7&akid=20132%2E878179%2EqYw5Fo) | [**Donate $3 to sign the letter now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90857?t=8&akid=20132%2E878179%2EqYw5Fo)
---
TO: Justice Sonia Sotomayor
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: Thank you for taking a stand. **Dear Justice Sotomayor,

Thank you for standing up for our democracy against Donald Trump’s increasingly extremist agenda and unconstitutional power grab.**

Your scathing dissent against the MAGA Justices’ immunity decision was historic, and you haven’t backed down even a little bit since then.

**As Trump tries to seize more and more control from Congress and the courts, your resilience is needed now more than ever.**

I’m sick and tired of the GOP letting him off scot-free — so I’m doing everything in my power to elect Democrats and ensure we appoint more amazing Supreme Court Justices like YOU in the near future.

[**I know you’re facing relentless attacks from Trump and his MAGA minions, so I’m signing this thank you letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to help Democrats keep fighting for justice »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90857?t=9&akid=20132%2E878179%2EqYw5Fo) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90857?t=10&akid=20132%2E878179%2EqYw5Fo)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
—The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20132%2E878179%2EqYw5Fo). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20132%2E878179%2EqYw5Fo).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=20132%2E878179%2EqYw5Fo) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=20132%2E878179%2EqYw5Fo). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=20132%2E878179%2EqYw5Fo)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=20132%2E878179%2EqYw5Fo)

body:

$3. If you knew that making a $3 contribution to the DNC would mean you could win a chance to meet President Obama, wouldn’t it be the best $3 you ever spent? If you knew that $3 would _also_ help Democrats win key elections this year, take back Congress next year, and ultimately win back the White House, wouldn’t $3 be worth it? We know $3 might not seem like it can do both of those things... **But it’s true: If you pitch in today to support the DNC’s work, you’ll be automatically entered for your chance to meet President Obama later this summer.** [**You can use this link to chip in:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-meet-obama-sweepstakes-2025?refcode=em_20250607_3663_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3663_22930333_V21ed4&akid=3663%2E22930333%2EV21ed4) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | | **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-meet-obama-sweepstakes-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250607_3663_fr&refcode2=3663_22930333_V21ed4&akid=3663%2E22930333%2EV21ed4)**
